_**by Cliff Schecter**_
It was bound to happen. When every member of your movement has a God complex, sooner or later someone tries to crucify the other.
This is what has become of MAGA, the nice little acronym for Make America Great Again, a slogan Trump borrowed straight from Mussolini, who claimed he'd make Italy great again. And really that's all you ever needed to know about Trump. And the movement he built in his bloated, tangerine-tinted image.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/393bd58b-2c36-42a1-876f-bef0043ec5cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
MAGA has quite purposely attracted the worst among us, the unhinged, fame-hungry the narcissists--the kinda people who see empathy as weakness and cruelty as content. And then, quelle surprise, the monsters eventually start eating each other.
So welcome my friends to the great MAGA meltdown, starring Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene (MTG): two human tire fires locked in a death match over who gets to be the face of America's latest psychotic break.
For years, Greene was Trump's most devoted disciple. His high priestess of victimization fantasies. His walking, talking, COVID-quacking, Jewish-laser ducking, Facebook comment section.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b761472-fdbc-4645-bfc1-cdeb4dd574c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Eww**
She wept over his mugshot (didn't you?). Called January 6th a "patriot protest." Wore his persecution like Trump Cologne. But in a self-contained land of the pathologically egocentric, loyalty's a one-way street ending at a cliff. So when MTG suddenly started saying sane things--which has had many of us scratching our heads--Trump noticed.
She announced herself as one of four Republicans--and the loudest next to Rep. Tom Massie--defying Trump's efforts to bury the Epstein files, demanding that the House vote to release them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f125a1dc-44ed-41e2-8d7d-2def4fb5a023?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now there were other figures on the Right who joined her in this fight, as they'd promised to release the files for years if Trump were elected, while implying all wrongdoing had been done by them darn Demon-crats.
* * *
Cliff Schecter & Blue Amp Media in your inbox is even better than a MAGA Civil War!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PG1HgdYGG4KT29oH7aecdX22dRmAS8Npot8poERY49U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179193834)
* * *
The problem is, Trump appears in Epstein's little log more times than Jesus in the New Testament. So Trump did what he always does--lied and tried to go back on his promise to give them to the public.
But, for once, a movement raised on a diet of pizza-place-basement sexual enslavement fantasy--at the hands of Hillary Clinton, of course--would not let one of Trump's lies just flitter away. I mean this was, after all, theoretically the raison d'etre for the existence of QAnon.
Yet, MTG's anti-Trump perfidy didn't end there. After breaking with him on Epstein, she shocked many a conservative by also coming out in favor of extending Obamacare subsidies.
> Let's just say as nicely as possible, I'm not a fan. But I'm going to go against everyone on this issue because when the tax credits expire this year my own adult children's insurance premiums for 2026 are going to DOUBLE, along with all the wonderful families and hard-working people in my district.
Maybe she did some polling in her very right-wing district and saw Trump bleeding red-hats. From farmers whose livelihoods he destroyed by deporting their workforce, to small businesses he wrecked by tariff-ing their products.
Or perhaps it was because she realized her voters were the ones who'd be hurt most by not funding the subsidies, and she had a pang of guilt (I'm still skeptical). Or she realized when people couldn't see a doctor and died because Trump took their healthcare, that'd create what we in the political business call "a sh*t sandwich."
Whatever her reasoning, MTG began to step up her disagreements with Trump, while couching it in the language of "I'm not attacking him, I'm doing what's in his best interest." But, ya see, that could only last so long. He's a broken toy, after all.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/393bd58b-2c36-42a1-876f-bef0043ec5cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's recall Trump destroyed the career of the first Senator to support his run for President, Jeff Sessions, at a time when he really needed it. All because when Trump made the old coot Attorney General, Sessions wouldn't just break law for him willy-nilly whenever he asked.
Trump to actually endorsed Sessions' opponent when he tried to run for his old Alabama Senate seat again--because with Trump outgoing loyalty is a cul-de-sac...with a giant sinkhole.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc044fbe-5741-48f5-ae46-77a0cf948f71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Which brings us back to MTG. It was never gonna end well once Trump started asking others in the White House "what's going on with mother?" Oh, wait, different weirdo. Trump actually asked "what's going on with Marjorie?"
And when nobody could answer his question, the spoiled little hobbledeohoy had all he could take of her undermining him, no matter how she tried to hide it behind kind words. So Trump, as is his way (and as he's described it), "blew his stack."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74c72316-9c0c-4b41-b268-012c81a5d4a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Per usual, a psychologist, and a 5th grade English class, could have a field day with this. But let's stick with the main event. Trump teed off.
MTG, though in not in the personal terms he used, finally responded publicly, calling his behavior "vicious and unwarranted." (I'd argue this is a summary of his life). Yes, not as harsh as his attacks, but she continued, and her hits were more politically astute.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/baac871f-bd57-45b5-8574-cdbbcd8ad258?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
She went after Donny Ding Dong on his support for H-1B visas to bring "skilled foreign workers" here (because he said we lack the "talent"), and his support for Netanyahu, saying "those are not America first positions."
This while Trump's losing his base by seemingly trying to make Marie Antoinette look like Oliver Twist.
He's sending billions to bailout Argentina as they take our soybean market from China because of his idiotic, yet likely somehow Trump-enriching, tariffs. He's golded-up the Oval Office to obscenity, thrown Great Gatsby self-celebratory jamborees, is building a huge ballroom...for himself.
This as he skyrockets inflation on the non-essentials of food and healthcare, while cutting funding for...food and healthcare. Mostly clobbering _his own voters_! **At what point does it start to just feel like he accepted a dare?** Or had someone used hand puppets to explain the French and Russian Revolutions, and thought, "What can I do to reach Romanov and Sun King levels of asshole?"
Marge, in case anyone didn't get her point, made it clear in her follow-up hit on Trump:
> It's astonishing really how hard he's fighting to stop the Epstein files from coming out that he actually goes to this level. But really **most Americans wish he would fight this hard to help the forgotten men and women of America** who are fed up with foreign wars and foreign causes, are going broke trying to feed their families, and are losing hope of ever achieving the American dream.
Trump responded the only way he knows how...with more personal attacks, sending his hygienically-challenged Truth Social mob after her:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f388155-8eb7-4552-8720-5132942f0aed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46c1946d-c5c4-432e-bb7a-209a5d8c1aa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's break for a second to point out that if you feel the need to explain a nickname, it sucks. Seriously, "Green turns to Brown where there is ROT involved??" Ok, thanks, professor. But I digress.
Trump calls her a traitor twice in this post, which is him trying to threaten her. It worked. Her son got two death threats. Now I won't blame anyone who feels no sympathy for her after all she's done, but let's be honest about what he's doing.
And let's put it like this: if you think the Epstein Files have sick Trump secrets, can you imagine what Marge could share were she to decide to talk? She was in meetings at The Willard Hotel after the 2020 election, where they discussed how to derail democracy. God only knows what other meetings she's been a part of or witnessed.
So, yes, it's Godzilla vs King Kong. And this time, it's personal.
Except instead of skyscrapers getting flattened, it could be MAGA. You have Trump, the lumbering narcissistic behemoth fueled by grievance and a nauseating color of spray tan. And Marge is providing a road map for others of the alienated to attack him.
And then there's Greene, the (former?) shrieking QAnon banshee long powered by delusion and CrossFit rage. Watching them fight is like watching a typhoon argue with a tornado over who wrecked the trailer park, when they both did.
But here's a deeper truth that makes the fight so telling. Trump's feud with Greene isn't just personal, it's structural. To quote Agent Smith taunting Neo in _The Matrix_ as a train approaches: **You hear that, Mr.** **Anderson?.. That is the sound of inevitability**..
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ac7cc77-72c9-4b82-808c-dffdbd0c7160?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Again, a movement built entirely on anger, paranoia, and self-worship, with some of the most maladjusted humans this side of Jonestown, would always eventually devour itself. It's toddlers lacking superegos going at it. It's Lord of the Flies.
MAGA was never an ideology. It was a personality disorder with a flag.
When Trump was ascendant, everyone could project their madness onto him. Now that he's old, frail, purple-ish, more erratic, and staring at a future Truth & Reconciliation Committee should he lose power, his worshippers are turning on each other for attention and to grab hold of whatever MAGA scraps they can masticate.
You can see it everywhere. Ted Cruz sniping at Tucker Carlson. Elon Musk ripping Stephen Miller. Hell, Musk even took Miller's wife with him when he left DOGE. Laura Loomer bellowing at Nick Fuentes--i.e. a person who chained herself to the door at Twitter HQ in New York because..who knows, vs an actual Nazi.
And JD Vance. Nobody likes JD Vance, likely most of all his Indian-American wife who's an inconvenient religion and color for his new white supremacist friends. Ok, Peter Thiel still likes JD. But nobody likes Peter Thiel.
It's _The Real Housewives of Himmler_ , except fewer morals and worse hair. The through-line is clear: when your cult is populated entirely by people who can't share a spotlight without biting the hand that shines it, collapse isn't just likely, it's inevitable. Like Agent Smith said.
* * *
Join our movement to save democracy in 2026
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PG1HgdYGG4KT29oH7aecdX22dRmAS8Npot8poERY49U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179193834)
* * *
And the result, as MAGA crumbles, is Trump's weakness is _everywhere_. A man who once demanded fealty and got it is now begging for it and not getting it. Marjorie Taylor Greene's revolt, perhaps opportunistic, perhaps pathetic, TBD--is still the beginning of the end.
She was the truest true believer, someone who once groped a cardboard cutout of him in front of an audience. If even she's clawing at him, this after he's been ditched by Fuentes, Candace Owens, and many other far right nutbars, he's in trouble.
Lauren Boebert is rejecting Trump's Situation Room recruitment speeches, Nancy Mace is sending his calls to voicemail. So many Republican members of the House said they'd vote for the Epstein bill--i.e. directly against Trump's wishes--he's now pretending he supports it.
You know this only gets worse. _**For him.**_
Trump's entire empire was built on the illusion of strength. This feud rips that mask off and shows what's really underneath: a lonely, fading narcissist and his army of imitators, tearing each other apart for the last dollops of relevance.
So yes, enjoy the fireworks. The Godzilla-Kong-Typhoon-Tornado Royale. This is not to say what replaces MAGA won't be better or less dangerous; a lot of that is up to how hard we're willing to fight and how hard they fight each other.
But this is what the beginning of the end of MAGA looks like. Not with a bang, but with a brood of self-obsessed sociopaths eating their own.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/393bd58b-2c36-42a1-876f-bef0043ec5cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And if you're sick of corporate media treating Trump's collapse like it isn't happening, instead of the unraveling of a dangerous movement with real-life implications, you're in the right place. **Blue Amp Media** is reader-funded. No billionaire owners, no party bosses, no "both-sides" nonsense. Just real reporting and opinion exposing dangerous people for who they are, authoritarian and monopoly power for what it is.
👉 **[Become a paid subscriber to Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/redirect/ff03b2e7-88ad-4cef-a841-5fa0bfbdaaae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Help us keep independent, fact-based journalism loud enough to drown out the MAGA meltdown.
**P.S.** Fox News won't cover this implosion honestly; they're too busy sweeping up the wreckage while pointing away and yelling "squirrel." But _we_ just did.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e8530c6-3762-4f37-a6a3-5077517fe4c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

I will never take your sacrifice for granted.

Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice.[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=973d0a345096433aa69d5ee2417b5791&_e=XOLGCkupkIBerky4CK3FN2-FCOFxnZaFFMSktkCAGPpBZkGQb-gKNs4LJ4GbQGZAppDAGmhYiPArq53EOxFLnEzDICwDFhqz896GBWzlq_FHZKf-azIL9cKsE6bVPEDiirPltRErgzBdfEYWQcmBX56v4luPEhrPfYsqpsTBOOwbuRTRojcyvMPebER8139gRECUVCRlOZ_tuaDDZTviH6CFTGbDbULeBgaGe1Mce3f4peGV5aHbFwntoU3CpCHTBmO5F6R8fH60gn8qF6huHQwqsexA7NO_vD613nebmUhiw-Y4gi6ghmNvMhNUVYyT-6xszn9Il7WDpee0rA0y0ipT399nzW2Je-iKL90QBMeq0TEo3mQatW4oi2kll0pyXuDJ_EGRnXMrzwJaK4d9POTqq38DNhdu_mZQ4-UYYV2uNFq2GWsfWh6_pB8dPf_PhvOKIBCnpuyIFppJJleEp66NKop71FSix9suMBkHRGjSdPfKidRJ-g9Dl5hZTFI7gsOy_naJsjnZA-AEQPMLvojpSJcaUzIPvl1wFQfZAUAWfQYg-CPG3plRm5KVHwAGV5ltHVS6jrjDAtw8F3wYBTeXQqvSd-O7DK3gX-9MSQQgbyNtbbXPtiejYPleSeTtK80eoyhq_ZeQdgJATjRQFNTmU0h2STwL2IVT7CDxdj0BUaoSUu7-JQfNAt1OOtW2pRfXX3g-CdJrrwSjxVMyQp8t6_Z7mbwEciDEwa2L-7yzf4mU-bUbRH-QT9mAPBfgYyLTWgoEDzv010VJm1PDbFYr7SwGuYM5sOXp1QZ24CkjPJtuXLzrlezerlUwmgB838WgsPv2f85otLrmqRebq23eJgP06cTfUy5KarfGLLhGGRZPXyZu1glOovYMkcDm2EPVznJcE8XhEkYvfFG12_0Z4NKg4Um4wL3zmPAOo4Q%3D)That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Fellow American!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=973d0a345096433aa69d5ee2417b5791&_e=XOLGCkupkIBerky4CK3FN2-FCOFxnZaFFMSktkCAGPpBZkGQb-gKNs4LJ4GbQGZAppDAGmhYiPArq53EOxFLnEzDICwDFhqz896GBWzlq_FHZKf-azIL9cKsE6bVPEDiirPltRErgzBdfEYWQcmBX56v4luPEhrPfYsqpsTBOOwbuRTRojcyvMPebER8139gRECUVCRlOZ_tuaDDZTviH6CFTGbDbULeBgaGe1Mce3f4peGV5aHbFwntoU3CpCHTBmO5F6R8fH60gn8qF6huHQwqsexA7NO_vD613nebmUhiw-Y4gi6ghmNvMhNUVYyT-6xszn9Il7WDpee0rA0y0ipT399nzW2Je-iKL90QBMevbANRcy3mz-AOGAhCz4ar7j2gGSDDFgS_iTrXq54WkTTrM8sT1CvczYl6oIfPWacgU-Ym4bWbfZ2rTo85qDbrjUO3PHAhMux4ErFV5h5lobhFh4jqIA8kgxW7flFUGJORNoqem_Sd9Yc3i92sN1bY5LwFJ01YFfVTIu38OOJFkR3DzydS6lrVWys1bLyJGfqHcsHnJGclPxzIoJH_M3wUQkhblUsHR_oMxOx9JgWHYsgkPqIVGk8jQ6uxYzM7kEbU6yuXJTxax5JFvIgHpKnm5tcfFrMKBhk8a7FchCrJAr7otdCxISebcLXHRV-KE8LfPUE8Y-MbSuXzYziIKXkdZ1k874V7OaROyuiNLBjELyELxuUOXdMQVcOLXzX4CHIWng6S0JI9dphGr4LCRof6es5Jd3wRldwPQlvxI-FuZ25_9rQ3NpnhZdxv0u2YQPlJaUehO4mwfK3XKhoYrp_3RItyH_wG-UblTNIfdObkb-OgoaPaZMiKDIWI8ayCibb5WCHBSejirtULSA5rdo_fNtz2GxzmSEMYVxG_yrtoRJkgLIDY24GH0JDJ90j6X-I%3D)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=973d0a345096433aa69d5ee2417b5791&_e=XOLGCkupkIBerky4CK3FN2-FCOFxnZaFFMSktkCAGPpBZkGQb-gKNs4LJ4GbQGZAppDAGmhYiPArq53EOxFLnEzDICwDFhqz896GBWzlq_FHZKf-azIL9cKsE6bVPEDiirPltRErgzBdfEYWQcmBX56v4luPEhrPfYsqpsTBOOwbuRTRojcyvMPebER8139gRECUVCRlOZ_tuaDDZTviH6CFTGbDbULeBgaGe1Mce3f4peGV5aHbFwntoU3CpCHTBmO5F6R8fH60gn8qF6huHQwqsexA7NO_vD613nebmUhiw-Y4gi6ghmNvMhNUVYyT-6xszn9Il7WDpee0rA0y0ipT399nzW2Je-iKL90QBMfC-BUhyzhOZJ5n1nlwW9oH3SIwfpXziUTmUdKiz4_uKmFCt-ClYdITM6jLW8pParZdP8Uh8GnJWxmV7sY2orWTpDQxrm0FbUu1BUjDHKsZi5WFXqD6WPONxSCmNjfC5MYqzyYt-lfQrD_RUktplqkszTBxn8WyKxYHro_mCqAlw_AeN4LUDZiwSMRXniSqnLPe6yqwMpezuw-7kNEUSZ0WW0ckjCMZAl7cRslGocZYTxLAfwVb6B24lJvu2T3Y1MTefKuwZ0bhhz5HcwiueotANzooX-wtkJc46nxStxMMuwtQklKwPnRi1HAMmk3C5zaIFIwSG7i1aiyJCZobLzr22UVKbyMz6afzDxiwAXuTMyALOWfdXWeepVqb4kfOrrxbRWncTL5zdWCtsoqFYIml9Ny9OIedDHcxIEn0wTsM6beI-JbYgVGwY9KZ9D3weZcOuLpfi4SX6zkvsx83jsMbZSCiZ5vkFg9o9KCc52IYxcdIHgbYwRrFceUUa0uU6TJEvTgq3q4fG8CMoWNeb0sNKTkijp9bnT6Mibul6K0VnfqGxIQpTR4a0dROwcj6Fb4%3D) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **
**And if you haven 't given yet - [and you’re able to spare even $1 today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=973d0a345096433aa69d5ee2417b5791&_e=XOLGCkupkIBerky4CK3FN2-FCOFxnZaFFMSktkCAGPpBZkGQb-gKNs4LJ4GbQGZAppDAGmhYiPArq53EOxFLnEzDICwDFhqz896GBWzlq_FHZKf-azIL9cKsE6bVPEDiirPltRErgzBdfEYWQcmBX56v4luPEhrPfYsqpsTBOOwbuRTRojcyvMPebER8139gRECUVCRlOZ_tuaDDZTviH6CFTGbDbULeBgaGe1Mce3f4peGV5aHbFwntoU3CpCHTBmO5F6R8fH60gn8qF6huHQwqsexA7NO_vD613nebmUhiw-Y4gi6ghmNvMhNUVYyT-6xszn9Il7WDpee0rA0y0ipT399nzW2Je-iKL90QBMd9GDU5mTL2i9LF4k9jipI-CeHefrnfh4fmMprazKhNJ4UPM08EQJvkpbq4kVqtgR-79CavrdJcXM08_3hN8oCLHT4I7yecO5Q2XCoaIHNAcbSOT6kl-NCnoSsdA-4x_D7xtYByWXA24OVA2MvrutV7Zw5AoOLHBOBBuKQ6TMZ4jo4iep2NWOBm1Lsd4pS-Pion1G0NNxK5rkGAQAwGAyM5ReguCTi2735EoC4Le1rXVA8GjITQvANsQaZtQTpk3ko49dnhbRSDDMd4wSsr631nLK_Va1GvR67rjlNdB974cxS_XZoEGRE8IEB3MHFbzWHCpCd0l3aVhmVj1avaLg_tSYtpIQc-7OAheumxOZEVJ8Y1MiXDgeyFWomz4v5IAjxkRvaaeSRqzrtF89vPg1xN8RTQhEhTeKBrVIwet2uXC4fybrpLqlcNSiughzvqquVOPh4VDd6njJ1ogTIVidvtgJ65WC5xdjzcKMNDw4LY9B-WDQTv9srTYXX9I2kcZkAn_BlA60PusC_EKTBL-tJoqogHLT-3P9NNjT9EX-TM7f2FMAyDQ4BRkjherMkBV1Y%3D) - I'd be honored to have you on my team.

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

body:
Building a winning campaign starts with keeping your interests top of mind – so can you please share them with me and my team?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535924/583390724/-2054079050?code=jtk989-su-nd&refcode=jtk989-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcAfWR8NzaK1L8kDBQ6iBSjC6qTq4XTn-yu9sfy5JK0=)

Friend, fighting in the Senate for working families in Colorado and nationwide has been the greatest honor of my life.
When you elected me to my first full term in 2010 – the toughest race I've ever run – I was so proud that in just a year, I earned your trust to continue fighting for you and your loved ones in Washington. And ever since that moment, my No. 1 priority has been keeping it.
But since I first landed in Washington, I've seen a lot of politicians around me lose their connection to the folks who trusted them to serve their states.
**So if I'm going to earn your trust to keep serving you as Colorado's next governor, I can _never_ let that happen.**
**_[That's why, before 11:59 p.m., I'm personally counting on your help to win – not by chipping in a donation, but by taking 60 seconds to fill out my team's brand-new Grassroots Campaign Strategy Survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535927/583390726/958535617?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk989-su-nd&refcode=jtk989-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcAfWR8NzaK1L8kDBQ6iBSjC6qTq4XTn-yu9sfy5JK0=&emci=526f35b5-b3c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=76e51763-dbc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [Begin Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535929/583390783/958535617?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk989-su-nd&refcode=jtk989-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcAfWR8NzaK1L8kDBQ6iBSjC6qTq4XTn-yu9sfy5JK0=&emci=526f35b5-b3c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=76e51763-dbc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)

While I wish I could sit down with each one of you and hear directly about what matters most to you, this is the next best thing. Your feedback will help me continue to fight for you in the most effective way possible: both as your next governor and in our nation’s capital.
So I need to have your hopes, dreams, kitchen-table issues, and the concerns that keep you up at night top of mind. Because, above all, Coloradans deserve a leader who listens to them and acts on the issues that actually affect their lives.
**I'm all ears now, friend – _[so please, will you add your voice to the conversation by taking the survey before it closes at 11:59 p.m.?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535931/583390785/958535617?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk989-su-nd&refcode=jtk989-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcAfWR8NzaK1L8kDBQ6iBSjC6qTq4XTn-yu9sfy5JK0=&emci=526f35b5-b3c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=76e51763-dbc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)_**

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
| | |
---
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
_Did anyone really think the guy who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to happily release the Epstein files?_
Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons.
We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people.
But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes.
You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed kids whose hardworking parents are struggling to fill the fridge.
I know it can feel like the Republic is falling apart. But what I need you to hear is that the only way out of this spiral is to win in the midterm elections.

That’s the whole ballgame.
_2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._
And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won.
I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
_There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority five years ago._
**[If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign and Jacky Rosen's today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535933/583391142/-2044089864?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8FNXEeZOmRKuzbktQFmExffYOXHWETZbNQmr_OEzVo=)**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119535934/583391143/-2044089864?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5639-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU1MTc2My1kYmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8FNXEeZOmRKuzbktQFmExffYOXHWETZbNQmr_OEzVo=)
---
Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.

And come next November, we will raise it higher.

In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you for your support.

\- Jon

name: John Fetterman
subject: fighting for the folks who make this country run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10435%2E434096%2EJ4wrw0)
| | |
---
Hey folks, it’s John.
The Union Way of Life is _sacred._ You don’t mess with it. You gotta fight for it. Always.
Whether it’s nurses walking the picket line or federal workers battling Trump’s attacks in court, union folks know I have their back. ✊
When Trump issued two executive orders that stripped collective bargaining rights from federal workers, I immediately introduced the Protect America's Workforce Act to repeal them. That was straight-up union busting, and with more than 60,000 federal workers in PA, I wasn't going to let that stand.
When the National Federation of Federal Employees union president called out Trump’s illegal firings of federal employees during the government shutdown, I stood with him and amplified his message. Because workers deserve someone in their corner.
But it’s not just Trump. Rich clowns and out-of-touch politicians are trying to gut benefits, bust unions, and silence workers. 😡
**Nah, dude. Not on my watch.**
**[This is serious, so I need to hear directly from yinz: What do YOU think we should we be doing to protect the Union Way of Life? I need 5,000 responses before the end of the day, so please take my survey now:](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10435%2E434096%2EJ4wrw0)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52334?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10435%2E434096%2EJ4wrw0)
---
This is about fair pay, safe working conditions, and dignity. It’s about protecting the folks who built this country and keep it running – and making damn sure they have a voice.
Thanks,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jt350-su-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10435_434096_J4wrw0&akid=10435%2E434096%2EJ4wrw0)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=10435%2E434096%2EJ4wrw0)

Peter,
No one enjoys talking about Ted Cruz like.......Ted Cruz.
Our state’s self-centered senator is reportedly eyeing a run for POTUS again [https://www.axios.com/local/dallas/2025/11/18/cruz-eyes-2028-run] , which would be a huge disservice and embarrassment to the millions of working Texans who’ve had enough of his MAGA cheerleading.
PITCH IN today if you’re tired of Ted Cruz and his constant caving to Trump! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=AgainTed&amount=15.00&refcode2=006497e2-dcc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c]

We can’t afford a Trump lackey elected president in 2028, Peter. Texans deserve a REAL fighter in their corner – not an out-of-touch politician turned podcaster.
It’s “leaders” like Cruz who continue to prioritize MAGA (and Cancun beaches) at the expense of Texas families.
DONATE TODAY to fuel TOP PAC’s voter engagement work and help us build a brighter future for our state! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=AgainTed&amount=15.00&refcode2=006497e2-dcc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c]
Your contribution, no matter the amount, inches us closer to a Texas where ALL can thrive – no matter our race, age, faith, income, or gender.
Thanks for all you do.
– Texas Organizing Project PAC

subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
Help me empower young people
The Atlas Society proudly stood by my side.
| | [ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6d8f7c3fe295415d9567567de0c65a89&_e=fPOzZ6uqOpW95TAHiEQCmL35b3xbQtRNFbas8rNB3JImi1vnfcFdO0fiFt09eVbq697SKH5Mim6m8UeherCvShranMKvU-xwlnNgLiBpvqXabK9rCgQInDLK5qHVT_SWPdQ59WWvE2JXNdNlnFzJPuC2aAH8Pi6XmO6ZtPgKpO-OP6fghEM9ZMY1t-lQ4yqmpnuFkBqvBMNga4pCqddwC9SdH_rZP0p9OHHdT7Kuua71_GXnrxgvU9GM9cwYXAP4wZECkug9E2XRw-us7OBgDBpAxLeYSsmw5Ii5qL-psgCkTiNrVTCvqpFpQlAFHBJ9cw08K6kEtH3mrDHw2ZPwOksmUy80Msz9j58Ui4uSa2w-IsnxFJ0LslqF3VoYfKxkiXUsi6rnZ94kQwswhg9gXOpquixXBYNQgVrBjQ936q9LRbuOY47v2HzPSfQZ-qGcrILLZ6B81DsPZY34XmAMVUgRQ4mSkNhSRdeeDLbFzgldt2AX1VXzoQ3UPGxScsoUReFW0Go4I_za5b9g7Yjv5IV-egGg_IRzagl_v6EH4iwloH5UL2hTslv4q1Wrk0p4whr44LiqJbCNAJAiOUf1YNe_EFfdD5MKbx8tTfGMxteiJbK-B-HNtkEUbl7-HjTu)
---
Patriot,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6d8f7c3fe295415d9567567de0c65a89&_e=fPOzZ6uqOpW95TAHiEQCmL35b3xbQtRNFbas8rNB3JImi1vnfcFdO0fiFt09eVbq697SKH5Mim6m8UeherCvShranMKvU-xwlnNgLiBpvqXabK9rCgQInDLK5qHVT_SWPdQ59WWvE2JXNdNlnFzJPuC2aAH8Pi6XmO6ZtPgKpO9oOMQmJobfg74AHT9p-8KrfAW-wJol2B1a2F4AXoXtymMjDh_tu3pPd-aJzDrT8wpMpfPcniqpAWA0DAEO6zsAMDnxYRCxNz275dE6pirbbxY3foCwAuuIEKMUuuanLFIWTcySCLBC8D-n9h3cR-NmxqnR476e_XeuDBNljSmq0vbKEG33ojgAeOcqvNcysTJwwp_jMwVuTIiajoyL0_w8868GtigQSjrFX8debNlbYIn5Q8bG-avwtCz8X3ySR6X2V5epaoBbWMWuSJSbi9TqZSSHS8Hy5jbCrcUPv1dYDtubr0-W1uJ5GyBbfgpdAlLghQkWPejUYrSw4udCC_d4eXh99DJicR2vq9ST-awWJUj5tR1bvnraXWLGfcMTSY6nnz_qcTdpHMpNd4Uog31bdc6EcfcUzREc4QfA-zvemxx1zwfcappdS0lqDCO46gIVCOF25MVblLX_YJCt0Frbo7uNRPT6I5UXEfABctQ8aQ%3D%3D)

---
[ Donate >> ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6d8f7c3fe295415d9567567de0c65a89&_e=fPOzZ6uqOpW95TAHiEQCmL35b3xbQtRNFbas8rNB3JImi1vnfcFdO0fiFt09eVbq697SKH5Mim6m8UeherCvShranMKvU-xwlnNgLiBpvqXabK9rCgQInDLK5qHVT_SWPdQ59WWvE2JXNdNlnFzJPuC2aAH8Pi6XmO6ZtPgKpO_EKXPFkEM1nw3p-sqSVSN8zrvL9Q6MaMgziuhCuIAqm24cBGrSd949daeE36Xgy7wSRlECL4KpFamYScrJpUXppAQI7aBW48_dA1XDkaxvFCE5RxB8KPdhtlpD0oKBMmHjNN-zPSvZoHs3xCOTczxULbvIvIyawX9rTnMmsLqDaadsJ58SC6Gi0QQczdtSdxs2jjUHXULQE9ekecyfpEoThTxv97D2fOoXfj22w608p8Y66BLaka1QWpH3mQdIIeH1HKP7oGLu9rKKuGGv0tYUepTn4zcZDdEUiMyqwyBCzRBLVUIofld6yhr_wJwOUfzLZ7PQs0XJpmaF9aG0HeF0PAVhTVVb-HhkJgKujhVhLRdc19lNgwCH8MC2VopPF1gBBeWvbznZOFT4AesDawL99FSkpyIjjBCPFGUdeS4XKYL7bA6G004uAroTZVot3CmVQ7V-BO-yki-r2YES3cBmHyOVqsZLcq-iFyNEu5ZQiQ%3D%3D)
---

Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."

---
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

clean_body: Help me empower young people The Atlas Society proudly stood by my side. | | Patriot, I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine. When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me. FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. Make no mistake: They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for. They failed. SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech. One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society. Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of The Fountainhead by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity. Which is why I am personally reaching out to you. I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country. I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before. So keep reading! My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

Peter,

**Durham has become the latest community to face the aggressive and unjust deployment of U.S. Border Patrol and ICE agents.** I am outraged that these operations are expanding in North Carolina. The aggressive raids happening in our state and in cities across the nation are shocking and unacceptable. Instead of protecting civil rights, **the Trump Administration has implemented policies that spread fear, strip away due process, and unfairly single out Black, Brown, and immigrant communities.** The use of unmarked cars, masked operatives, paramilitary-style tactics, and detentions without warrants represents a clear act of racial targeting and intimidation. This constitutes a serious misuse of authority, an infringement on civil liberties, and a threat to the principles of our democracy. I’m urging federal officials to put a stop to these tactics and launch thorough inquiries into every instance of racial discrimination and misconduct. **I stand in solidarity with immigrant communities and am committed to ensuring those responsible for these harmful and unjust practices are held fully accountable.** **[Will you join me, Peter? Add your name to stand with me and demand an end to this latest attack on our civil rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536321/583401149/1074968507?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_111825_ICE_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQyMmY0My1kZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v84q5GsGpRjTXNi8XMP-VSZTezl_jHCXjKYk0lWoSSM=&emci=0f422f43-dec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16422f43-dec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536322/583401153/1074968507?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_111825_ICE_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQyMmY0My1kZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v84q5GsGpRjTXNi8XMP-VSZTezl_jHCXjKYk0lWoSSM=&emci=0f422f43-dec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16422f43-dec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=799895)

Hi, Randy Villegas here. Yesterday, Senator Bernie Sanders endorsed our campaign for Congress in CA-22. I can’t tell you how much that means -- not just to me personally, but to the entire grassroots movement we’re building here in the Central Valley. Bernie has dedicated his life to fighting corporate greed and putting working people first. That’s exactly the kind of leadership I’m bringing to this campaign, and why I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. The people in our district deserve someone who answers to _them_ \- NOT special interests. **[I’m deeply honored by Bernie’s endorsement. If you missed his message, I’ve included it below. After you read it, I hope you’ll consider chipping in $27 to help us build the people-powered campaign it’ll take to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536411/583403924/-1934691120?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-2-b&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM3YjU2MDAtZGZjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ozBm1KhDYHjZweXu4zvRJzK04GmIXh35omWFo5o7vaY=)** | | [DONATE $27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536412/583403925/-1934691120?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-2-b&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM3YjU2MDAtZGZjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ozBm1KhDYHjZweXu4zvRJzK04GmIXh35omWFo5o7vaY=)

Subject: Why I’m backing Randy Villegas

Hi, it’s Senator Bernie Sanders.
I’m reaching out to let you know that I’ve endorsed Randy Villegas for Congress in California’s 22nd District, and to ask you to support his campaign with a **[donation of $27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536414/583403927/-1934691120?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-2-b&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM3YjU2MDAtZGZjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ozBm1KhDYHjZweXu4zvRJzK04GmIXh35omWFo5o7vaY=)** today.
Here’s why your support matters:
At a time when the billionaire class is raking in record profits while millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, we need working-class fighters in Congress who will take on the corporate greed that’s rigged our system.
**Randy Villegas is one of those fighters.**
I am proud to endorse Randy because we need more working-class people in Congress who are not beholden to the corporations and special interests that have rigged our political system in favor of the billionaire political class.
Randy is an educator and small business owner from a working class family who understands the struggles that so many millions of Americans are facing everyday.
He is rejecting corporate PAC money because he understands the outsized influence that big corporations have on our political process and that we need to return the power to the people.
Now he’s running in one of the most competitive races in the country against a Republican incumbent backed by those very same corporate interests and billionaire donors who’ve rigged the system for themselves.
If we want to flip this seat and send a working-class champion to Congress, we need to show that grassroots power can beat big money.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: The system is rigged — but you’re helping change it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Collective grassroots action gives young, working leaders the chance to serve their community.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251118-1&t=1&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)
Hi Peter.
One day, we _really_ hope emails like these won’t be necessary — not just for the sake of your inbox, but for our democracy.
That day comes when campaign finance reform _finally_ passes, and young, working-class leaders don’t have to fight uphill just to get on the ballot.
We’re not there yet. But with your support, we’re electing the leaders who can make it possible. **[If you’re ready to help build that future, please chip in whatever you can today.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251118_1_cfr.a-JjN-&refcode=em20251118-2850&amount=5&t=3&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)**
Running a competitive campaign today means hiring staff, running ads, field organizing, traveling, TV spots, and so much more. Candidates are expected to raise thousands and millions of dollars before a single vote is cast.
For teachers, nurses, farmers, service workers, and young people ready to serve their community? That price tag shuts them out.
For millionaires, corporate-backed insiders, and the well-connected? It’s _pocket change_ — and it’s how they keep control over the system.
It's why our government still looks nothing like the country it represents. Sure, it’s _technically_ getting better _(yay, the average Senate age went from 67 to 65!)._ But when half of Congress are millionaires, it’s obvious why the minimum wage is still stuck at $7.25 and why programs like Medicaid and SNAP are the first to get cut whenever corporations want another tax break.
If our leaders don’t know what it means to struggle — and their donors oppose even the simplest reforms — everyday people fall off the agenda. And so the cycle continues:
**→ Working people know what their communities need,**
**→ But they can’t afford to run,**
**→ So wealthy, out-of-touch politicians stay in power and pass policies to protect the 1% and hold working people back**
None of this is by accident, there's a reason why it costs so much to run. There's a reason in many states like Texas and New Hampshire legislators are paid FAR less than $10,000 annually. It’s not a flaw. The system was built this way, and it’s built so that the _only_ way working people can finally gain power is by abandoning their values and communities to please corporate PACs and extremely wealthy donors.
But here’s what the system never planned for: **Grassroots donors.**
Because when thousands of small donors chip in, they give our candidates and us something priceless: **_independence._**
At Leaders We Deserve, we call it **F-You Money.** Not yacht money, but the kind of money that lets young, working candidates break the rules of a rigged system, and answer _only_ to the people they serve.
It’s how an ER nurse and community organizer like Molly Cook won her race by _just 74 votes._ It’s how we build a pipeline of leaders who will _actually_ fight for their communities, and one day, will _finally_ fix our broken campaign finance system.
But until the day comes when public service doesn’t have a million-dollar price tag, we rely on people like you to chip in $5 or $10 when you can to give our candidates the F-You Money they need to break through and deliver real change so one day groups like Leaders We Deserve don’t need to exist anymore because we actually built a government by and for the people and not just those wealthy enough to get elected.
**[If you’re able to, please chip in today to level the playing field for young, working-class leaders.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251118_1_cfr.a-JjN-&refcode=em20251118-2850&amount=5&t=4&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251118_1_cfr.a-JjN-&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-2850&t=23&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)**
Thank you for everything you do. You truly power this movement.
— Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251118-1&t=24&refcode2=2850_587540_HpZrmC&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2850%2E587540%2EHpZrmC)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Patty Murray
subject: re: Epstein
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
They've got nothing to hide ... right?
| | |
---
Peter –
Either A:**President Trump, Attorney General Bondi, and FBI Director Patel are all in on the very same Epstein cover-up that MAGA campaigned so heavily on a year ago; **
Or B: **All three were and are LYING to the American people about who is _really_ in the Epstein files, and what they've done.**
Because first, the administration suddenly announced that they'd be closing their investigation on the files.
Then, they moved Epstein's henchwoman, Ghislaine Maxwell – a convicted pedophile, and child sex trafficker - from max security to a "Country Club" prison after she sat for a deposition crafted to clear Trump's name.
And now,
* 20,000 pages of newly released files from the Epstein estate prove Trump’s involvement by name;

* Trump was personally meeting with Republican members of Congress last week to persuade them to NOT sign the discharge petition;

* and at Trump’s command, the DOJ is investigating Democrats related to Epstein in what he is calling a “Democratic hoax.”

All I know, Peter, it was way past time for the House to take this vote after months of obstruction and pushback from this President. The House passed legislation to release the Epstein files, and Democrats secured unanimous consent to pass it in the Senate once we receive the bill.
But here’s the thing: Donald Trump could release the Epstein files at any time.
**[If you think there needs to be serious transparency, too, then before midnight, will you please be one of 10,000 supporters to sign my petition to the attorney general demanding she release the Epstein files in full?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536487/583409444/-276381256?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk533-su-nd&refcode=jtk533-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTU0ZjU0Ni1lMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZACVo40gtzdFM2GtVa1KSlHJjEcv59G0_6Z8KlV4Gy0=&emci=2d651826-20b4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d954f546-e0c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13116610)**
| | [TELL AG BONDI: Release the Epstein Files >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119536488/583409473/-276381256?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk533-su-nd&refcode=jtk533-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTU0ZjU0Ni1lMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZACVo40gtzdFM2GtVa1KSlHJjEcv59G0_6Z8KlV4Gy0=&emci=2d651826-20b4-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=d954f546-e0c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13116610)
---
For the record, I don't have any interest in feeding conspiracy theories. That's what Trump and his top surrogates did on the campaign trail–and now that they control DOJ, they’re saying it was all a hoax. After months of abusive, unchecked power grabs, there's literally nothing stopping them from fulfilling this core campaign promise.

clean_body: They've got nothing to hide ... right? | | | Peter – Either A:President Trump, Attorney General Bondi, and FBI Director Patel are all in on the very same Epstein cover-up that MAGA campaigned so heavily on a year ago; Or B: All three were and are LYING to the American people about who is really in the Epstein files, and what they've done. Because first, the administration suddenly announced that they'd be closing their investigation on the files. Then, they moved Epstein's henchwoman, Ghislaine Maxwell – a convicted pedophile, and child sex trafficker - from max security to a "Country Club" prison after she sat for a deposition crafted to clear Trump's name. And now, 20,000 pages of newly released files from the Epstein estate prove Trump’s involvement by name; Trump was personally meeting with Republican members of Congress last week to persuade them to NOT sign the discharge petition; and at Trump’s command, the DOJ is investigating Democrats related to Epstein in what he is calling a “Democratic hoax.” All I know, Peter, it was way past time for the House to take this vote after months of obstruction and pushback from this President. The House passed legislation to release the Epstein files, and Democrats secured unanimous consent to pass it in the Senate once we receive the bill. But here’s the thing: Donald Trump could release the Epstein files at any time. ** | | For the record, I don't have any interest in feeding conspiracy theories. That's what Trump and his top surrogates did on the campaign trail–and now that they control DOJ, they’re saying it was all a hoax. After months of abusive, unchecked power grabs, there's literally nothing stopping them from fulfilling this core campaign promise. Thank you for your attention to this highly sensitive matter, and for all you do. Patty | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Same as it ever was
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, eight corporate Senate Democrats caved and voted with
Republicans, letting them increase health care costs for millions of
working-class Americans to pay for Trump’s billionaire tax cuts.

These six cowardly Democrats in the House joined them — even though
Republicans did not need their votes:

* Jared Golden (Maine)
* Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (Washington)
* Adam Gray (California)
* Henry Cuellar (Texas)
* Tom Suozzi (New York)
* Don Davis (North Carolina)

6 out of 6 of these Democrats are endorsed by AIPAC.
5 out of 6 are members of the right-wing Problem Solvers Caucus.
5 out of 6 are corporate Blue Dogs.
And 5 out of 6 are part of the centrist New Democrat Coalition

Same as it ever was.

Time after time, the corporate-backed, centrist establishment gives up its
leverage and throws working people under the bus, making life for everyday
people worse instead of better, all under the guise of ‘bipartisanship.’

We need more working-class Democrats with the guts to fight Trump and MAGA
Republicans with everything they’ve got, instead of these cowards who roll
over at the first opportunity.

Justice Democrats has already endorsed four working-class progressives to
challenge Do-Nothing Democrats in next year’s primary elections.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140972?c0=jd-em-20251118.GArx2R&refcode=em20251118-37204&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37204%2E1203867%2ESDlnCZ ]If we’re going to endorse even more candidates, ensure they win, and
build our block in Congress, we need you in our corner NOW. Pitch in just

name: The Democrats
subject: We’ve got a couple of options:
body:
---
Derek, The 2025 elections showed that when Democrats roll up our sleeves, do the work, and invest everywhere we can, _we can win big_. Now, it’s up to us to carry that momentum into the midterms. But we can only do that with your help. **That’s why we’ve set an ambitious fundraising goal this month. With just a few weeks left, we’ve got a couple of options to reach it:
* **We need more folks to chip in ahead of the deadline, OR**
* **We need folks who donate to give just a little bit more than normal.**

Most first-time donors give $3 or $7. But if you would consider making your first donation $15 instead, you’ll help us meet this goal at a moment when we could use your help most. body:
Knocking out this leg of the Voting Rights Act -- by weakening Section 2 -- would almost certainly reconstitute state legislatures, city councils, judicial districts, and every other type of political boundary in which racial minorities could be cut off from having a voice in their government.
This kind of change would silence untold numbers of voters and spiral our fight for voting rights back sixty years. RUSH $25 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111825_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Mother Jones: Republican Justices Appear Poised to Destroy What’s Left of the Voting Rights Act [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111825_2&amount=25]
We'll hand this straight to Mother Jones, Team: " The Supreme Court, with its six-to-three Republican-appointed majority, appears ready to kneecap what remains of the Voting Rights Act’s protections for minority political representation. "
The descriptive language seems harsh, but the objective of these justices seems clear -- a complete dismantling of our seminal civil rights law . We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
During this week’s oral argument in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Fuel our work with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111825_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_2&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_2&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111825_2&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
“ Race is a part of redistricting always ,” Justice Sonia Sotomayor said, addressing the solicitor general from Louisiana, who was arguing against an existing map that had enabled the election of two Black members of Congress in his state. “ What you’re saying to us [is]...‘You can use [race] to help yourself achieve goals that reduce particular groups’ electoral participation, but you can’t use it to remedy that situation .’”
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=111825_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111825_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111825_2&amount=20]

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: There’s a target on my back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
GOP donors are spending big on my opponents’ campaigns
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1014%2E181023%2ElQX4yM)
Team,
We keep hearing the same thing: **I’m leading every poll** in both the Democratic primary and the general election for Michigan governor.
This is great news, and it proves that Michiganders of all backgrounds — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents — simply want a leader who will make government work better for them. That is exactly what I’ve done throughout my career, and I’m ready to be that leader for all Michiganders.
**But being the front-runner means we are a target.** In a swing state like Michigan, well-funded outside groups and wealthy donors who want to buy influence will pour millions into negative attacks to try to drag this race off course. They’ve already started cutting my opponents big checks — with more on the way.
**That’s why we have to be ready.**
Polls show our message resonates. But polls don’t win elections — people do. And that’s why I’m counting on you:
**[Will you help us prepare for the attacks ahead and grow our momentum by pitching in $10 to my campaign? Together, we can bring our vision for a brighter future for all Michiganders to the governor’s mansion.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q42025.Xe0G0T&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251118_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1014%2E181023%2ElQX4yM)**

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: 🏁❤️‍🔥 TONIGHT: Drag icon Geneva Karr steps into our kitchen
body:
You know what they say: “¡donde come uno, comen todos!” | | | Hey Peter, You know what they say: “¡donde come uno, comen _todos_!” (Where one eats, _all_ can eat). No one lives by this saying more than our immigrant families, who are always ready to save a seat at the table for any neighbor, friend in need, or unexpected visitor. For us, food is more than just sustenance — it’s one of the many ways we show we care. ******[In tonight’s _Just Flavors!_ episode, our home cooks tap into this spirit of solidarity, showcasing the recipes they’ve cooked in mutual aid efforts for their communities.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvDtaX4K2dfLAYhDt3IcXgz_YUIQm9KPMR3rPk8uLkHfeyoFCdojTevx_HfNzVUTCAgySrEd6g5Wcngrn0cKqBZOkE3QYa-mAX3ep9fw2vrvnyW4k7cAU0jdSlRP-Mh2ZyL5USVay60nfH49IUVmuoRopNBWSNlmf7O_Lmvu94Ctl2AlXJtzOG6gTk2bwWKuGDMPtfpa3gv8I_w5weL6viQFOWoEypBKJc6O3ZMKs0aGRaBSlJtO5avJkkiIJKqD4gLRDa2JkNLdILuJ8Sa0alqWQEIFtbdgUNScPDTyv-sJ8E7BAqWHqJ0ssLbBro1GphY/4lq/u3U9tnabQaib_D7ZF9NN0g/h0/h001.oD42MN3xhS7DqYivru7MiIZyYzswPo9eQOu1gnwa7eM) ******🧡 Get ready for recipes that will take you back to your school’s annual fundraising sale or your neighborhood's holiday potluck: gorditas de puerco & panes con pollo. To judge this incredible display of community, we’ve invited a very special guest judge! **Straight from RuPaul’s werk room, La Diva Más Latina Geneva Karr steps into the**** _Just Flavors!_****kitchen to taste these recipes.** On _Drag Race_ Season 16, she made history as the first Mexican-born queen to compete on the show, and now, she’s ready to make her _Just Flavors!_ debut. 👉 Which recipe would you choose? Let us know in the comments of our latest episode today: **[Watch Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvDtaX4K2dfLAYhDt3IcXgz_tC09e0ecSmPmSqECDOldqP1wk204MuguuaVJPx1hUrxFteQ7-cGDTKz3C-9HiD8pBqChdGnsYbBsT85HoMxKRYbMJ2OKVzIfKGWGA3OLCVyKLEUi2xVc9r_fqpefQ8Ix5saYjDoUMRoGGXDBNYDmEaTXP8xm9UaTLLImqMXuzpSwlJ39oKb0c4dBCKS1GUXxEczp-DEfTsksgtPNPpbbqQa5kOlrU-IAIF1OtiT9jcjKMe-yKds_NXFdOi_-px1rPq21HxkCDhe7vh0FWO1TO_uAwc2Vtwgb1i7Jd6l5d3A/4lq/u3U9tnabQaib_D7ZF9NN0g/h1/h001.p6tMJEjTj5Aa5Sr-vFcvFrAnjm_GnrCkVP_GDzL4M1E)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvDtaX4K2dfLAYhDt3IcXgz_faaAwgRL8MwzgseSgNC9ErTaiYVtD4ZuJafPx7OSztPnI400qjmcleY96DIibGT80Dp08w7djateVNOFx4OjYOI661iKXwsHAWU6xxzCJeOWqUEDbwbiriP5HvmJ9uxNH4OnyVtr24VftgmoeplouIFz7jFo89H_kHNTTbqHq_iGnL6Tvvzwu9G_WNJvDxmmiQFt7ZpfMQtXlWoTUo7a4S0uymJLK_mGTkqhvNu_q-TZKA3ihvMSiJ9Au0Y9KgETnqAKX26W9_jOi8MZIcMI2vtnoW9mhF0dYI5K76ACu8A/4lq/u3U9tnabQaib_D7ZF9NN0g/h2/h001.fncwz2kiJsV9PKW6qTQk2FQ7zCJKFAKeSHLGZvY8tWs)
Peter, we’re heading towards the _Just Flavors!_ season finale next week! You still have time to catch up on the latest episodes of the _only_ cooking competition show made by immigrants, for immigrants. Every Tuesday, immigrant home cooks from across the country come together to showcase the stories behind their most treasured family recipes. On the menu tonight are the recipes our contestants have cooked for their communities in the past! 🧑🍳 **Stream our new episode tonight on YouTube, and invite your loved ones to watch along:** **[Watch Now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvDtaX4K2dfLAYhDt3IcXgz_bbZ4Bm2hfbql-47lar35Pmymy99675cnph9SOaeJEzAHiegXy-l80Z8OIPEXnzSdT6QGoxyUoFgV4TIzbxElOhvAzneMfvbfdTNHiW4yzN9MYVSf6da2igHErM5URe-WKni-BOKvitosxfdENpgYbAOlFHVU_5bXG8vOJsEDfcs4e96QBFIc2Xn4F4uL2WeRHsF7SFEItYrtv_F2cTtc48T9Xdow_H2MjwN4lOlG7KMiTeYgpv5q2WtyODlNhvl0DEfbkLwOUSwnpt2OBRwcaJ2_ZrYr4eVlLTqDDO4KGMM/4lq/u3U9tnabQaib_D7ZF9NN0g/h3/h001.eYWyHyN0MAz0HLDW7dxsbzi7uPdqTNnA-AkqpNjMdzk)** **[Share on Facebook](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8GM7gt5oGQ3dWJzdEHt1kZLSFbG5Bj0ZfCOY6qXeyweaTxw6CZoxzWf1lR5cws6npLYUnMsdDVVq00d_rnIIe4r6RbtpewP0vxMfvY3Ry71_opD7Qzkku3pY5D1F7Bj3WREaJBHV_0uRcUoibGzBac4xH8x4asLRjfTW8XZgOxMYJRdjA8XOuhFgjyBU4XlTLJMKJ0uGDVOWFgGh9YZpptNFOXIrei3OohYEAkULyfhT0fMO6m0H_cxk6TgrkgZ23cJ4AYdpA_cC0heTP0-ZbEKPk4gjoBK6YbIRJwE8RWhU0aqcF-W-hGZ2BJx17UsT07kNaRsW3ix5JrPvEcG5Q4X2igUP5F_4c3plizrKfq6_3WhBWKO8yQbKtgwq-cHrwg/4lq/u3U9tnabQaib_D7ZF9NN0g/h4/h001.4CyQghakLMes9Nbw-GtkHTI9N1FiKp2qo_LCErYKL2U)** In community, Matias and the United We Dream team

clean_body: You know what they say: “¡donde come uno, comen todos!” | | | Hey Peter, You know what they say: “¡donde come uno, comen todos!” (Where one eats, all can eat). No one lives by this saying more than our immigrant families, who are always ready to save a seat at the table for any neighbor, friend in need, or unexpected visitor. For us, food is more than just sustenance — it’s one of the many ways we show we care. **** **🧡 Get ready for recipes that will take you back to your school’s annual fundraising sale or your neighborhood's holiday potluck: gorditas de puerco & panes con pollo. To judge this incredible display of community, we’ve invited a very special guest judge! Straight from RuPaul’s werk room, La Diva Más Latina Geneva Karr steps into the** Just Flavors!kitchen to taste these recipes. On Drag Race Season 16, she made history as the first Mexican-born queen to compete on the show, and now, she’s ready to make her Just Flavors! debut. 👉 Which recipe would you choose? Let us know in the comments of our latest episode today: Peter, we’re heading towards the Just Flavors! season finale next week! You still have time to catch up on the latest episodes of the only cooking competition show made by immigrants, for immigrants. Every Tuesday, immigrant home cooks from across the country come together to showcase the stories behind their most treasured family recipes. On the menu tonight are the recipes our contestants have cooked for their communities in the past! 🧑🍳 Stream our new episode tonight on YouTube, and invite your loved ones to watch along: In community, Matias and the United We Dream team | Follow us on: | | | | |

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE) [**Ahead of President Joe Biden’s Birthday, we’re inviting Democrats across the country to participate in our Joe Biden Legacy Survey, reflecting on his achievements, leadership, and impact on the nation!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=3&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=4&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE) [ **Team: Please begin your Joe Biden Legacy survey now to represent Democrats in your city →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=5&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE) | [BEGIN MY JOE BIDEN LEGACY SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=6&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE)
---
[ ****1,099 more local responses needed before 11:59 PM to validate our Democratic data ****](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=7&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE)
Team, President Joe Biden showed us what a TRUE leader looks like.

Remember, during his time as President, Joe Biden:

\- **ADVANCED** voting rights legislation,
\- **NOMINATED** the first Black woman to the Supreme Court,
\- **HELPED** our country recover and rebuild after the COVID-19 pandemic and
\- **WORKED** to restore stability and integrity to the White House.

_And that’s just to name a few of his accomplishments!!_

As we honor his legacy ahead of his birthday, we’re gathering nationwide feedback on how Americans view the progress made during his administration.

Please – your input will help us understand how Democrats in your city feel about President Joe Biden’s accomplishments and legacy.
[ **Please, begin your President Joe Biden Legacy Survey to represent Top Democrats in your city! Your response is absolutely crucial to validating our local data → →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=8&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE)
[BEGIN MY JOE BIDEN LEGACY SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70084?t=9&akid=23637%2E4449941%2EtIl-hE)
---
Thank you,

Fight For Reform
