name: April Christenson
subject: Peter, do you support OLCV, like Pete?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4PuXmTTiOAENcG3vNbSMEIGIn2j25mvqVmtd7aKGAYUhicXujshC4Qmb3M93HOQ48LgARS7GRXPMRV7tfZcOt2ytub1fKUvpxt/lHaRS5/8Ybkw5X4xJTYaZdBAxlXO7 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4PuXmTTiOAENcG3vNbSMEIGIn2j25mvqVmtd7aKGAYUhicXujshC4Qmb3M93HOQ48LgARS7GRXPMRV7tfZcOt2ytub1fKUvpxt/lHaRS5/8Ybkw5X4xJTYaZdBAxlXO7]
Hi Peter,
This year is almost over, and recently I’ve been taking the time to look back at all that OLCV has accomplished. Although we’ve had an uphill battle with the Trump Administration ever since he took office, there is one thing that gives me comfort and hope: our dedicated OLCV members . None of our work is possible without our members like you, Peter. We can’t do it without you, so our important work begins with your generous gift of $50. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=4PuXmTTiOAENcG3vNbSMEIGIn2j25mvqVmtd7aKGAYUhicXujshC4Qmb3M93HOQ48LgARS7GRXPMRV7tfZcOt2ytub1fKUvpxt/lHaRS5/8Ybkw5X4xJTYaZdBAxlXO7]
To show how important our members are to our work, I’d like to share this donor’s story with you. Meet Pete Sandrock. Pete has been a member of OLCV for a long time. He lives in Portland, Oregon. This is Pete’s story:
"I care deeply about Oregon, its people, and its natural environment. I was born here, the great grandson of Sherman County homesteaders. My mother taught me to love and protect nature. I still have the bird book she gave me in 1955. For high school graduation, she gave me Rachel Carson’s Silent Spring. Mom and dad were active New Deal Democrats. I remember meeting Edith Green when my parents hosted a campaign coffee for her in our Rose City Park neighborhood home. As a 13-year-old I knocked on doors, collecting one dollar donations for JFK, later meeting him at [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/474C684466775A64434166713668646D39324B525A6F6C715962353265346C4F5377714E4D69503138504D79506A6B446F455746357733306D61686558443951/editor_images/Council%20Crest%20Streetcar%202-22-1950%20copy.jpg]
Cleveland High School (I just wish I knew what I did with his autograph!). In 1964 I joined some of my Jesuit High School classmates to picket George Wallace at the old Portland airport. My sign read, “If Hell is Free, Why Can’t Alabama Be?” JFK’s famous admonition, “ask not what your country can do for you – ask what you can do for your country,” led me to 44 years of government service, from the Navy to elected office to appointed management positions.
The sum of those experiences: love of place, love of nature, and appreciation for effective government brought me to OLCV 25 years ago. OLCV shares my values and puts them into effective political action. OLCV has earned my respect and financial support."
The work that we do every day matters. For over 50 years we have been a catalyst of holding our state elected officials accountable for how they voted on climate, providing easily accessible resources to assist voters in making informed decisions, and advocating for monumental climate legislation.
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=4PuXmTTiOAENcG3vNbSMEIGIn2j25mvqVmtd7aKGAYUhicXujshC4Qmb3M93HOQ48LgARS7GRXPMRV7tfZcOt2ytub1fKUvpxt/lHaRS5/8Ybkw5X4xJTYaZdBAxlXO7]
As long as we have the support of our members, there is nothing we can’t achieve in the new year. Will you join Pete and I in the new year?
Please give a generous gift of $50 now so OLCV can continue to march on in this fight in 2026. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Thanks for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, This year is almost over, and recently I’ve been taking the time to look back at all that OLCV has accomplished. Although we’ve had an uphill battle with the Trump Administration ever since he took office, there is one thing that gives me comfort and hope: our dedicated OLCV members . None of our work is possible without our members like you, Peter. We can’t do it without you, so our important work begins with your generous gift of $50. [] Give now [] To show how important our members are to our work, I’d like to share this donor’s story with you. Meet Pete Sandrock. Pete has been a member of OLCV for a long time. He lives in Portland, Oregon. This is Pete’s story: "I care deeply about Oregon, its people, and its natural environment. I was born here, the great grandson of Sherman County homesteaders. My mother taught me to love and protect nature. I still have the bird book she gave me in 1955. For high school graduation, she gave me Rachel Carson’s Silent Spring. Mom and dad were active New Deal Democrats. I remember meeting Edith Green when my parents hosted a campaign coffee for her in our Rose City Park neighborhood home. As a 13-year-old I knocked on doors, collecting one dollar donations for JFK, later meeting him at [] Cleveland High School (I just wish I knew what I did with his autograph!). In 1964 I joined some of my Jesuit High School classmates to picket George Wallace at the old Portland airport. My sign read, “If Hell is Free, Why Can’t Alabama Be?” JFK’s famous admonition, “ask not what your country can do for you – ask what you can do for your country,” led me to 44 years of government service, from the Navy to elected office to appointed management positions. The sum of those experiences: love of place, love of nature, and appreciation for effective government brought me to OLCV 25 years ago. OLCV shares my values and puts them into effective political action. OLCV has earned my respect and financial support." The work that we do every day matters. For over 50 years we have been a catalyst of holding our state elected officials accountable for how they voted on climate, providing easily accessible resources to assist voters in making informed decisions, and advocating for monumental climate legislation. Give now [] As long as we have the support of our members, there is nothing we can’t achieve in the new year. Will you join Pete and I in the new year? Please give a generous gift of $50 now so OLCV can continue to march on in this fight in 2026. [] Thanks for your support, [] April Christenson (she/her) OLCV Development Director P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. name: Kathy Hochul
subject: Let’s reject Trump’s favorite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96673?t=6&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun) Team, it’s Kathy Hochul — and I’m running for Governor to defend New York from Donald Trump, Elise Stefanik, and their extremist agenda. [I’ll explain more in a minute, but if you’re short on time, will you split a $10 donation between myself and the Voter Protection Project before you go to help stop Trump and Stefanik from flipping New York red? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96673?t=7&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)

Friend, let me tell you a bit about my new opponent for Governor, Elise Stefanik:

**1.** She boasts about being Trump’s **“top ally”** in D.C.

**2.** She’s repeatedly voted to cut **billions of dollars** from Medicare.

**3.** She brags about being the **deciding vote** for Trump’s cruel budget bill that strips healthcare from **1.5 million New Yorkers.**

Unlike Stefanik, I stand up to Trump. No one — no matter how powerful — will stop me from fighting for every single New Yorker.

[But I’ll be blunt: Special interest donors have already rushed Stefanik $12 million to take me down — and if I can’t fight back, we’ll risk New York flipping red. Which is why I have to ask: Will you step up and split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before it’s too late? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96673?t=8&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)

As Governor, I’ve stood up to Trump at every turn:

→ I took him to court over his illegal tariffs — and won twice.

→ I restored $35 million in Planned Parenthood funding after his devastating cuts.

→ I reversed $187 million in counterterrorism cuts.

**Trump and his Republican megadonors have already rushed millions to Stefanik to take over New York, and it’ll take a surge of grassroots support to stop them.**

[So I’m asking one more time: Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me defeat Elise Stefanik, and keep Trump’s extreme agenda out of New York for good? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96673?t=9&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96674?t=10&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96675?t=11&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96676?t=12&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96677?t=13&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96673?t=14&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
Thank you,

Kathy
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21856%2E878179%2Ek43Gun)

name: Team MGP
subject: Marie needs to hear from you
body:
| | Peter,

Now that the government shutdown has finally ended, Congress needs to get back to work and deliver solutions that lower costs for families and tackle the everyday expenses that are squeezing people dry.

Marie has been hearing the same thing everywhere she goes across the district: grocery prices are up, utility bills are up, health insurance premiums are climbing, and childcare is so expensive that many parents feel like they’re working just to pay the daycare bill.

Families and small businesses are doing everything they can to make ends meet, but the deck isn’t stacked in their favor.

[Marie needs to hear directly from you about what’s hitting your household the hardest so she can keep pushing for the practical, bipartisan solutions that reflect real life, not partisan talking points. Will you take a minute to fill out our quick survey? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119537756/583433227/979407147?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_90DO_251118_1_1&refcode2=578210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzgyMTBhNS1lOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLHitfG_JZZaJ6zPlUsdPrtlCRfDXbKAqc00QwPc2bI=&emci=548210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=578210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)
| **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119537757/583433228/979407147?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_90DO_251118_1_1&refcode2=578210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzgyMTBhNS1lOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KLHitfG_JZZaJ6zPlUsdPrtlCRfDXbKAqc00QwPc2bI=&emci=548210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=578210a5-e9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)**
---

Your feedback at this moment is critical, Peter. It helps guide Marie’s work to lower everyday costs, expand access to affordable healthcare, and make life a little easier for families who’ve been carrying more than their fair share.

Thanks for taking the time to weigh in.

– Team MGP

subject: sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
please read this message from former President Obama to Democratic supporters like you
#
**Former President Obama is sounding the alarm for Democratic supporters like YOU, Peter:**
_"What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren."_
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97747?refcode=em20251118-9730&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9730%2E614464%2ED2UGY_)**
**If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us.**
Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like you, Peter.
**That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today.** But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors.
**We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can.[So please, if you’re able to today, chip in $5 or more to support our work to elect Democrats in all 50 states »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97747?refcode=em20251118-9730&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9730%2E614464%2ED2UGY_)**

clean_body: please read this message from former President Obama to Democratic supporters like you Former President Obama is sounding the alarm for Democratic supporters like YOU, Peter: "What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren." If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like you, Peter. That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today. But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors. We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: Why the f*ck did a Republican bring me holy water?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/FQVC0v7KMKh4)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/kR0vVTpvXKff)
---
Friend – being a congressional candidate brings a lot of... unique?... experiences. **Including on Sunday, when a Republican candidate, desperate for attention, brought me a "gift bag" of things I'll need in prison, like cat food, "holy water", and Trump-branded perfume.** I mean, at least they got their attention from the only voice that matters in MAGA politics: Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/baVaVzxBP1OC)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/lb6n2TUHxfni)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/pIsZ0n0Fgrs7)
---

[**Weird stuff like this keeps happening to me because the far right isn't scared of my establishment opponents. They're going after the frontrunner, and they're terrified of a real grassroots progressive. Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. **[If you want to take 5 seconds helping us (for free), please click this link to our website after reading every email to help increase our "clickers".](https://ka4il.us/l/vikL12PKnTDA) **

| **_Democratic leaders are abandoning us._** Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. **Let's win this together.** **[Chip in!](https://ka4il.us/l/INdZryrGNygB)**

name: Haley S.
subject: This will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
| Hi, null! It's Haley.
---
I wanted to personally reach out because I noticed you haven't had the chance to fill out my priorities survey.
Would you do me a huge favor and take 60 seconds to fill it out now? The tech team did some wizardry and made you a personalized link: **[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-On-The-Road-Priorities-Survey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8068?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)**
Listening to regular folks is one of the most important – and fun! – parts of this campaign, so I'd love to hear from you.
Thanks so much, null.
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I want to hear from you
| | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8069?t=3&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8068?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my November Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8068?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8068?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 95 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8068?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8070?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8069?t=9&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1304%2E49239%2EEhL0fI)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

| You mean a lot to me. It’s true. Every success that the California Democratic Party has had over the last couple of years is because of YOU and YOUR support. **[That’s why I want to hear from you about our 2026 strategy and path forward. What issues mean the most to you? What messages do you think are most important? I want to hear your feedback, so I’ve set up a form at the link here where you can share your thoughts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119538041/583434525/-1865136429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDcxYzZkMS1mNGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMT07Y3JDUl2yh4jCrO4bJAJN_wgmtNVH3ecmDVS8yY=&emci=89101514-efc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bd71c6d1-f4c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=560478)** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119538042/583434526/-1865136429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDcxYzZkMS1mNGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMT07Y3JDUl2yh4jCrO4bJAJN_wgmtNVH3ecmDVS8yY=&emci=89101514-efc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bd71c6d1-f4c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=560478) Here are just a few recent wins we’ve made possible with your support: 🔹 Preventing a California red wave in 2022; 🔹 Flipping three House seats from red to blue in California in 2024 – even when Trump won the Presidency; 🔹 Passing Proposition 50 and stopping Donald Trump’s election-rigging scheme. These are significant wins that our California Strong movement accomplished thanks to your advocacy, volunteering, voting, and yes, donations. And while grassroots donations are a huge part of why we are able to do the work we do, I’m not asking for a contribution today. Here are just a few recent wins we’ve made possible with your support: 🔹 Preventing a California red wave in 2022; 🔹 Flipping three House seats from red to blue in California in 2024 – even when Trump won the Presidency; 🔹 Passing Proposition 50 and stopping Donald Trump’s election-rigging scheme. These are significant wins that our California Strong movement accomplished thanks to your advocacy, volunteering, voting, and yes, donations. And while grassroots donations are a huge part of why we are able to do the work we do, I’m not asking for a contribution today. I’m asking for your thoughts. In a 2-1 vote, the panel ordered Texas Republicans to use the congressional lines they had

# **[14-year-old 'angel' reportedly found dead in RV; alleged relative with criminal past charged with her murder, sexual assault](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A missing 14-year-old girl was found dead reportedly inside an RV behind her home, and an alleged family member with a history of violent crime has been accused of sexually assaulting and murdering the young girl described as an "angel." Citing Illinois State Police, KSDK-TV reported that Kylie Toberman was reported missing around 6:30 a.m. Friday. Police said the teen girl was found later that afternoon.

name: Team Trisha
subject: Blood in the water
body:
Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kz23osEBQVz9T48Ev2X-EbFadsOC7rhi72e4LakZhINCFkkCckOrOFLmIU4aKpu8fTq-0xGMvRqLdH-aq2HaXWKNyutrazsrPt6ZXmeT8nAf3m-i2PMptmXH1A1G8GwAZEaxBWehOBKuOKp1jNvXjXIpN54hhQrEMvsgWHjAmDSOi_MMZnRZEQrcjAiIckUryzdiTLP-EyHfxSvcKPOdopVAoamdI7kpyDKu-CMg7xc=&c=DqB4kQM68fG_OZfWMdoIRLb89pwFJVeCVRd6W3_5oO45E5RVotHXuA==&ch=jWuxCCc7aNMRk_BZVCqj8MtUlGsMtskaryFxUGP1OCOcvFjmm63VwQ==)
---
---
| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kz23osEBQVz9T48Ev2X-EbFadsOC7rhi72e4LakZhINCFkkCckOrOFLmIU4aKpu8fTq-0xGMvRqLdH-aq2HaXWKNyutrazsrPt6ZXmeT8nAf3m-i2PMptmXH1A1G8GwAZEaxBWehOBKuOKp1jNvXjXIpN54hhQrEMvsgWHjAmDSOi_MMZnRZEQrcjAiIckUryzdiTLP-EyHfxSvcKPOdoiQLI4T0QRzkMI86Fz20Oos=&c=DqB4kQM68fG_OZfWMdoIRLb89pwFJVeCVRd6W3_5oO45E5RVotHXuA==&ch=jWuxCCc7aNMRk_BZVCqj8MtUlGsMtskaryFxUGP1OCOcvFjmm63VwQ==)

Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points.
This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026.
There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert.

---
| Peter,
To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement.
After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026.
In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature.
Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote.

clean_body: Our shocking victory in Boebert’s most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert. | | | | | == | Peter, To say that Lauren Boebert is vulnerable in the upcoming 2026 midterms is an understatement. After reading this we hope you will understand why we so wholeheartedly believe that Trisha Cavarese can beat Boebert in 2026. In June 2025, MAGA launched a lightning push to pass a "home rule" ballot initiative in Douglas County, the most populous county in Lauren Boebert's congressional district. Home rule would have allowed this red county to create its own constitution and in a sense secede from the state putting the county at odds with the Governor and legislature. Against all odds, Democrats managed the effort to stop home rule in Douglas County and together we defeated the initiative with a landslide 70% of the vote. | == Our shocking victory in Boebert's most important county, showed that Democrats, independents, and Republicans alike are fed up with MAGA and Boebert. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert, our campaign had the best performance any Democrat has had in this district ever and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. This combined with the deep unpopularity of the GOP and Trump, the fact that Boebert is seen as a carpetbagger (she moved hundreds of miles to CD4 after it became clear she would lose in CD3), and the Boebert campaign reporting their lowest ever fundraising this year, means that she is critically vulnerable for 2026. There is blood in the water and everyone will soon know that Boebert is a paper tiger. She can be beaten this election. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you for being a part of this team. Trisha Calvarese | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

subject: Stomping on the gas

No brakes. No billionaires. Just a people-powered movement charging forward.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zq5d7Qg5n72vsqxU6X7LVKiZucOLhMy-u7m9szxdCwOUsbbpclsVVUxvrNk7135ALb1zU83oVvgKpW6vU7YOB4MpYMIzNOPWnljptrIy1bZ6wDI-mV3MylsgkzeHymZdbApvrqzrhplzW_vlZ_b9dPe1CEtQe4Tqu1ep5aBoGo8V72UQ_4jL9N1Kw3PDuQbKCnkcZFsEwkD07WKlH54ij-qkFNYgy20h&c=JleWOooQHA2YA66m54CAv8bv2VWTbLKZ-5JWkc2yE9F8QlNl_5pw3w==&ch=v73UKKKjCqCGg49lKn6esyDnqnJlbQiQnFm733WiWRUf39Oxou4NFg==)
---
|
Peter,
Hi, it's Luke Oberholtzer, Field Director for Bushra Amiwala's campaign for U.S. Congress. Earlier this month, we wrapped up our petition drive to get Bushra on the ballot for the March primary--and thanks to supporters like you, Bushra's name is officially on the ballot.
But what comes next? We're stomping on the gas.
Now we're shifting into high gear -- knocking doors, launching digital ads, restocking the office, and fueling up for a marathon of debates and meet-and-greets across IL-09.
Bushra's already participated in over 190 meet and greets--at high schools, colleges, coffee shops, retirement homes, and even people's garages--and we're planning more than triple that between now and Election Day. That's what grassroot campaigns look like: all gas, no brakes.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zq5d7Qg5n72vsqxU6X7LVKiZucOLhMy-u7m9szxdCwOUsbbpclsVVUxvrNk7135ALb1zU83oVvgKpW6vU7YOB4MpYMIzNOPWnljptrIy1bZ6wDI-mV3MylsgkzeHymZdbApvrqzrhplzW_vlZ_b9dPe1CEtQe4Tqu1ep5aBoGo8V72UQ_4jL9N1Kw3PDuQbKCnkcZFsEwkABeR-M_jFjTBRPGlkzMmae&c=JleWOooQHA2YA66m54CAv8bv2VWTbLKZ-5JWkc2yE9F8QlNl_5pw3w==&ch=v73UKKKjCqCGg49lKn6esyDnqnJlbQiQnFm733WiWRUf39Oxou4NFg==)
---
|

name: Troy Downing
subject: Hey you! (yes, YOU, Peter).
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._J6AhTvAvFJQ)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eleven-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)–Troy| |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
Troy Downing For Congress

Billings, MT 59104
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning._5hQ)
To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here](https://trk.emails.troydowning._-s7P1OPg5NOFjsBY48Q)

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: We won but now we’re broke
body:
You stood with us to win this crucial court for democracy, justice, and fairness. We need you now and are asking for your support after our incredible victory.
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.

| It's not bragging; it's a fact: We won big. All three Democratic justices on the PA Supreme Court won retention with over 61% of the vote:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_SlYjyDSD-_fSTOdwTKwEkvV-BYepWFmjScxuaRKzbrr5ryUaQKdKAJh3yN3TaAeOH-NBmOj_LyVVIB1uZIe3fj0pK1iZIigkVsFroE5bv6df_G-3qia8Jmx8iBDQK5eOSmApWz50HR0Ahjnf8Mg8YqRzSZ2CZHqrnsxGRxoTjNkTA9uJdSY12eLfaLRWjBaEIqQeHcQW0KI3jUzjezE6KU5VHxewfb&c=u9BOlU0MV6TSX5pdF1z6Zn3MY_bdcT4910m6RThqTYPfuSsKv6kkFg==&ch=ZEZd-TPnFwOOARR5cyEIejUdAWrXjlIC-24_ULdibtUtUw1v_qYrjg==)
---
Make no mistake: YOU made this happen. We should feel great about what we did together.
Defend Our Courts assembled a nationwide coalition to protect the highest court in the most important swing state from MAGA's plot to keep Trump in power past 2028.
As if to acknowledge the truth of our message about the stakes in the race, Trump just issued pardons to Rudy Giuliani and 76 other senior aides, lawyers, and consultants that planned and carried out the attempted 2020 coup to keep him in office.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g_SlYjyDSD-_fSTOdwTKwEkvV-BYepWFmjScxuaRKzbrr5ryUaQKdKAJh3yN3TaAeOH-NBmOj_LyVVIB1uZIe3fj0pK1iZIigkVsFroE5bv6df_G-3qia8Jmx8iBDQK5eOSmApWz50HR0Ahjnf8Mg8YqRzSZ2CZHqrnsxGRxoTjNkTA9uJdSY12eLfaLRWjBaEIqQeHcQW1UHOoXRQ_-Z0lN4lGYsWt_&c=u9BOlU0MV6TSX5pdF1z6Zn3MY_bdcT4910m6RThqTYPfuSsKv6kkFg==&ch=ZEZd-TPnFwOOARR5cyEIejUdAWrXjlIC-24_ULdibtUtUw1v_qYrjg==)
---
It's no exaggeration to say that together we saved Pennsylvania--and perhaps the nation--from the clutches of MAGA for the foreseeable future.
But right now, we have to be honest. We're celebrating, but we're also hurting. We gave literally everything to this cause. And we made promises and signed contracts that we knew would put us in a bad situation, but we did it because the moment demanded no less than total commitment.
You stood with us to win this crucial court. You fought for democracy, justice, and fairness when America needed us. We worked together to deliver a big win and send a message to MAGA: hands off the courts.
Now that the dust has settled we really need your help. So that we can move on to defending the next courts that MAGA is targeting in MI, GA, and AZ, we need to retire our debt and pay what is owed to every member of our team who worked hard until the very last minute polls closed fighting for this incredible victory.
Can you chip in even just a $5 donation or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts get back on the right footing and prepare for the critical battles to come?

clean_body: You stood with us to win this crucial court for democracy, justice, and fairness. We need you now and are asking for your support after our incredible victory. | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | It's not bragging; it's a fact: We won big. All three Democratic justices on the PA Supreme Court won retention with over 61% of the vote: | == Make no mistake: YOU made this happen. We should feel great about what we did together. Defend Our Courts assembled a nationwide coalition to protect the highest court in the most important swing state from MAGA's plot to keep Trump in power past 2028. As if to acknowledge the truth of our message about the stakes in the race, Trump just issued pardons to Rudy Giuliani and 76 other senior aides, lawyers, and consultants that planned and carried out the attempted 2020 coup to keep him in office. | == It's no exaggeration to say that together we saved Pennsylvania--and perhaps the nation--from the clutches of MAGA for the foreseeable future. But right now, we have to be honest. We're celebrating, but we're also hurting. We gave literally everything to this cause. And we made promises and signed contracts that we knew would put us in a bad situation, but we did it because the moment demanded no less than total commitment. You stood with us to win this crucial court. You fought for democracy, justice, and fairness when America needed us. We worked together to deliver a big win and send a message to MAGA: hands off the courts. Now that the dust has settled we really need your help. So that we can move on to defending the next courts that MAGA is targeting in MI, GA, and AZ, we need to retire our debt and pay what is owed to every member of our team who worked hard until the very last minute polls closed fighting for this incredible victory. Can you chip in even just a $5 donation or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts get back on the right footing and prepare for the critical battles to come? | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for your unwavering support. We're in this for the long haul, and appreciate having you on our side. Team Defend our Courts | == | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

name: The Flyover
subject: Congress OKs Epstein File Release, a 10-Year-Old Driver, and Relationship Glue
body:
The House and Senate both voted Tuesday to approve [the Epstein Files Transparency Act,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnsTci-7BNPHjowpauHZHBR7j2wAhbifL2FW3foOud9Jd-38dtuEVi2u7vccVQ5zxs-CyMteIxTHm7H1hK_iq4l4q0zcR4IA-gwDZaN9oPKRK_BiNTmBEBW4lBd661Vhl1lUvw12RcNybl2xYc2jj7qVXR29mPAClKCmdNa-21Vs7Yi-8ma6dOm-k6Rpe8MAoT1XxcPjNtdcGZX_mBx2XKq-Sw1LoX0b4J6AX0dcGFmM-fgH7JK54gAX3BLVYU0FundWdd83to_mTNSSvNSMwCenmEtD-JmYrrhFH3NdJPU9Z_jfQI8B0AAP__hvR7Qw) directing the Department of Justice to release all unclassified records related to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj71uwyAURp8GtkSA-YkHhi7e0rUjwnCxb4uNBSiR-_RVqr5B5-87Rzofd3f3mHFf3v0Gtqfidni2DL1DdaHsS4XWyleDo3XAPWGGCtkJJtSF8wsfXfSYTydptAlAwEDBcqMHpZhkN7paYLdZRsO0NkaASUMQak6zkEMyimtP0b5snPORc6aluo4mKBUMl-E2ex1HIhlE7KVePwvufYWUz_KAeg1lo9muvR9keCNiImIK5fsEX_v6GomY_q602ng8MWds2hDJls1j_uX7v6IfVvwEAAD__15wa4I) | |
# Wednesday, November 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1863, eight score and two years ago, President Abraham Lincoln [delivered the Gettysburg Address](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO3SAUheGnwR0WYPCloIgUuZu0KS0u2_ZOMBzB9oz89tFJlT71kn4tfT8_tg-HCfPxw11gaS9bhq-WgAjqFko-KrRWfjd4NQLMOyaokDYllOFScrls0WF6Nt1FuwMoGDqwchoHY4QWc3da7z0Yrb1fnJm9cWOc_DwvOgg1OmFCh_Zdk1IuUopRm36ZgjFhkjrM3o1xYVpARCq1_1Uw0wl7eson1D6Uq0v2JHo1NnxjamVqDSU3QroJSw6QCWpf6sHUSifwf0em1hMblYqBxxLuCzLxhL66-jC1RiCHianV-epOd_GEOZSU-btzANHT_F0P7mJ8E3E5jwMb1sPFrZW7BmDDd9lVG19fmBK2cWJaHJfD9Pc2_Zf1p1V_AgAA__8P3JfF), one of the most famous speeches in American history. It took only about two minutes to deliver the entire speech. Well, it was bound to happen sooner or later. The first feature movie created entirely by AI is here, as we report in _Science_ today, and not surprisingly it's an animated superhero film. [Here's the trailer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVssLhhjBoZIVZYqlTK1m4XNJb4tMRGQWHn7yn2FrudI3_B_nsezo0jr9cPd0NaQxhW3ErFWzOOc1mvGUtJPwXupSGugiBnjKLhQB4ADmNE7iq-xa7wNiAJlgxZ0L5XiHR-axQ5CCDPBFMQAXBthjAYvHBhQMgwBGrK7BgAGgPedao2elZo1dPMwud4b1nH0VFNuvxOtdcEQX-mJuZ3TrYl2qfVemDwycWLitG1b-0qP-phw__fF1Xlh8vRk8o3Ol_cvfVRZXpps_X2jGKn0mnX8enMU_8j6rw5PK34DAAD__1gPcAs), see what you think. Today's sponsor, [Cozy Earth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj71uwyAURp8GtkSA-YkHhi7e0rUjwnCxb4uNBSiR-_RVqr5B5-87Rzofd3f3mHFf3v0Gtqfidni2DL1DdaHsS4XWyleDo3XAPWGGCtkJJtSF8wsfXfSYTydptAlAwEDBcqMHpZhkN7paYLdZRsO0NkaASUMQak6zkEMyimtP0b5snPORc6aluo4mKBUMl-E2ex1HIhlE7KVePwvufYWUz_KAeg1lo9muvR9keCNiImIK5fsEX_v6GomY_q602ng8MWds2hDJls1j_uX7v6IfVvwEAAD__15wa4I) is redefining comfort with premium bedding and loungewear made from ultra-soft, breathable, sustainably sourced materials. Their products feel luxurious, look great, and are built to last making them an easy upgrade for anyone who wants better sleep, better comfort, and better everyday essentials.
|
---
## Congress OKs Release of Epstein Files
The House and Senate both voted Tuesday to approve [the Epstein Files Transparency Act,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnsTci-7BNPHjowpauHZHBR7j2wAhbifL2FW3foOud9Jd-38dtuEVi2u7vccVQ5zxs-CyMteIxTHm7H1hK_iq4l4q0zcR4IA-gwDZaN9oPKRK_BiNTmBEBW4lBd661Vhl1lUvw12RcNybl2xYc2jj7qVXR29mPAClKCmdNa-21Vs7Yi-8ma6dOm-k6Rpe8MAoT1XxcPjNtdcGZX_mBx2XKq-Sw1LoX0b4J6AX0dcGFmM-fgH7JK54gAX3BLVYU0FundWdd83to_mTNSSvNSMwCenmEtD-JmYrrhFH3NdJPU9Z_jfQI8B0AAP__hvR7Qw) directing the Department of Justice to release all unclassified records related to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. The House voted overwhelmingly 427-1 to pass the act, and the Senate quickly followed by unanimous consent, sending the bill to President Trump for his signature. Though Trump initially opposed the release, he gave it his backing this week and [said he will sign the legislation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O5CAUBODT4AyLX2MHBCutnPVqsw0tGh7228bGAqZbffuRR3ODiUsq1Vf_bsvNYcJj_eN2sC3m5YBXTdAalMXnYy1Qa35UOGsDPCImKJAWwYSmnFM-LcFhei-qCzYCCJAdWG4GqTVTbOw2q4MxSrLAo4kyToGpIQwj114oFnkYO7RXG-d84pwNSveT8Vp7w5Uf724IE1EMArZc-v8Zj7ZBTO_8hNL7vHfJbq2dlchfRMxEzO7uL0G_5ismYv6bEzb0lYi5lY_9pBXXg94xJVoggatAv3H00lVawPkNKg1QH0TMteXyJnLGQORvLoyepFRDV2w4X5gS1sEQxdbdYfoa1H704tOKzwAAAP__IUqGpg) if it reaches his desk.
## Court Blocks Texas Redistricting
A three-judge federal panel [blocked the new congressional map](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMiPb2PwEDi4hm0svRKZpZvqmsZHtHXbefsVK-wSblVRSqb7v322-eWIK979-R1e2OAc8M2MpmGaI4Z4w5_jMeOSCFDZiTMizltoKpYQa59UTv2dTr25D1NjW6FTftdZKI4f64YzRdui3wQ-dH2GRoLQCo62WasO2xZrctaaUGpWSnbHN2IO10CsDw-K7dayMxJVKTM3_SKE8cON3fGFqIO41u0cpR67aP5WeKj2d59mEBS6Kq6_0dESmQpArPSEjFIrhyhuumDwLiB-piIUjPLMo-OmzSLgmfwbxw08xeBa7P0SC4LUxXd_Wya3HScyUu74y8r574u9H5VcaX05_BQAA__-Rpokl) approved by the Texas legislature, saying it couldn't be used for the 2026 midterm elections. The state's redistricting effort this year sparked efforts by other states to redistrict, [most notably California](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwRsWYMBhYOjiLV07Whhf4tsQsIDGydtX7it0PtL5pe_rOl8dRky3T_cA20KeExw1QmtQZp_TrUCt-V5hrw0wBYxQIM6CCUU5p9zMq8P4nmW32gAgYOjA8lEPSjHJLt1mF66XcDGcwahkcNIraYRmLAxqMQJUh_Z845wbzpmWqjejV8qPXPrL4vRqiGSwYsul_86Y2gYhvvMTSu_zo4t2a22vZPggYiJiOo6jv_vizpGIyZWGPgIRk3cRQy4JHd1L3qli9NhcqzTBq9EGL1dp-TkpiJi0kaMcpOyKXfcDY8SqRyLZ7eEw_nXbv7CeVvwGAAD__zg5fcc), which is moving forward with its plan. The federal court said "substantial evidence" indicated the Texas map was likely drawn using racial gerrymandering and ordered the state to revert to its previous 2021 map. Texas Governor Greg Abbott vowed that the [state would swiftly appeal the decision](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMZ1P7GLzUbhIQ_dPmxIZe4FNDEb26i739tFFyhOkHmlGv_nxtXx5Tnzt3_1JTra8XPSqiUSoLCFfe6Fa869KdxXia-NEhdKCLVoNoGFaouf0XkwT3UaE1DXkYOg7a1vTjs3hutWYGLrR9BFwHEdE20-x2yZvAQCxYfdpA4AJoO2NfUxDsDYMYMK4-j5OyrQUWXJ5_Mx8yUFbeucnlUfIZ5PcIXJX1X1TOCuc5aCDU_pkCucjn_QBKZyreCH98hIOhbPtAYwxei-0a7-uWUQL_fZV_0NzvnzSp791ochVCgfha1c4N8XF-8Upce0HZdr99Px3sJH_evDp8E8AAAD__5HZhcs) to the Supreme Court, arguing the ruling "undermines the authority" of the state legislature.
## Turkey Production Down, Prices Up
U.S. turkey production [has fallen precipitously](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb_G7lgxGJvdgiKNu5c2pUVgvCaPZRDMruW_j8gvpBmNdKSje--vr-3LxRTz86d7oeWdtoxnS8iMdfOUnxVbo--GpTHGvMeEFdOmpJoFgIDHFlxM16bHYHdEhdOIFswyzbPU8j4eFoyZ7gGVX8wMcnegvNGgjAl6MUFOY7TdBgAPALno-fYwfp69Ae3vv90SHoOWGCJTvf2hmPnAPV30wXrz9BqTPZhLG6Yfg1oHtearUOOOBrV28aBWgH76926i9xvUyu_6jZcoVN7JcaQsAp1ZMIlEJzYWMQstxYWuNnEelLC5hKLU6LGJRq52XLB6zCwqFqrcvWO1oZwxpdgWM2j5fLmY_iXl_5r3Y9XfAAAA__9L6I7T) after bird flu forced farms to cull millions of birds, cutting commercial output to 195 million in 2025—a 40-year low. The tighter supply has pushed the national wholesale price for frozen whole turkeys up about 40% to $1.32 per pound, according to the U.S. Department of Agriculture. [A report in PDF is available here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7HgAbYZGLqwpWtHi8DDIcFgAUmUv6_SX-h8patzzs95PduYYt6-7Y66h7JmfLWEvWNdXclbxdbKveHROsYcYsKKaQUK8sTYianV25jeqxi8DoiAfEDN5olLSQVdhqvmMgiQk3fKByHphS-SKwlWBCqAL2qI-vPGGFOM0UnIUc1OSjcz4ZaLnbwigqKPvdTxVmLuVwzpXZ5YR1f2Ielr70cj_IuAIWCw7bGN2abx0bwdt_IkYFrs2AgYj8E-UidgKia0DU8foc9CNy5FAJ4JmJ3DdDA1XQgYd1sgLyAdAdMf9zdVIMfDh6Fqf7xiSrFNMxF0221Mf0D9XxWfGn4DAAD__yRKg2s). Retailers are still expected to stock frozen birds and use brands like Butterball as loss-leader specials to draw holiday shoppers.
* * *

Court Blocks Texas Redistricting A three-judge federal panel approved by the Texas legislature, saying it couldn't be used for the 2026 midterm elections. The state's redistricting effort this year sparked efforts by other states to redistrict, , which is moving forward with its plan. The federal court said "substantial evidence" indicated the Texas map was likely drawn using racial gerrymandering and ordered the state to revert to its previous 2021 map. Texas Governor Greg Abbott vowed that the to the Supreme Court, arguing the ruling "undermines the authority" of the state legislature. Turkey Production Down, Prices Up U.S. turkey production after bird flu forced farms to cull millions of birds, cutting commercial output to 195 million in 2025—a 40-year low. The tighter supply has pushed the national wholesale price for frozen whole turkeys up about 40% to $1.32 per pound, according to the U.S. Department of Agriculture. . Retailers are still expected to stock frozen birds and use brands like Butterball as loss-leader specials to draw holiday shoppers. name: Natalie Jones
subject: 🦃Who’s Giving Their Fair Share this Thanksgiving?🦃
body:
Friends– All over Virginia, preparations are underway for a wonderful Thanksgiving, but federal job loss
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
All over Virginia, preparations are underway for a wonderful Thanksgiving, but federal job losses and the rising cost of living are making the holidays a little more difficult this year. As Virginia families get ready for a day of thanks, we'd like to point out who isn't in a giving mood this season: the ultra-wealthy and corporations.
In Virginia, anyone making over $17,000 a year pays the same tax rate, meaning that teachers, healthcare workers, grocery store employees, and many others are in the same tax bracket as millionaires and billionaires. It's time for the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share.
This season, we're giving thanks to everyone who is fighting for an affordable Virginia.
Natalie Jones Communications Director
---
---
| | | | Freedom Virginia | P.O. Box 10102 | Norfolk, VA 23513 US
---

body:
This will cost the GOP a House seat
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc395822e-604c-47e4-bd26-4d8bb1f9e32e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Cyber students get bullied for their pocket money in Harrisburg
body:
News + editorial | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Wednesday Weekly Reads!

As always, to stay up to date on late-breaking stories and analysis, [subscribe to our daily email list](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66149bfa9c&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1. ****[Pennsylvania’s budget bullies cyber students out of their money](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb47de4bde&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_

The Pennsylvania state budget for 2025-26 is finally law — just 135 days late. The budget grew 5.1 percent, and will spend an eye-popping $3.5 billion (with a “B”) _more_ than the Commonwealth will receive in tax revenue. Yet despite this taxpayer-funded deficit-spending spree, one area of the $50.4 billion budget was cut: funding for cyber charters students.

For the second year in a row, over 68,000 K-12 students from Erie to South Philly will get _less_ funding — retroactive to the start of this school year, beginning three months ago. Tragically, too few Harrisburg politicians care about those children, and almost no politician fears the wrath of their parents, families, and the schools’ staff. Plus, far too many love the teachers union — or fear their wrath. **Why It Matters**. Cyber students are the weaklings in the political schoolyard. It’s why their funding — already only about 65 percent of what a traditional district public school student receives — was slashed about eighteen percent. One year after it was cut seven percent.

Why? To prop up the teachers union schools and harm their competitor schools.

How ironic, how insincere, how cruel that the very Democratic politicians seeking their own moral high ground — pretending to defend the poor and various minorities — are the very ones leading the angry charge to cut the schools that are the refuge for so many of those students.

[Continue Reading](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9ddb833eff&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2. ****[Wissahickon School District rankings fall as achievement gaps deepen](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=38c5697b76&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_ Wissahickon School District boasts of its high [rankings](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7ba68f67a8&e=b7b3eddce2) in _U.S. News and World Reports_ , but it fails to mention the high school rating dropped from 11th in state in 2019 to 21st in 2025. In national rankings, Wissahickon High School descended from 502 in 2019 to 701 in 2025. Data from state [test scores](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4541537a7b&e=b7b3eddce2) show the district has been in decline over the past ten years, and outcomes for African-American and Hispanic students are disproportionately lower than for white and Asian students. In 2015, over 98 percent of all Wissahickon High School students were proficient or advanced in Literature, yet that number dropped to 86.9 percent in 2024. Rates for black and Hispanic students dropped significantly from 2019 to 2024 with proficiency rates at only 51.6 percent for black students and 63.3 percent for Hispanic students.

**Why It Matters.** Carmina Taylor, a long time resident of Penllyn in Lower Gwynedd township, primarily blames the all-Democratic school board for failing to hold accountable the prior and current superintendent to focus on academic outcomes for not only black students, but all students. She believes now that there is a decline for white and Asian students, more people are starting to pay attention. However, the community just elected another all Democratic board, continuing the eight-year trend for at least another two years. “The current school board President, Amy Ginsberg, who has spent eight of the last ten years on the district’s Achievement Gap Attack Plan, has not given a public statement as to why the levels keep decreasing,” said Taylor. “It’s actually been an ongoing systemic failure of leadership and oversight by the board for decades; however, this time, Asian and white students are impacted.” **[Continue Reading](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de6ae10561&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* ## **[Christine Flowers: The horror of ordinary men](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=59652fbcf9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* ## **[Kyle Sammin: So-called skill games are a racket the state should ban, not tax](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b2059a9443&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* ## **[Thom Nickels: Faith, identity, and the questions that remain](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0cfc1d9caf&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* ## **[Paul Davis: Guns Down, Gloves Up, Hands Out](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e963194744&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* ## **[Ben Mannes: From sanctuary to subsidy, Pennsylvania’s proposed migrant programs may cross legal lines](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=76e6ba2cc4&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading. **
Jack Schlossberg, grandson of President John F. Kennedy, announced this week that he would run for Congress in a Manhattan district where the Democratic nomination is tantamount to victory. His qualifications? I already listed them: he is a Kennedy. [At the _Wall Street Journal _this week](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f1c733099f&e=b7b3eddce2), Jack Butler noted that political nepotism, while it has always been with us, is seemingly growing stronger all the time.

"Mr. Schlossberg isn’t the only would-be dynast on the march," Butler writes. "In Indiana, Beau Bayh—son and grandson, respectively, of former Sen. Evan Bayh and the late Sen. Birch Bayh—has announced a run for secretary of state. In Arizona, Adelita Grijalva, a daughter of the late Rep. Raúl Grijalva, won a special election to succeed her father. In New Hampshire, Stefany Shaheen, a daughter of Sen. Jeanne Shaheen, is running for Congress. And in Maine three members of political families are hoping to become governor: Jonathan Bush (a nephew of a president and cousin of another), Hannah Pingree (daughter of a U.S. representative), and—somewhat on the nose—a King (Angus III, son of the senator of the same name)."

Pennsylvania recently bucked this trend by turning out Senator Bob Casey Jr. Maybe the Keystone State will inspire the nation to consider the best candidate for the job — without reference to his family tree.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2c811e9f2e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Judges Block Redistricting, School Districts Sued, and Best Thanksgiving Spot
body:
A three-judge panel blocked the implementation of the state's [congressional redistricting plan](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9ugzAQx_GnMZuR_2AIg4cubOnaER34INcaG9lOSN6-Cn2Ezid9dZ_f13W8AnkK6ydsaMtziWPAI3ssBdP4fXcr5snH-Seho1wSzYXCmkcllOFSctmPDsi_xqZydhKulxVa2bXaGN12qrpZBebSX5xWoOauAxCNmZyRQmPTXFqBFdl3TErZSyWkaGsN3SREKye5KOP0xBqBjkpMdblhwSfkxb_iA1M9x63y9lbKnpn-YGpgajiOo17i861435ka9uip0JyZGhZ0mMDzPxg_ZfxM8iXFjd8zhZUndAmOwOcY1oQ5Uwzg-QZ7lazbD_KectuxRqwbkD-_KP_b7mHVbwAAAP__cUGGbw) passed by lawmakers over the summer, claiming, "Substantial evidence shows that Texas racially gerrymandered the 2025 map."

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-O4yAQx_GnwV0sZojxuaA46eQu126JMAzO7BITAfn39itH-wZbfqYYffX7ONmT48Tb-t9dyLRnzHajR03UGhX7eQsr1SVl_1UocG2FfeNtrRYlDgeAA0w2OE4ve-yCWWSYoCMDo1bDoPSI3dnokQJOEFFqPSg_hT-eIEo5KAUUB-zY7M8AYAKUIHWv3LhIqWGBiENQizhKCtxy6duZGj1djemV71R6ny9dMufWrlWovwJngXMgl3refF437jkLnF2M1gs15xipWA5C_dMC9X5-A9S4-1bSjwXqmm_F045CK-fNpT2wKyZcH5wSVz2Ko1wvjtO7ov1uu7vB7wAAAP__dcOAfw) | |
# Wednesday, November 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1845, a group of settlers affiliated with the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints arrived in Grayson County. Led by Lyman Wight, they were [the first Mormons](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DF2hCAQANDTYLc-ZlCJBUUau02b0gcyKlmEfTBZd2-fl1whF_jF_7zOVxtiSNuHPcjwc81zorNGYqYyf337jaqLebkV8qFyCQuHtNUZJfYXgAuMs7chvuau8cZJP0JDBvSg-l4NGpvdSD-MuGpwWg3LqpS0QOpNYd9r1SGsTTC_GACMgBLk0CqrnZQDOFix98qJTpIPnEvLOzE9bV3jKz-otEs-mmh25nsV6l3gJHA6z7PlutucYkjU5rIJnHabvMv5JnCixCVQFTgduRw51aYYfz9DjKEOWnRyO2yIfzT_L-Rh8CcAAP__e9F1WQ) to make their home in Texas. Get your coats and rain jackets! ## Judges Block Redistricting
A three-judge panel blocked the implementation of the state's [congressional redistricting plan](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9ugzAQx_GnMZuR_2AIg4cubOnaER34INcaG9lOSN6-Cn2Ezid9dZ_f13W8AnkK6ydsaMtziWPAI3ssBdP4fXcr5snH-Seho1wSzYXCmkcllOFSctmPDsi_xqZydhKulxVa2bXaGN12qrpZBebSX5xWoOauAxCNmZyRQmPTXFqBFdl3TErZSyWkaGsN3SREKye5KOP0xBqBjkpMdblhwSfkxb_iA1M9x63y9lbKnpn-YGpgajiOo17i861435ka9uip0JyZGhZ0mMDzPxg_ZfxM8iXFjd8zhZUndAmOwOcY1oQ5Uwzg-QZ7lazbD_KectuxRqwbkD-_KP_b7mHVbwAAAP__cUGGbw) passed by lawmakers over the summer, claiming, "_Substantial evidence shows that Texas racially gerrymandered the 2025 map_." The new map would give the GOP an edge in 30 of the state's 38 congressional districts, up from 25 in the map authorized in 2021. Republicans initiated the [mid-decade redraw](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSrCAQQE-DGRaNghoQ_MRsfrqhhdI4vYtiATvO3H7L2SNs0lFXv_f64zbdLAXa1_92Q1OePk47njlgKZimz2-3Yp5DXL4SOsol0VJoX_MkhVQcgMMwOUvhNbWVM7NwA1RooNONUo3uZHU3qGaPDn2zNIOYhWx9D6ict4Pu-l5BReY6BgADSAFC143tZiE0zOClcs3MWoGOSkx1uWPBp80-vOIDU73ErQrmXsqRWfOPyZHJ8TzP-oiBCi3xWmByvIqYHC8MkyPANXomx8sr2cB_M_m7k-948jeEL3FfE-ZMcbeBb_bgQmildS-qZNxxUgiUdcdasW6Wwtum_O2HDyN_AgAA__8LVYVQ) after President Trump urged the move in an effort to protect the GOP's slim majority in the U.S. House, though Gov. Greg Abbott and state lawmakers also argued they were aiming to address "coalition districts" identified by the Department of Justice. "_A federal court just stopped one of the most brazen attempts to steal our democracy that Texas has ever seen_ ," said Texas House Minority Leader Gene Wu. Abbott [called the ruling](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuy4yAMhp8Gd3hA-FpQbOMu227pASM72mDIAImTtz9jv8Jp1Ojy6fv_3eabIU9h-2t21OWzxjngkT2Wgmn-_3IbZuvj8kjoKJdES6Gw5RkEtFxKLsfZGfLfuamctsKNskIt-061rep6qO7aIlgcWqFapdYerRrsOphWKUTZ9M1YkT6PSSlHCUKKrlamt0J00soVWqcsawQ6KjHV5Y4FPyav_hvfmOol7pXX91Kemak_DCYG03Ec9SObcjYZTKcNg-laYzCdKAaTlGcZGEwrOkzG8yW-UuGXaubXNF9T3PkrU9h4wIMvMWwJc6YYjOcbpvTdTXCYOAUOAjq-kyuY9pNTJe2eB3lPuetZI7bdkL_-Lb9L-a3hJwAA__9_RZIN) "clearly erroneous" and "absurd." Attorney General Ken Paxton [promised to appeal](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFygzAQBNCvgQ5GdyAJChVp6Jw2JSOkA5QIcKSzsf8-Y_9C-re7M_t1GS82xLAvn3Yjw4_5GHc6cyRmSuP3zS-Up3i4n0Q-ZE7BcdiXPKJAWQFU0I_ehvgc29KbSfgeSjKgVSNlozSWq3HYzg30s3daddSjxrnTlkg2uvXUqTKYVxkA9IAChKobqychFEwwo_TNVLSCfOAj1bwS08PmOT6PO6XaHVsZzcp8zUXzUeBQ4HCe58s52plS_r3ZRC9X4PCOFjjYxMFFGjvpfKucroTtqGodiqoD7Ssrph6IrJVa1itvsUzGX88QY8hKF61YNhvie5z_d9nd4F8AAAD__3Nrf1c) the ruling to the Supreme Court. The state's candidate filing deadline for the March primaries closes Dec. 8, providing a short timetable to resolve the dispute.
## 140 Illegal Immigrants Arrested
Federal agents arrested [more than 140 illegal immigrants](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGS4yAMgOGnwZ0yCNs4LiiucbfXXukRQSbcYZMBZXfz9jfOK2yjRjPf6Nefj_WDUk5H_E07O_neynrwV8sswnX9-wyRm8_l9q9ySE1qukk6YluNNiMgAs5roJRf69AF53WYsWOHk-3HsbeT6e4OrfU0-M2OweJ1GofR6KvFybIfzdxfu-RODBFnNBq1vfQ0ea0tetzMGHqvBs0hSakXubPwN7Utv8on18ut7F12d5FHU_0vZRZlluP1KE3OlTLLKSuzIJ7jqszybHD2KbO8IaiUAgjVyGcXSOUDAgNVik-CSEeEzBQaSAGqlZtA2QAHDSlnjpQh7XuKlQ450a668PhKOadmJzXouFPK7zPlZ8_9dOZ_AAAA___nw41p) in San Antonio during an early Sunday raid targeting a sex and human trafficking operation purportedly run by the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua. More than 100 people protested the operation Monday night, chanting "immigrants are welcome here." Gov. Greg Abbott, meanwhile, [promised](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDty7CAURFeDMlTci34EBC9RNi91qEJ8JGwEKmBGM7t3jcs7cN7d1ed83Jab8sHH7b86rKxPl5ZorxJsrTYvn3ez2bKGpL-yNb7U7HX1cSsLMuwpAAWxGOXDa-kaI1dmBDRWwjjwvufDiM0uAbRj3LlRT2yauGNCYI8ophW6yfCp8fI9BgACkAEbWq7GlbEBVnDYG76Sjlnja8pt3W21T1VceKWHza1ORxPkXutZCP9HcCY4X9fVHq-iooo1RZ_eIYLzm4rgHJJWgeCscvU6WIKzWz2t2UZqLFVZbXdFi4r0t00RQOAkeHvuZ5OlOS8fgi_DSDq2HcqHnxP1b-oeEr8DAAD__1UwgtM) "more of this to come" in a social media post praising DPS for their efforts.
## FEMA Could Move to Texas
The Trump administration is reportedly considering [relocating](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdEaeAexQuNiGLttuiQweiPcZHNmTkPz9E5HeF7zmVlfnzNx_1_HqQgz7-tdtZPm1pHGno0Ripjz-f_iVyhTT_JXJh8I5zBz2tYyosJMAEvrRuxDfY1t5OynfQ0UWjG66rtEGq5sF76kxgJcGLwrmaUbXgu8dmAvovlNVsCcMAHpABUrXjTOTUhomWLDzzSRaRT5wyjXfiOnlyhLf6Um5ntNWRXtjvhfR_BE4CByO46jvKQYOczoLAofzI4HDqRE4AJxhBA4LbU5ykh-m9KG4wpSlW2mf33J7xFjklp50dmLaSRZ2-Qwm-aOQSumuNbqvsvX3I8QYijaiVevmQvxcyL_b9WnxOwAA__-x0ovQ) the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) to Texas, according to two unnamed former senior officials at the agency interviewed by Politico. A state government source confirmed discussions about a possible move. The report also revealed that Nim Kidd, head of the Texas Division of Emergency Management, could lead the agency if it relocates to the state. Kidd confirmed on social media that he was [interviewed for the post](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCngQ7ktbERhYu_ocvfXolsdg17MZCznZC8_Sl5hetH32jm6zJdHEfel_9uI1ue4Zh2OnOkUihN33dcKPt4zNdEyLkkngvvS56kkLoBaGCY0HF8TV2N1gscoCYLvVFaK9PLerVGKx-ER6fFLIdu7hCcFyYoQhM0Qc32jQHAAFKAMK1yvRfCgIcgNSpfdYKQy5HaslKhp8shvo4HpXY-tjratZRbrtS_So6VHM_zbMPx7N09F97fkUqO702VHANtrlnJ4c_dpUIpNx-u2XlrroxYJ4u3k2PkbPqqE8vmOH5ayt--eVj5GwAA___VJHqp) in February, but he insisted he's "committed to serving Texas first." Kidd played a visible role in the aftermath of this summer's devastating flash floods in the Hill Country and Central Texas, [overseeing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGyozAMRb_GdM5YJhgoKLahe9tuyRgsE-0zNmMr4eXvd5xf2EbNle6ZM_rztXxZChT33_bAiX98WiJeJSAz5uXv0-1Y1pC274yOCmfamOJeFq10JwEkjIuzFN7LvXHTqtwIDU7Qm7brWtPr5jH1w4BqXFtjjYOu8-DU2Gt_773pTD8MDU21DABG0AqUubW2X5UysILXnWtXcVfoiFO-8QMZf2zx4Z1emG9bOpowPZjPItpfQs9Cz9d13bZA27d-pGfhFOuW0HPVEnr-3As9V6bQM0AdQw3y8zildQfFKmqZUpRbioUc5iKP9KK4S4-HlZzkp0ba6CTb86xJYctYJKdT4oF5x7i9ZfKeNrJBZjxTZlnsu8KbPLnzohComF7c1X5YCh8b_r8fvCb9LwAA__-cFZ4c) search and rescue operations and discussing measures to improve coordinated disaster preparation and response with lawmakers. Earlier this year, President Trump appointed Kidd and Gov. Greg Abbott to a 13-member FEMA review council. On Monday, Acting FEMA Administrator David Richardson [resigned](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAUhE9jMiM_m9_AwSZkvemG6Bk_wNs2tGwPNLcf0dKcYJJSqUr6VKp_j_GBzrtt-YuBdH7P-7jRmTzlTHH8_2UXSsbv0zOSdSlHN2W3LWmUQtYcgEM_WnT-GqvCaiNsDwVpaBtV16ppZbHqDk0le6VMJZQwgIQItmtpaqWgqeoKp28YAPQgBYimVNgaIRowMMvaKsMqQdblPZZ5pUxvTLO_9oNiOe2h8HrN-ZWY-sPkwORwnmf59Pm4SyaHm83kAHBLx-QwU0Ae8OJhP4h_cHx18cdaemHMgbbMKVBcaJsuHnDDhT7htDqa-UYn94SWIpNDEbV9nc57l5qWVWIJ6PxnW_7do4eW3wEAAP__l5CLfg) after six months on the job.

clean_body: A three-judge panel blocked the implementation of the state's passed by lawmakers over the summer, claiming, "Substantial evidence shows that Texas racially gerrymandered the 2025 map." | | | | | | Wednesday, November 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1845, a group of settlers affiliated with the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints arrived in Grayson County. Led by Lyman Wight, they were to make their home in Texas. Get your coats and rain jackets! A cold front is expected to hit the Panhandle tomorrow night and is likely to move into North and Central Texas on Thursday, bringing rain and by about 20 degrees. Tired of scam calls and wondering how strangers got your info? Today’s sponsor, , helps you take back control by removing your personal data from the brokers who sell it. Abilene 🌧️ 77/63° | Amarillo ☁️ 70/50° | Austin 🌤️ 81/68° | Brownsville ☁️ 89/73° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 85/74° | DFW ☁️ 82/67° | El Paso 🌤️ 65/54° | Houston 🌤️ 80/66° | Laredo ☁️ 89/72° | Lubbock ☁️ 72/51° | Midland 🌧️ 74/60° | San Antonio ☁️ 83/69° | Tyler ☁️ 81/66° | Waco ☁️ 81/66° Take The Flyoverwith you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Judges Block Redistricting A three-judge panel blocked the implementation of the state's passed by lawmakers over the summer, claiming, "Substantial evidence shows that Texas racially gerrymandered the 2025 map." The new map would give the GOP an edge in 30 of the state's 38 congressional districts, up from 25 in the map authorized in 2021. Republicans initiated the after President Trump urged the move in an effort to protect the GOP's slim majority in the U.S. House, though Gov. Greg Abbott and state lawmakers also argued they were aiming to address "coalition districts" identified by the Department of Justice. "A federal court just stopped one of the most brazen attempts to steal our democracy that Texas has ever seen ," said Texas House Minority Leader Gene Wu. Abbott "clearly erroneous" and "absurd." Attorney General Ken Paxton the ruling to the Supreme Court. The state's candidate filing deadline for the March primaries closes Dec. 8, providing a short timetable to resolve the dispute. 140 Illegal Immigrants Arrested Federal agents arrested in San Antonio during an early Sunday raid targeting a sex and human trafficking operation purportedly run by the Venezuelan gang Tren de Aragua. The FBI reported the arrests in a announcing the establishment of a regional Homeland Security Task Force to "combat transnational criminal organizations." The statement indicated the task force had also apprehended a father and son accused of money laundering and arms smuggling for a Mexican cartel. Agencies include the FBI, Homeland Security Investigations, ICE, U.S. Border Patrol, and the Texas Department of Public Safety, among others. More than 100 people protested the operation Monday night, chanting "immigrants are welcome here." Gov. Greg Abbott, meanwhile, "more of this to come" in a social media post praising DPS for their efforts. FEMA Could Move to Texas The Trump administration is reportedly considering the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) to Texas, according to two unnamed former senior officials at the agency interviewed by Politico. A state government source confirmed discussions about a possible move. The report also revealed that Nim Kidd, head of the Texas Division of Emergency Management, could lead the agency if it relocates to the state. Kidd confirmed on social media that he was in February, but he insisted he's "committed to serving Texas first." Kidd played a visible role in the aftermath of this summer's devastating flash floods in the Hill Country and Central Texas, search and rescue operations and discussing measures to improve coordinated disaster preparation and response with lawmakers. Earlier this year, President Trump appointed Kidd and Gov. Greg Abbott to a 13-member FEMA review council. On Monday, Acting FEMA Administrator David Richardson after six months on the job. | Flying together with our sponsor Unknown Number Calling? It’s Not Random. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb-OnDAQh5_GdKz830tBEQUhpbhrU6LZ8RxYZwyxDad9-4hki7TpRvP7Zj6N5ufb9AYhhjS_w0o9nmHKZcIFcgwE8Que5UEx0Em-LqFMkkvTCtGK7uJE43v0VsmGeuGsMkYbxZulV-6h8UNYK-7eeG_vJKX2d2k7QoXaNaG_NgkhOiGFkd1Neg7CcePIa3ComebH7qFSueGWCuUTajgppLRd1ZZuuK1N7Jda98LUNyZHJsdCeGS6QSK_1YtgcqxHTiHN7b6FVNujAJNjx8mTc7b90BZbrWXXAgneqgfnhFIB3A1TY9mOjDTh5omp4fuPd2eM0Uzao67TSj4cK1MDrRDiq_l3gqlhgeyhfE6Av14RwrpDmBNTA35OkWbA5yuqlNd_BE3u_f4VYgzFOqb5fAn-3Fv__0NnL38HAAD__2v9ne0)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb-OnDAQh5_GdKz830tBEQUhpbhrU6LZ8RxYZwyxDad9-4hki7TpRvP7Zj6N5ufb9AYhhjS_w0o9nmHKZcIFcgwE8Que5UEx0Em-LqFMkkvTCtGK7uJE43v0VsmGeuGsMkYbxZulV-6h8UNYK-7eeG_vJKX2d2k7QoXaNaG_NgkhOiGFkd1Neg7CcePIa3ComebH7qFSueGWCuUTajgppLRd1ZZuuK1N7Jda98LUNyZHJsdCeGS6QSK_1YtgcqxHTiHN7b6FVNujAJNjx8mTc7b90BZbrWXXAgneqgfnhFIB3A1TY9mOjDTh5omp4fuPd2eM0Uzao67TSj4cK1MDrRDiq_l3gqlhgeyhfE6Av14RwrpDmBNTA35OkWbA5yuqlNd_BE3u_f4VYgzFOqb5fAn-3Fv__0NnL38HAAD__2v9ne0)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb-OnDAQh5_GdKz830tBEQUhpbhrU6LZ8RxYZwyxDad9-4hki7TpRvP7Zj6N5ufb9AYhhjS_w0o9nmHKZcIFcgwE8Que5UEx0Em-LqFMkkvTCtGK7uJE43v0VsmGeuGsMkYbxZulV-6h8UNYK-7eeG_vJKX2d2k7QoXaNaG_NgkhOiGFkd1Neg7CcePIa3ComebH7qFSueGWCuUTajgppLRd1ZZuuK1N7Jda98LUNyZHJsdCeGS6QSK_1YtgcqxHTiHN7b6FVNujAJNjx8mTc7b90BZbrWXXAgneqgfnhFIB3A1TY9mOjDTh5omp4fuPd2eM0Uzao67TSj4cK1MDrRDiq_l3gqlhgeyhfE6Av14RwrpDmBNTA35OkWbA5yuqlNd_BE3u_f4VYgzFOqb5fAn-3Fv__0NnL38HAAD__2v9ne0)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

Late at night, while the Radical Left was sleeping, I delivered a notice that every U.S. Citizen must see:
**__"People who are in our Country illegally WILL NOT BE COUNTED IN THE CENSUS. Thank you for your attention to this matter!”__**
The Radical Left has been rigging elections for DECADES!
MILLIONS of illegals have been tunneled into our nation thanks to the RADICAL LEFT - all in an effort to DESTROY our America First Agenda.
**My plan?**

body:
The Church is rising again across America
This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church.

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=03f4299ac410496d9ec3ea42ffc61faa&_e=uIVAAL6P9Ihw3ho5AnEmOmpPaad388bYp42KcDDH69xm-ekCaNS4ArFbsvihCnAaT9ZYQ9lNuDCBwijtp69v0VgU28KhxeM6DE-e0m0ETLM6wyCK047I_-SpUTFw0zQmY7mYDO9_3YQeKpg7tnFAYXYDWPrArlK2l_wTQY3T-_kSVUfgLEn9mLOEHOkijCG3DZJTFonjFFHYxg8HVM5pB4gHicb0zbQHIoog9RrYCAzSBnChEDn9jkX6pw38FuN2g6hs2vso-dld85gw6tzSOEMkFrM_zds5qJZJGg7Vc9d9yPhl4gQvrznwXFKBiQs253pN3JaDkO-cxRDUS22XvBbzEfTsPyCO_ire94ScU5q0H5gtFjjkLWP5-lKZCxVwqpzGy9QG0xc8Ep8uXKYuijPQgmQBxCU-SidgZT0ZQJF8hZs06jVFDCUzrm4ruCv64O45gvEX_FNABOPpg9YTGgrM5gqAmtEOtHFFcIw7tlRaRdE3vsbmXpJFPyEU3eaOX8MYsTd-KrNbiaClfLxLrZnHFTO4T8WGEq3myVxImi41QV__MjK0A6cZVCls2weUU7MuTC2vg46Qybu9LSKolkq_vzy0aPihnKUGpzGKtdl_pQY_IUS6MnnZIa-YOD23IycKm20S7Ym_jWDjF9UFbEFm_7DkFQWtxtjUqnRVC5KkShPhxl9ZC4ebUdazppQobAReCYRgCWtYiyVENOu8D8WtNUIeul43QFmKi3IBr3kKkJPMx4hZ_Xqy3ut9fhNcuFoLrj3CjCFBL-FSrKz3UBLrcIwvOmUlpAEItxh3bWE%3D)
