Friend,
---
Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, _young people_ -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what **Charlie **dreamed of when he launched **TPUSA Faith.** He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has **doubled** , now connecting with more than ** 8,000 congregations** across America. 💥 Our online reach has **surged by 1,000%** , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over **200,000 new people** -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=03f4299ac410496d9ec3ea42ffc61faa&_e=uIVAAL6P9Ihw3ho5AnEmOmpPaad388bYp42KcDDH69xm-ekCaNS4ArFbsvihCnAaT9ZYQ9lNuDCBwijtp69v0VgU28KhxeM6DE-e0m0ETLM6wyCK047I_-SpUTFw0zQmY7mYDO9_3YQeKpg7tnFAYXYDWPrArlK2l_wTQY3T-_kSVUfgLEn9mLOEHOkijCG3DZJTFonjFFHYxg8HVM5pB4gHicb0zbQHIoog9RrYCAzSBnChEDn9jkX6pw38FuN2g6hs2vso-dld85gw6tzSOEMkFrM_zds5qJZJGg7Vc9chgb2Ux8HCaMB-7VdrLod2RDmGxdvOE0JDGDpiKj3CmxROkdqky1Q6oKTfTuabfedw12zemH1L2jruronv7l42GIG0QOW_tKasmZLk6N8Gm6HdcgQukxKvbwcVMIdF880MO4h_bN_gemYqqonuClLW3G4V1vRvdmfcXLslp32jVM_XLYYNwrdUB5SUCYRY-Z-Gh_WNSpnw69-0K7n6VtzqxKsO8-aBRceJPPfwwbjcsTn7FiEdhLzvvWLPPQMYtmrykW9hPr_n__XE4D_Yq9OMQ3LvvRA0YVFmXwSofte9O9Wzmpp6yyBO45dneQqX2wlUii_maSKREbLkPFFhp6sICGetM5SJqKPmAGdJiQ5HByeEBadcQDlOIbIFXJ75Yagm8Qnn291sJuxNMypDEPbt1vXr8hEuPpKagJPmb-i54fJwMrjy3Sn1shbaOyZ0XUYsyIqbqXfM4bGhjq-8Mb8WxWNWbWkjJ1uhA8iLJOqCYrBaENjhBrOFleK7hNCs6No%3D)

I'm **Pastor Lucas Miles** , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of **TPUSA Faith** -- the church outreach arm of **Turning Point USA.** Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: **the Church is waking up.** All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down."_This is what **Charlie prayed for.** This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite _you_ to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us.**[Your gift today will help us:](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=03f4299ac410496d9ec3ea42ffc61faa&_e=uIVAAL6P9Ihw3ho5AnEmOmpPaad388bYp42KcDDH69xm-ekCaNS4ArFbsvihCnAaT9ZYQ9lNuDCBwijtp69v0VgU28KhxeM6DE-e0m0ETLM6wyCK047I_-SpUTFw0zQmY7mYDO9_3YQeKpg7tnFAYXYDWPrArlK2l_wTQY3T-_kSVUfgLEn9mLOEHOkijCG3DZJTFonjFFHYxg8HVM5pB4gHicb0zbQHIoog9RrYCAzSBnChEDn9jkX6pw38FuN2g6hs2vso-dld85gw6tzSOEMkFrM_zds5qJZJGg7Vc9equGOqyH8khDxCv1yHyv7t6q3uAXsquOFUAJTCLt4IaYPy_NyppLwHGBtp_OedAWj_bOYi1BQJIseQJVhQz_PNfVkXRdJ3PNb7uGLvUuDhjNlpYXBGy59yfD4V7npDvOBTNmdTaaSB6E7WNRA3ueM3V4nImLN_jHaFo4g8lVmpW2bRjZnjvpI_RGgGamr6kCOow2PZy6Ud8gbq9UJZg99OgUS2IjEOiVW0mj_aL169WayQq1GFiHCMfzKSlBwGzy5RBDTOQT2nlfCh7UF-PNEGsVIqWXGDCD0Nz9fTpJJKKraFUVTcSDOlkshcJIqX7OnHc69Aj_1YloSsNDatJc2ZZToejV1KNob4H5-jeu-67oXQJDSKg-Et0rZppj1Q6QEIAdBHVrBir7NTQnJxq-xuQ5zk6gMFnOcjSextkjjJfZudvAJlgXC7SfGEogoeR7laW5aW_iRihz9arkFOs5Q5L_syRCT3QNvXle7iVO0q_cHNMa5UGoGO8cbjQsqy4II%3D)**

clean_body: The Church is rising again across America This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church. | | | Friend, Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, young people -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what Charlie dreamed of when he launched TPUSA Faith. He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has doubled , now connecting with more than 8,000 congregations across America. 💥 Our online reach has surged by 1,000% , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over 200,000 new people -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction. That's not just growth.That's revival. And I'm humbled to witness it. God is at work. And we need your support. I'm Pastor Lucas Miles , and I have the honor of serving as the Senior Director of TPUSA Faith -- the church outreach arm of Turning Point USA. Our mission is simple but urgent: To build a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families in Christ.We train pastors.We unite congregations.We reach the next generation on college campuses.And we remind America that there is still truth worth standing for.You might be seeing the darkness in our culture -- the confusion, the moral drift, the pressure on Christians to stay silent.But here's the good news: the Church is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down."This is what Charlie prayed for. This is what I've dedicated my life to help lead.And now, I want to invite you to be part of it.More pastors are asking for guidance.More churches are joining every week. More young people are hungry for answers -- for discipleship, for identity, for truth.And we must be ready to meet them.This is our moment, Friend.A once-in-a-generation opportunity to strengthen the Church -- not just for today, but for the decades to come. If you believe America needs a stronger Church -- one that speaks truth in love and refuses to bow to "Woke" ideology -- then I'd be honored to have you stand with us. Equip pastors to lead boldly and biblically. Expand the network from 8,000 to 10,000+ congregations. Reach more young people with the Gospel and the truth about liberty. Keep the light of truth shining in every corner of this nation. Charlie 's legacy continues -- And right now, that looks like revival.It looks like churches filling with life.It looks like believers standing together for God's truth.America needs strong churches -- and strong churches need friends like you. Will you take your stand today?Pressing forward, Pastor Lucas Miles Senior Director, TPUSA Faith P.S. Since September 10 , more than 4,000 new churches have joined the TPUSA Faith network. Each one represents a pastor choosing courage over comfort -- and believers hungry for truth.Your first gift today will help equip them with resources, training, and connection. $25 helps resource a pastor stepping into this movement. $50 helps reach young people returning to church. $100+ strengthens the growing network of churches uniting for revival.This is a once-in-a-generation moment.Charlie 's vision is alive.Let's build a stronger Church -- together. 4940 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: Party Magic
body:

# [Party Magic](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179321174&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzIxMTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1NTc0NDYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjE0OTQ0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Fa1SBT0KuufBwiZaWMDHKHQbQv1XEVlSHFgGqwVpPz0)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179321174&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzIxMTc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzU1NzQ0NiwiZXhwIjoxNzY2MTQ5NDQ2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.RSMcL7ukkgnjA_m_XydOylCP-U4ftulw9aPh8tyeork&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179321174&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzIxMTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1NTc0NDYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjE0OTQ0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Fa1SBT0KuufBwiZaWMDHKHQbQv1XEVlSHFgGqwVpPz0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=179321174&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MzIxMTc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1NTc0NDYsImV4cCI6MTc2NjE0OTQ0NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.Fa1SBT0KuufBwiZaWMDHKHQbQv1XEVlSHFgGqwVpPz0)

| | [](https://substack..n8j1Uq2icgArhzbKQsKaXi6S_tMbAghGa8XuHXLL9FQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/party-magic?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

Hello, hope that you are doing great!
Last week, [Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/0af47cbf-b639-4208-820a-db7b6aaa2654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) went to Brooklyn, Chicago, SF and Los Angeles. We were throwing phone-free afterparties for the Pivot Podcast Tour with Scott Galloway; yes, I traipsed around the country hosting dance parties all week.
Over a thousand people came out to the [Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/0af47cbf-b639-4208-820a-db7b6aaa2654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) events last week. I partied more on this tour than I have in quite some time. I saw some old friends and people from the campaign. Also - a LOT of young people. A consistent exchange for me was "Ohmigosh, you were my favorite candidate in 2020 when I was a senior in high school / freshman in college!" Doing the math, that meant that they were 18 back in 2019, which would make them 24 today. I guess that's about the sweet spot for going to a late night no-phones dance party.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b638d7d-8e42-4e02-a2b2-71ee07468cc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Also a very common sentiment - "Thank you for doing this!" People had a lot of fun. They appreciated that everyone's phone was in a bag and you had no choice but to talk to each other, dance, or maybe head to the bar and get a drink.
In my experience there are 3 kinds of parties:
1. There might be music, but no one is actually going to dance;
2. There's music and a vibe, and a few people are going to rhythmically sway back and forth; and
3. There's a dance floor. The DJ is aggressive about it. People are actually on the dance floor getting down.

Most of the Offline parties this week fell into Category 3, mainly because we brought international DJ [Conrad Taylor](https://substack.com/redirect/436ea1bd-ad36-4bea-87a6-135795e63b30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with us and Conrad finds not dancing unacceptable. Also, dancing is somewhat positively correlated with a crowd, and a lot of people came out.
Other questions I got: "Are you going to DJ?" No. No I'm not.
Also common: "Why are you doing this?" It was totally fair; why throw these parties?
Part of it is that we've launched [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/be2cd44f-0333-44b8-9ec7-a3c2d45e522f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a wireless carrier that pays you to use your phone less. Early Noble users are using 17% less data in their second month - it turns out that people don't doomscroll as much when they are getting money not to. [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/be2cd44f-0333-44b8-9ec7-a3c2d45e522f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is sponsoring Offline events to make them free and accessible.
But of course, there are a million types of events Noble could sponsor - a yoga class for example. So why dance parties?
I wrote a little while ago that Americans are [partying](https://substack.com/redirect/9eb114cc-3e99-4656-b498-b86e4d2d933d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 50% less than we did when I was coming up. That's messed up. I may not be able to solve every problem, but I at least can get some people together for a good time to make some memories.
I spent a lot of time in my twenties going to clubs. I enjoyed dancing. Did I practice my moves at home in front of a mirror? Maybe. I wasn't a heavy drinker - I never had money for a table or bottle or whatever - but those evenings still comprise some of my fondest memories. There was always a chance you'd meet someone. Even coming home alone late at night, I felt alive, like I'd done something magical.
When Evelyn and I started dating, one of our first dates was to a hip-hop club called Bob Bar on the Lower East Side. It was a small, cramped club with one room, but everyone there got down. We had a blast. And here we are, happily married almost twenty years later. I'm not saying that one led to the other, but maybe it did?
I was also influenced by my friend Dave Chappelle; I was hanging out with him one cold weeknight in Ohio last year, and he said, "Let's go to the clubhouse." He sent a text, we went down the road to one of his buildings, and then dozens of people showed up and started partying. Out of nowhere. He has a DJ on call who pulls up and plays his favorite music. It was the most impressive thing ever. Just about everywhere that guy goes a party breaks out. He has a magic power that way.
I'd like that kind of magic. Wouldn't you?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/baae70dc-d2dc-4dd2-857f-1df50c193664?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I'm a party promoter in more ways than one. Again, if you can bring people together for some festivity in your own life or home, please do so. Help people have a good time, whether it's just them coming over to watch a game or grab a drink or eat an apple pie. It's needed more than ever.
We had a phenomenal time - so much so that we are doing it on the regular! Next up on the [Offline](https://substack.com/redirect/0af47cbf-b639-4208-820a-db7b6aaa2654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Tour are Boston, Baltimore, and back to NYC. To see what Forward is doing in your area, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/a7cbafd6-c701-4f37-b939-053f65d28be7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Email [matt@noblemobile.com](https://substack.com/redirect/9c8b15c3-bd61-4167-9d27-6ca0931b0982?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if you want a few months off from your wireless bill and want to be rewarded with [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/929691ef-9604-4b12-92de-b9d0c6bc16fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Remember to look up, and to spend time with other people.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6450a56e-725b-4f22-84dc-34eb727ca4c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zul6ij77lpd63f3h7d7gt4t6jv995iqpc2iktd3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zri991fn7qa40t0mjinmphckfeo5rg7rd4mkuung_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhi2rsijnqptr2037lcha7bkar69o0i78mh3qf5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv307kbkr477j6pdum05s2em862jmkhs7tal7qg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ji3au0svnspfm3e8plbj97drc50583ji5uu5n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zija6je18tt78mtlve2smbirf9nlbvdc17psffa8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)

---
|

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqcq2d4s7kp99bug541ard3egs60g81v2b9v161o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljmaoj4cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: The corporate PACs and would-be oligarchs trying to buy this election can drop millions in a single ad buy. We don’t have that luxury.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1319%2E251025%2E2bk_n4 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1319%2E251025%2E2bk_n4 ]Abdul for US Senate

Good morning,
Peter.

I’m writing this over my first coffee of the day — triple shot, of course.

[ Abdul ]Abdul smiling while holding a cup of coffee

Coffee is part of my morning routine. I roast the beans myself, grind them
fresh, and pull the shot by hand. I even dabble in latte art from time to
time.

[ A ]A GIF of Abdul pouring latte art

It may sound like a lot for a drink, but I believe that when something’s
worth doing, it’s worth doing right.

That’s how I think about this campaign, too.

No shortcuts. No corporate PAC money. Just hard work and the courage to

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | An everyday man taps his credit card at the gas pump. He just tapped his credit card at the gas station terminal... Atlantic Ave., Suite 200 Delray Beach, FL 33444 Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Total Nightmare (via VPP)
subject: [BREAKING] Supreme Court to hear case that could GUT Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need to take immediate action, folks.
| _Folks, this is a _total_ nightmare:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21886%2E878179%2EPzYWcL) _If Republicans get away with this, Democrats might NEVER have a House majority ever again!_ **That’s why we’re taking IMMEDIATE action:**

[**We’re urgently rounding up the top 100 Democrats in your state to sign on: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition to SAVE the Voting Rights Act and STOP the Supreme Court from destroying future elections? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21886%2E878179%2EPzYWcL) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE THE VOTING RIGHTS ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21886%2E878179%2EPzYWcL)
---
We can’t overstate how dangerous this is.

**_Gutting the Voting Rights Act would lead to outright voter suppression and election rigging, and would practically _guarantee_ a Republican majority, indefinitely!_**

We can’t sit back and let them get away with this, folks — _but we need all hands on deck:_

[**Please: Sign on IMMEDIATELY to SAVE the Voting Rights Act and STOP the Supreme Court from DESTROYING future elections »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251119_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21886%2E878179%2EPzYWcL)

Thank you,

name: Team Scalise
subject: Kamala Harris is Back to win the final Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
How important is this race for the Democrats? Kamala Harris just hit the campaign trail for the FIRST TIME since the election.

Our MAGA movement is about to face its final test.
We're staring down the barrel of the FINAL Special Election of 2025, and Democrats are itching to capitalize on their momentum following the Virginia and New Jersey victories.
If they win the TN-07 Special Election too, we could be in trouble for the Midterms next year...
How important is this race for the Democrats? Kamala Harris just hit the campaign trail for the FIRST TIME since the election.[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6hc28jcgqm36epp9a7nuiur6eldfejpa46s24d8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)Live shot of Kamala Harris in TN-07 via NYT, Nov. 18th
Early voting is underway and our candidate in this race - Trump-endorsed Matt Van Epps - already reached out to you once.
[Now I'm following up ONE LAST TIME because the stakes are so high. As Majority Leader, I set a goal to raise another $100,000 before the final votes are cast to help win key races like the TN-07 Special Election.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb2ms9ari2h3prukvjmhsmfbb2vomp5qivpcddp8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)
Anything less and we could be handing Kamala Harris and the Democrats a major victory.[DONATE BEFORE THE FINAL SPECIAL ELECTION OF 2025
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zld3tilvb29uboe3f8ptl4vldpp21m2erkephh9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)Don't forget - Losing this seat would spell disaster for the MAGA movement and the President's closest allies are watching this race like a hawk. Everyone knows what they'll do if we lose the House:

* Impeach your President
* Launch countless Witch Hunts against him
* Haul his Cabinet in front of Congress
* Bury the Administration in subpoenas
* Blockade our entire agenda

You have the power to help stop them but time is of the essence. We're going up against the candidate that raised over a billion dollars to destroy everything we stand for.
Are you up for the challenge to defeat them once again?
The Special Election is on December 2nd and Kamala Harris just landed in Tennessee - if there was ever a time to contribute...
[...THAT TIME IS RIGHT NOW!!!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3f922rp5uo8hm3k9c3qbhkpnj77eelcsc8hrel8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)[DONATE BEFORE THE FINAL SPECIAL ELECTION OF 2025
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znnc5di9076a9r7eovgcnv5qpt8tnd8obhnlldho_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)Thank you for taking the time to hear me out.- Steve**
**STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader
* * *
We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America.
The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on it![](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhhivoek5jmnb5ji1kcbs5n64s8bccflmr14ivcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)In just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team.
This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. Those who are ready to help President Trump and Republicans ring in the Golden Age of America.[CLAIM YOUR SPOT
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgsqqgo45e8afi8ikmaugukvuuar61irougpnf1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm1o72cjh2bs)| | |
---

name: More lies
subject: Boebert’s two-faced deception to secretly save Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson’s podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who “blew the whistle” on Epstein.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zZDyF4_3MwQzZp8WMRtRoLl9xZwKiS-LW388Mskqd_pOV4mClH4RjbGAhmJxUAu6zHaN-WF1HDdn1kYQRMWG0LhF8qj5AftyaZQisbtCBp1i2Pj7cec-QYvbHodvXutFhhBud1sYBEh0dt6FAAZbPeCWuAZ-wjLD3eovF9_xa1yew1rjDPtnAsKpOzrQG9yIZ5VEZNyQZH1QFgX5Lfyxz-PV_2YQ9t26&c=D5huTFmwBS8YqOEymvZMgKMKzhhYqMfi-a6M6TZ7I7aAua0nFSdvdA==&ch=bJQnLGlfoarJ904g_cid5pW-EgNF3UzJ54U9hfVL_bMJ4i10hi_6YQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Yesterday, Lauren Boebert reminded the entire country exactly who she is.
Before the House vote to release the Epstein files, she ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson's podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who "blew the whistle" on Epstein.
And she didn't stop there. She echoed Trump's calls to launch an investigation into Epstein's ties to Democrats--a move that would conveniently open the door for the Trump admin to refuse releasing files that would implicate Trump under the pretense of an "on-going investigation."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zZDyF4_3MwQzZp8WMRtRoLl9xZwKiS-LW388Mskqd_pOV4mClH4RjbGAhmJxUAu6zHaN-WF1HDdn1kYQRMWG0LhF8qj5AftyaZQisbtCBp1i2Pj7cec-QYvbHodvXutFhhBud1sYBEh0dt6FAAZbPeCWuAZ-wjLD3eovF9_xa1yew1rjDPtnAsKpOzrQG9yIZ5VEZNyQZH1QFgX5Lfyxz9JPnxxyHFtL&c=D5huTFmwBS8YqOEymvZMgKMKzhhYqMfi-a6M6TZ7I7aAua0nFSdvdA==&ch=bJQnLGlfoarJ904g_cid5pW-EgNF3UzJ54U9hfVL_bMJ4i10hi_6YQ==)
---
So much for all that glowing media coverage last week about Beobert's "courage" for "standing up to Trump."
She got summoned to the White House Situation Room, refused to remove her name from the discharge petition only to carry along with MAGA's desperate "transparency" ruse, and then strutted around acting like some kind of renegade Maverick.
---

clean_body: Boebert ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson’s podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who “blew the whistle” on Epstein. | | | | | == | Peter, Yesterday, Lauren Boebert reminded the entire country exactly who she is. Before the House vote to release the Epstein files, she ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson's podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who "blew the whistle" on Epstein. And she didn't stop there. She echoed Trump's calls to launch an investigation into Epstein's ties to Democrats--a move that would conveniently open the door for the Trump admin to refuse releasing files that would implicate Trump under the pretense of an "on-going investigation." | == So much for all that glowing media coverage last week about Beobert's "courage" for "standing up to Trump." She got summoned to the White House Situation Room, refused to remove her name from the discharge petition only to carry along with MAGA's desperate "transparency" ruse, and then strutted around acting like some kind of renegade Maverick. | == But her appearance on Benny Johnson's show gave the whole game away: Boebert is still a loyal foot soldier for Trump, doing everything she can to dull the truth, spread disinformation, and run interference for him. She's terrified of crossing him, terrified of losing her grip on power, and terrified that the voters of CO-4 can see straight through her. And they do. CO-4 voters know her "independence" act is a fraud. They know she chases headlines, not results. And that's why Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's only in Congress because of just 546 voters. And when labor leader, public servant, and Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her in 2024, our campaign delivered the best performance a Democrat had ever had in the district--outperfoming Kamala Harris by 6 points. Trisha is the only candidate with the momentum, credibility, and grassroots power to retire Lauren Boebert once and for all. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Let's end the lies, end the cowardice, and end Lauren Boebert's career for good. subject: Boebert’s two-faced deception to secretly save Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson’s podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who “blew the whistle” on Epstein.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UtP7_adGKOGURoMPgYQkYyBfk0CoRWAObFAZlvRM1HNZwpAXrQaK3UpQG7aztnFINl4vbA6qsIHqjiRSAMZ3xvqE_VNBzx26GzjIawPk5GCmhDDPf0uDoSxgWZTTdfbTXqqq8InsB0RsPA-8egCoUTBUN_pkoG3dfZc-GBuOhm7QMjtjhpEDHb37dsnB6lYne3XS-vKzKRbAO7P2uocKE5O4aYvd8Zt&c=hFavVTmFIcYPC7H6CI1yfqqNYDlDlxFowNzd4u1ZdqtHTtT0MHF-dQ==&ch=wnW4ge7FMkfeWb8BOC007CX9sGMLRWQuoUJyIx87OS4WzSxj_NgXgw==)
---
|

Peter,
Yesterday, Lauren Boebert reminded the entire country exactly who she is.
Before the House vote to release the Epstein files, she ran to MAGA extremist Benny Johnson's podcast to push a wild conspiracy theory, claiming Donald Trump was actually an FBI informant who "blew the whistle" on Epstein.
And she didn't stop there. She echoed Trump's calls to launch an investigation into Epstein's ties to Democrats--a move that would conveniently open the door for the Trump admin to refuse releasing files that would implicate Trump under the pretense of an "on-going investigation."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UtP7_adGKOGURoMPgYQkYyBfk0CoRWAObFAZlvRM1HNZwpAXrQaK3UpQG7aztnFINl4vbA6qsIHqjiRSAMZ3xvqE_VNBzx26GzjIawPk5GCmhDDPf0uDoSxgWZTTdfbTXqqq8InsB0RsPA-8egCoUTBUN_pkoG3dfZc-GBuOhm7QMjtjhpEDHb37dsnB6lYne3XS-vKzKTdCrtED7LTzZ0LObWVUNOk&c=hFavVTmFIcYPC7H6CI1yfqqNYDlDlxFowNzd4u1ZdqtHTtT0MHF-dQ==&ch=wnW4ge7FMkfeWb8BOC007CX9sGMLRWQuoUJyIx87OS4WzSxj_NgXgw==)
---
So much for all that glowing media coverage last week about Beobert's "courage" for "standing up to Trump."
She got summoned to the White House Situation Room, refused to remove her name from the discharge petition only to carry along with MAGA's desperate "transparency" ruse, and then strutted around acting like some kind of renegade Maverick.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UtP7_adGKOGURoMPgYQkYyBfk0CoRWAObFAZlvRM1HNZwpAXrQaK3UpQG7aztnFINl4vbA6qsIHqjiRSAMZ3xvqE_VNBzx26GzjIawPk5GCmhDDPf0uDoSxgWZTTdfbTXqqq8InsB0RsPA-8egCoUTBUN_pkoG3dfZc-GBuOhm7QMjtjhpEDHb37dsnB6lYne3XS-vKzKRZaaHcwE5XopJrkEOz2nr-&c=hFavVTmFIcYPC7H6CI1yfqqNYDlDlxFowNzd4u1ZdqtHTtT0MHF-dQ==&ch=wnW4ge7FMkfeWb8BOC007CX9sGMLRWQuoUJyIx87OS4WzSxj_NgXgw==)
---
But her appearance on Benny Johnson's show gave the whole game away: Boebert is still a loyal foot soldier for Trump, doing everything she can to dull the truth, spread disinformation, and run interference for him.
She's terrified of crossing him, terrified of losing her grip on power, and terrified that the voters of CO-4 can see straight through her. And they do. CO-4 voters know her "independence" act is a fraud. They know she chases headlines, not results.
And that's why Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been.
She's only in Congress because of just 546 voters. And when labor leader, public servant, and Democrat Trisha Calvarese ran against her in 2024, our campaign delivered the best performance a Democrat had ever had in the district--outperfoming Kamala Harris by 6 points.
Trisha is the only candidate with the momentum, credibility, and grassroots power to retire Lauren Boebert once and for all.
[If you're as fed up as we are with Boebert's lying, chaos, spinelessness, and relentless Trump-worship, then we need you in this fight. Will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can to help Trisha defeat Boebert?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-UtP7_adGKOGURoMPgYQkYyBfk0CoRWAObFAZlvRM1HNZwpAXrQaK3UpQG7aztnFSYtDBFFs5TpyGqfKGq7-NH292uQvRkYTJ5SZw9vi_TuMNtxBd2K1579_CmGIHVGMSWEa666u0-_lBYuj6kx-3jh14VapJlSyTVa-AtTbeQ9suD08vGJ7Pu79YyQ1rrnwjdjML_Oo4G6pRFl_2ckJ2lb7wIeytRMpXCXtUb_Quvw=&c=hFavVTmFIcYPC7H6CI1yfqqNYDlDlxFowNzd4u1ZdqtHTtT0MHF-dQ==&ch=wnW4ge7FMkfeWb8BOC007CX9sGMLRWQuoUJyIx87OS4WzSxj_NgXgw==)

name: Team Scalise
subject: Kamala Harris is Back to win the final Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
How important is this race for the Democrats? Kamala Harris just hit the campaign trail for the FIRST TIME since the election.

Our MAGA movement is about to face its final test.
We're staring down the barrel of the FINAL Special Election of 2025, and Democrats are itching to capitalize on their momentum following the Virginia and New Jersey victories.
If they win the TN-07 Special Election too, we could be in trouble for the Midterms next year...
How important is this race for the Democrats? Kamala Harris just hit the campaign trail for the FIRST TIME since the election.[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qd7sl28l0sh6gr5g5mj07k6gm3nhv35umh7gfg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)Live shot of Kamala Harris in TN-07 via NYT, Nov. 18th
Early voting is underway and our candidate in this race - Trump-endorsed Matt Van Epps - already reached out to you once.
[Now I'm following up ONE LAST TIME because the stakes are so high. As Majority Leader, I set a goal to raise another $100,000 before the final votes are cast to help win key races like the TN-07 Special Election.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6eebabg0ocq7hbj6mlie5uv5gumf2c128fvm2eo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)
Anything less and we could be handing Kamala Harris and the Democrats a major victory.[DONATE BEFORE THE FINAL SPECIAL ELECTION OF 2025
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkbb7ooe5qb5tphfc8n8dpdjoj302u45bec2nv9o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)Don't forget - Losing this seat would spell disaster for the MAGA movement and the President's closest allies are watching this race like a hawk. Everyone knows what they'll do if we lose the House:

* Impeach your President
* Launch countless Witch Hunts against him
* Haul his Cabinet in front of Congress
* Bury the Administration in subpoenas
* Blockade our entire agenda

You have the power to help stop them but time is of the essence. We're going up against the candidate that raised over a billion dollars to destroy everything we stand for.
Are you up for the challenge to defeat them once again?
The Special Election is on December 2nd and Kamala Harris just landed in Tennessee - if there was ever a time to contribute...
[...THAT TIME IS RIGHT NOW!!!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf92e51l0q4n1gkkurq70iivb4aa307dreosim98_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)[DONATE BEFORE THE FINAL SPECIAL ELECTION OF 2025
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z92dd4htvmbhn6fafp1v68oro1klagqafvu7u2jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)Thank you for taking the time to hear me out.- Steve**
**STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader
* * *
We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America.
The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on it![](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z59n60nersb6gl872cbcmok437so3epbcsf85378_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)In just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team.
This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. Those who are ready to help President Trump and Republicans ring in the Golden Age of America.[CLAIM YOUR SPOT
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg00s6fcdaf3lljelnj2nsb3berpfvm0ctjlgqdo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6cljm9pr4c9h2bs)| | |

| Hi Peter, Please join Representative John Marsi Thursday November 20th for his 2026 Campaign Kickoff!
Rep. Marsi has been a strong voice for fiscal responsibility, public safety, and common-sense governance for the 6th Worcester District, which includes Charlton, Dudley, Southbridge, and Spencer. His leadership reflects the values that Massachusetts Republicans stand for: putting taxpayers first and keeping government accountable.
Rep. John Marsi 2026 Campaign Kickoff Date: Thursday, November 20th Time: 6:00 to 8:00 PM Location: Heritage Country Club 85 Sampson Road, Charlton, MA 01507
Appetizers will be provided, and a cash bar will be available.
We hope you'll join fellow Republicans and community leaders in supporting Rep. Marsi as he kicks off his 2026 campaign and continues the work of bringing responsible leadership to our Commonwealth.
If you would like to donate, please visit: [www.RepMarsi.com/Donate](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iyvHss0dcucMIDvIcEeLRPkg0ULImVDnnar5e3EqPA8inxm3OteIvH--6POxqGrcR6TPPICXMSsC0dE7IvGYMa-kZLNtkWWh8TyeTigWeM63ADUf06aBybgdjdOL2fY_POK7uH68SMrokpCry6vcPjaoM0gdAfN4Eb-xOzNA18w=&c=YVqRZbZznEyGcHwtadFphhTMXGSqwQldnIMd7GO-Egek4l2vBzJ7tw==&ch=BEJ7JpdpWBNa-KkTFDSiWc5WC7m1ll7gLMHdmhnK9t_Z4fg6U6Z7rg==).
Thank you! Haley Jones Massachusetts Republican Party

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Shutdowns don’t stop Movements
body:
Cori Bush shows what real commitment to people looks like.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c08042cb6f58/tockcw1cwy-183?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=8fe35b6007&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | When our government ground to a halt for the last few weeks, one thing certainly wasn’t affected: **Cori Bush’s commitment to the people.**
Last Friday, Cori was on her way to speak at the Indiana Center for Middle East Peace event in Fort Wayne, Indiana. This small but mighty progressive community is doing courageous work organizing in one of the reddest states in the country, promoting justice, dignity, and real people-powered democracy.
But the overworking of our air transport system **almost made everything fall apart.** She sat on the tarmac for four hours. Then the announcement came: her flight was cancelled because of the shutdown chaos.
Most people would have turned around, blamed the situation, and called it a day.
**Cori Bush is not like most people.**
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=9ad0ad3fa0&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| | Instead of giving up, Cori left the airport, got in a car, and **drove nine and half hours,** from Charlotte to Fort Wayne, to make sure she didn’t break her commitment to the people counting on her.
No entourage.No press cameras.**Just determination, purpose, and love for the people.**
When she arrived, that small community in Fort Wayne was deeply appreciative. It mattered that a national leader showed up for them in the middle of a government shutdown. It mattered that she honored her word. It mattered that she treated them like they mattered.
Because they do. **We all do.**
**This is what leadership looks like when it’s rooted in people-first values** — the exact values we uplift and protect at the Movement for Freedom. And it’s why we fight to elect and support leaders who don’t crumble when the government does — leaders who dig deep, push forward, and show up.
[If you believe we need more leaders like Cori, more people’s champions willing to go the distance for justice, we’re asking you to invest in this work today. Support the movement that supports leaders like Cori Bush — chip in now to fuel our movement.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=fddbbc560f&e=81ab29c4d2)
We’ll keep building. We’ll keep showing up. And — just like Cori — we’ll keep moving, no matter what.
---
| |
**The Movement for Freedom Team**
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=80f49811b9&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2025 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom P St NW Washington, DC 200033 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=a7ca99e9e1) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=a7ca99e9e1)
---
|

name: Team Ossoff
subject: New York Times: "People are going silent."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
Before I ran for the U.S. Senate, I was an investigative journalist leading a team that exposed corruption and human rights abuses worldwide.
This report in _The New York Times_ reminded me of what I saw in many of those investigations:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251119-1-f-r&t=1&akid=1113%2E5691347%2EhdMQSO)
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminds me of countries where dissent is silenced by intimidation.
From the article:
_Fired federal workers who are worried about losing their homes ask not to be quoted by name. University presidents fearing that millions of dollars in federal funding could disappear are holding their fire. Chief executives alarmed by tariffs that could hurt their businesses are on mute. ..._
_“When you see important societal actors — be it university presidents, media outlets, C.E.O.s, mayors, governors — changing their behavior in order to avoid the wrath of the government, that’s a sign that we’ve crossed the line into some form of authoritarianism,” said Steven Levitsky, a professor of government at Harvard and the co-author of the influential 2018 book “How Democracies Die.”_
**This is unacceptable in the United States of America.**
Peter — As Trump dismantles checks on his power and purges the government to fill every office with loyalists, more and more Americans are too afraid of retaliation to speak up.
**This descent into an un-American America must be stopped. We must regain Congressional power.**
I’m the ONLY Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
That means I’m MAGA’s #1 target for defeat.
**Help me beat them again, just like we did in 2021.**
[**Please contribute to my campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251119-1-f-r&t=2&akid=1113%2E5691347%2EhdMQSO)
Thank you for chipping in if you can.
\- Jon
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251119-1-f-r&t=3&akid=1113%2E5691347%2EhdMQSO)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=1113%2E5691347%2EhdMQSO) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1113%2E5691347%2EhdMQSO) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8950?t=3&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB)
That’s me! A little girl growing up in Michigan who just wanted to help people.

She never imagined she’d serve in a president’s administration, be elected to Congress, or run for the U.S. Senate to represent her beloved home state.
She never imagined she’d get to spend her life fighting for the Michigan families she loves so much.

But that’s exactly what I’m doing. Because everywhere I go, I hear the same thing: Michiganders are scared.
Scared of rising costs. Scared of losing their health care. Scared about what Trump will do next.

null, I love this state. And I refuse to sit back as the MAGA chaos agenda harms the people I love.

I’m stepping up – and I’m asking you to do the same.
**[Will you chip in $5 to help me win this battleground race and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8951?t=4&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8950?t=5&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB)
---
Fighting for you,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8944?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8926?t=7&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1404%2E49239%2ELzhhMB)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

Dear Friend,
---
The next few days may be the longest of my life. They will decide whether I live free or become a political prisoner.
---
Friday, November 21 is the **_DEADLINE_** for the Democrat Attorney General of Arizona to decide whether the _TRIAL OF MY LIFE_ proceeds or is thrown out once and for all.
---
It will truly be the _“trial of my life.”_ If I lose, I could be SENTENCED to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man.
---
And because this is a _state_ case, President Trump **_CANNOT_** save me with a _federal_ pardon.
---
But that didn’t stop the President from sending a POWERFUL and SYMBOLIC message to the Attorney General at the final hour.
---
**He granted me a pardon to show the Democrat Attorney General that the President of the United States and the Department of Justice recognize my innocence and stand beside me in the fight for my freedom.**
---
_Now, I am humbly asking _YOU_ to deliver a symbolic message at the final hour as well..._
---
_...I am asking you to sign _THE PEOPLE’S PARDON of Rudy W. Giuliani_ to show just how many U.S. Citizens believe that this RIGGED trial must be thrown to the ash heap of history._
---
_With the November 21 Deadline fast approaching, I’m asking**YOU** to echo the President’s call for my freedom!_

name: Tom Barrett
subject: Speaker Johnson announces his endorsement of my re-election!
body:
Democrats cannot take the House without winning the 7th District | | | [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D691cc08a7696610f06d5a804%26ss_email_id%3D691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2%26ss_campaign_name%3DSpeaker%2BJohnson%2Bannounces%2Bhis%2Bendorsement%2Bof%2Bmy%2Bre-election%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-19T14%253A47%253A03Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=W5CYGee1-cQojEF6h0WyUw5rum4%3D)
---
| _**I am proud to announce that Speaker of the House Mike Johnson has endorsed my re-election.**_ Speaker Johnson has been one of the most effective speakers in American history, defying the odds to pass landmark legislation that has secured our border, lowered taxes for Michiganders, while growing our domestic energy supply.
---
|
---
[_ _**Join Speaker Johnson** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-endorsement&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=aSXjdwqXxTBXwq0izvs5lpBPta8%3D)
---
I am working with the Speaker to address the affordability crisis confronting Americans. Even as gas and some grocery prices come down, housing, healthcare, insurance, and utilities continue to challenge American households.**Our #1 priority is to get these costs under control.**
---
[_ _**Stand with Tom** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-endorsement&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=aSXjdwqXxTBXwq0izvs5lpBPta8%3D)
---
Make no mistake: my race is one of the biggest races in America.I was one of just five Republicans to flip a Democrat seat in 2024 and that makes me their top target in 2026.Soros and Pelosi dark money groups have already spent more than $3 million throughout my district on dishonest attack ads.
---
[_ _**Make a donation** _ _](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-endorsement&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=aSXjdwqXxTBXwq0izvs5lpBPta8%3D)
---
I need your help to protect our majority and continue the strong start of President Trump’s first term. We’ve gotten a lot done in the first ten months but there is much more work to do.[Please consider a donation of any amount.](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fspeaker-johnson-endorsement&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=aSXjdwqXxTBXwq0izvs5lpBPta8%3D)
---
|
---
| [](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D691cc08a7696610f06d5a804%26ss_email_id%3D691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2%26ss_campaign_name%3DSpeaker%2BJohnson%2Bannounces%2Bhis%2Bendorsement%2Bof%2Bmy%2Bre-election%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-19T14%253A47%253A03Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=W5CYGee1-cQojEF6h0WyUw5rum4%3D) | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2FtombarrettMI7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=6mQPWT4XWWcQR_c4v0NV-c52CnE%3D) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=1sxjZvMZL5lAoMrqEZOYJKYhRj8%3D) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Ftombarrettmi7&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=cCNH-T3LQgqbm6JMzWfxwV-fbz8%3D) | | [ ](mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com) | | [ ](https://p9t2.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691dd85acaf40656fcfcd7b2&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.linkedin.com%2Fin%2Ftombarrettmi7%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_691cc08a7696610f06d5a804&l=en-US&s=7e2nM4pyShqNFTcsrpMTip8yDtU%3D)

I’m not going to sugarcoat it — [**tonight’s deadline is one of those moments that separates the campaigns that _talk tough_ from the ones that actually deliver.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bdbc6904bf9e44cb93bc4898334ea166&_e=g40XfGd0QTYp6xqh3PjebjgS4phSjsVUq4QlNj2jE7k9KTKzQa-JcLsnFdezR7oBeN007xXrlfL3pnRuL_DCyB_BMmPi0IxQDH5B5ZcExqy6e1goG4MPWKCpfVK-n6sbuS8GQYhGCzge_kXEG2Qa8wIeDMV3_oTchI8kMn1HvxbNlqIATtxW6FpqqQZCNIE0VRF4iTPVZbuA07uzhlBrZQLCbIQ2vYOCwzS7ADTY10vqH7BAVXhjgVoYXl-kMSlXruUlycLvJEFBoGxAOHmuKcbCOTWIH2i6tcAyDA-x_gPt317QsaGxJXotrr5n-JpfHfXezaYvZ45w_2EQIVj9fJAoyCQymfJauwevVbhVBQU91Fa7EwqkwahD-dBlH9Iw-xdn5cJYQMr5B0pon9QLFHQcQnhV5RDvwRb8-_QtewtQjhW9Y9voLRLxBIpbeKM3PnhaZAn3NdPQztKSSRkNder844k4b6TULz-LzLNZXtm4Wf-KEB_VdEuzkvHwIm19k3iooyUclSi09utABItx-nUKbdNZTyeKN4wgwwWTgeutuhwWRYxYOmMYfFM5h2dgGJQ47PAyXCBLMuYzztPpIuxvcXkUm3L0Aa42mnm7U7SeopDvNMP2dcbzkyKCwF4nUfKE39AvU2IbPL7xw7MeNz5EjsHv2NUQpG8Vdr9ixFlBoGGtfHC4gIH6Z5wnLkFD5btOql3yImMkRvMQ4buTtw%3D%3D)

By midnight, **every dollar is counted toward our mid-month goal** — and the media, the Democrats, and every D.C. insider are watching to see if we’re still charging full speed ahead.

This isn’t just another “fundraising goal.”

It’s a **show of strength.**

**We’re also halfway through the quarter** — which means what we raise tonight sets the tone for the final sprint of the year. It tells the Left whether we’re coasting... **or crushing it.**

When I flipped this seat red, it wasn’t because the establishment believed in me. It’s because _you_ did.

You helped build a grassroots army that took on the machine and won.

Now they’re coming for that momentum — and tonight decides if we hold it.

Hey folks,
Katie's on a well-earned vacation, so I pulled in my friend and fellow troublemaker **Mike Madrid** for a bonus Endless Urgency live. We went hard at the Epstein vote, the collapse of MAGA's "trust me" narrative, Marjorie Taylor Greene's sudden "I'm sorry" era, and what the hell is actually happening with the Latino vote. This one is sharp, blunt, and honestly... a little bit cathartic.
* [**00:01:07**] How the Epstein vote spiraled and why Trump's team tried to smother the fallout.
* [**00:08:46**] The right-wing media breakage and how Epstein shattered MAGA's favorite narrative.
* [**00:16:02**] MTG's new "humility" phase and what it signals about the post-Trump scramble.
* [**00:23:18**] The Latino vote as a dealignment story--and why both parties keep missing the mark.
* [**00:30:41**] What's ahead in 2026 and 2028 if economic pressure keeps defining everything.

This episode is for anyone trying to make sense of the chaos: the Epstein vote, the fracturing right, the future of Marjorie Taylor Greene, and the real story behind Latino voters that pundits keep butchering. If you value honest, unvarnished conversations like this--about power, corruption, and how we actually win--help me keep them going by supporting the work.

--Mike

# **▶️: Inflation, Scandals, and Silence**
Right now, families across the nation are feeling the impact of real and urgent challenges. Prices are rising, everyday necessities cost more, and too many people are struggling just to keep up. At the same time, **major national scandals** — like the unanswered questions surrounding the **Epstein list** — continue to erode trust in our institutions.What makes this even more frustrating is the reality that many of our current representatives played a role in creating or ignoring these problems. **That’s why I believe it’s important to pause and ask a simple but powerful question: **[**_What has your representative done for you lately?_**](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AW0AAIV6OxgAAc6nLowAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpHd5Ix9XE5SbhQ7eyUSG7M1c9KgAtq28/2/t2dtfuRszYHfrrpxjT-Ltw/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3N0b3BzZWNyZXRz)
| | [](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AW0AAIV6OxgAAc6nLowAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpHd5Ix9XE5SbhQ7eyUSG7M1c9KgAtq28/3/0K28XN8jFUP55wsA1ENafA/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3N0b3BzZWNyZXRz)
---
| Is your representative standing up for your interests? Are they working to solve the issues that directly impact your family, your future, and your community? **Or have they chosen political games and finger-pointing over real solutions?** Our country has become more polarized than ever, often leaving us feeling like it’s “us against them.” But it doesn’t have to stay this way. **Division is a choice — and so is unity**. We can choose leaders who value collaboration, honesty, accountability, and actual progress.We can choose a better path forward.**I’m committed to changing the narrative, bringing people together, and restoring trust by focusing on the issues that matter most to Texans** — not partisan distractions. We deserve leaders who fight for us, tell the truth, and put our interests first.That’s why I’m running to represent Texas’s 8th Congressional District in Washington. And with your support, we can build a future grounded in integrity, transparency, and real solutions.[**_Let’s choose progress over polarization. Let’s choose accountability over excuses. And let’s make sure our voices are finally heard._**](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AW0AAIV6OxgAAc6nLowAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpHd5Ix9XE5SbhQ7eyUSG7M1c9KgAtq28/4/P0VEalkobS4dC2TAnwoH-Q/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3N0b3BzZWNyZXRz)
