name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9sl6k8nh9ljqm14f08mfufhreu6sqmh9pkh66bo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgecpj2c5h2bs) [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemj964tp6fnt51is3jso2emfga8ar5kbl9h2dco_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgecpj2c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl9cjiqp7goist4fpdkcm0sg4kftnidpbodp9vag_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgecpj2c5h2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn9h60dos7mqb42acne9hnqlbsqsbchqgl1bn5fg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgecpj2c5h2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3iqth158v5a0a16m630tcphj1b2oq1ebkmhigsg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgecpj2c5h2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential

clean_body: Peter, I want you to understand | | | = Peter, I want you to understand why your Democratic Membership is critical right now: – Democrats only need to flip = seats to take back the House. – Republicans are panicking – and have already raised = to defeat us. – Now, they’re using that massive war chest to launch ads in = must-win districts to spread reckless lies about Democrats. = = = NAME: = ID: #= MEMBERSHIP: = = Peter, we’re all tired of Team Extreme’s outrageous lies. = This is our moment to act, and we cannot afford to hesitate. So I’m asking you to make a pivotal choice: We can either let Republicans and their billionaire allies outraise us, direct cash to every battleground district and peddle dangerous lies about us to expand their weak majority... = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. We need 20,000 local signatures, so please add your name to our petition right away! >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70076?t=4&akid=23634%2E4449941%2EAHXsET) | [ADD MY NAME: ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70076?t=5&akid=23634%2E4449941%2EAHXsET)

The Electoral College is an outdated relic that's blocking true democracy.

**ONE:** Republicans have only won the **popular vote TWICE** since 1988.

**TWO:** But, they've managed to **win the presidency four times** \-- all because of the broken Electoral College.

**THREE: **Thankfully, Top Democrats know the only way to **FIX this problem is by ABOLISHING the Electoral College.**

But they won't be able to make this happen without a MASSIVE surge of support in your state.

**_And if we don 't get enough signatures by midnight tonight, our grassroots campaign could FAIL!_**
[**_So we 're launching a MASSIVE petition to DEMAND Congress pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! We need 20,000 local signatures, so please add your name to our petition right away! >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70076?t=6&akid=23634%2E4449941%2EAHXsET)

_Fight For Reform_

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Are you in it to win with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
You can make the difference.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing my home, Peter.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So **[when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee, it’s because your contribution](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN)** could make the difference between victory and defeat.
**Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority.** They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us.
I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you.
Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead.
**[I am asking you to contribute $15 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. We can win this race, but ONLY if we stick together. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97711?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97711?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97710?refcode=em20251119-9733&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9733%2E614464%2EFFqDqN)
---
I deeply appreciate all your support,
Roy Cooper

Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So could make the difference between victory and defeat. Republicans see me as the top challenger to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win. That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend hundreds of millions against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly: I deeply appreciate all your support, Roy Cooper Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=e96afc332f95499c938bced942f236e7&_e=8girkT2acaXiTMEXTzyBX64Z4gAxufs9WAyy3VYlNifieHZ5UrFQnrh-X10eLEMI65EBEfGHU2u2bRLKaJarRfgC6egG8Dc-xADbhizxtIne79xRZzA8MY73Z9gRaDY3_CynUf_9t6w_TCie_uGhXnoOqHBHPAMuVN7eoLKAcSe00xd5ty86O1TWgGUcRJWuBQ2EkG6pvH9Xeu_ZXjnwrnSq8PxUjkA6jM573ByfSZrcg_uqc7VchGnb9gJrwFvTlq7pcPSwRA3oqLF_RqNFY-FZHZn149xcREsF0OY5VeaolvYZ_ur7WvpoOgRehAvN5VC-AtpvXCgJk3sPzFIvjq2BRDblxZEG8N9pzDghbG_cyRwm-NFrNE-mPZgYkszXtj2aFlKKTQPtdNkMq9CoyODUoVMxUrNjR_AqrP_ZtKmewdzNP_9mctMHMtSl_7vvFdA5pcdi75sCqQ1HFj_bf99g2-tMg554YTZrm3I5wBUhoVc3g52IHZeNfoLcqahAnkUBvIM5B9Kh7bKf5U4bLb7dHExqwBaTQkNy2JQ5XWD3P6LEwCBURATB0aWtCoeB)

body:
Every name, every document, every connection should be released to the public NOW. Peter, Wesley didn't mince words, _and neither should we:_

**We are NOT in the business of protecting pedophiles.** That's why Wesley voted YES to release the Epstein files.

The American people deserve the truth. That means every name, every document, every connection should be released to the public NOW.

**[Wesley is calling on the Justice Department to fulfill its duty to the American people and release the files. name: The Antimonopolist
subject: The Age of Extraction
body:
Hi there, It is hard to know what to call these times-the TikTok economy?--but "the Age of Extraction" is such a great, dark description. Every part of our lives has become a target for monopoly extraction, whether it's price-gouging, fees, or forced attention to annoying ads. That's true, obviously, of the tech platforms, but sometimes we can overfocus there, because its also true of many other areas of life as well, like housing and healthcare. "The Age of Extraction" is the name of a great

---

| [The Age of Extraction](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/136cf2ea?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
---
| By Zephyr Teachout • 18 Nov 2025 | [View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/899f8da3?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)

[View in browser](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/0604926e?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21)
Old photo from our 2014 campaign when Tim Wu and I ran for Governor and Lt. Governor in a long shot anti-corruption and anti-monopoly campaign. It's been a long time coming, but Cuomo is now gone!
| | | Hi there,It is hard to know what to call these times-the TikTok economy?--but "the Age of Extraction" is such a great, dark description. Every part of our lives has become a target for monopoly extraction, whether it's price-gouging, fees, or forced attention to annoying ads. That's true, obviously, of the tech platforms, but sometimes we can overfocus there, because its also true of many other areas of life as well, like housing and healthcare."The Age of Extraction" is the name of a [great new book](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/3f754ea4?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21) by my friend Tim Wu, who was my running mate back in our 2014 challenge to Andrew Cuomo's governorship. The _New York Times_ , in [a rave review,](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/955359d8?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21) wrote that "reality has since caught up to a future he has long warned about" and called it "an intelligent and useful guide to a dispiriting age." It quoted the book: "Prosperity, fairness and growth are not incompatible," After our run, Wu went to Biden's White House where he was a critical driving force Administration's antimonopoly program, pushing for the appointment of Lina Khan and Jonathan Kanter, and the architect of the right to get hearing aids over the counter. He previously wrote [ _The Curse of Bigness_ ,](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/5929bd97?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21) which is a terrific and short introduction to antimonopoly's history and law. His new book manages to be realistic about where we are, but optimistic about how we can fix things.In [this book](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/70321cef?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21), Wu wants to know what happened to the promise that the Internet would make everyone rich. That may sound vaguely ridiculous as a promise now, but through the '90s and the early 2010s there was a broad optimism that the arrival of this marvelous new technology was certain to spread democracy, culture, and everything else. When I worked for Howard Dean's campaign in 2003 as his Director of Online Organizing I was swept up in this vision, the internet as decentralizing power. Unfortunately, that isn't what happened. What happened, Wu argues in his book, was a mixture of naivete and fundamental misunderstanding of economic power centered in platforms. As a society we focused on the flourishing of online activities and the rise of social media while neglecting the growth of monopoly and the return of industrial models of scale. Wu's book argues that we built platforms, but the wrong kind- we need platforms of course, but making them essential and extractive at the same time is a real problem. That is key to anchor the second half of the book, which is devoted, in effect, to an antimonopoly vision of the state. It responds to a need we have for some vision of a state that is neither brutal capitalism nor a command economy.Brutal, unrestrained capitalism is intrinsically fragile, a point on which Wu agrees with figures like Karl Marx. In the manic stage, it convinces us that all of our problems will be solved, until the crashes come, and in the chaos and suffering the strongman rises, promising to whip everything into shape. We've obviously been going through this cycle ourselves.Wu's answer is "an architecture of equality" a decentralization of economic power and a balanced economy. He takes the project of separation of powers as unfinished, given its failure to handle economic power. This book is good, it is deep, and you will learn a lot from it. You can [order the book here!](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/43c53a1c?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21) And I've talked to Tim about doing some writing for this newsletter--look out for his words, coming soon. Zephyr PS: Speaking of books, I reviewed two great books about consumerism and more in the [New York Review of Books in this month's issue](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/452ff9cd?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21). [Support this newsletter](https://the-antimonopolist.ghost.io/r/35783ac3?m=46b412a0-1cbe-4fcb-b85d-2477ce9f4e21) if you can. It just pays the hosting fees. More old time photos from the 2014 campaign trail

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: I lost my voice, but we’re not losing momentum
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gOhrShD1yTLC0YekNKxa4EtOHA384KrpKKSZo8S2WC6as5M_Moh4ELTPq9tu9LMClvfOFfaARhhEVcQuW2cHqxuguZce8tw1baMN5iwb3RY0e-GvyzOA2urhkt9ACUopmPH0XCqEelLqd_D_taf3wwERnL45gROsTrHyxUEixRjuUfmmauVp3y145qq1ikWTfyS5mQqKjKEZoiXmDdhX1OF4cC-r8GU1&c=eDqaG5pmzPbAtzJydDl9540vK22Wh0F2CcAaTy5r4hbdVf1fdTRfzQ==&ch=GXKhvlSFDnzEyRHDip3tq33nxhtSQiRSasMYgPOlBoOrcFXLuAR_xA==)
---
|
Peter,
It's Bushra. I'm writing this between swigs of DayQuil and salt gargling -- because I finally hit a wall. After a whirlwind week of interviews, community gatherings, and a packed candidate town hall, I completely lost my voice.
This campaign has already hosted over 190 meet & greets, attended multiple forums, and spent countless nights crisscrossing the 9th District, because I believe something simple and deeply powerful:
Politics should be personal. Candidates should look people in the eye. We should earn trust one conversation at a time. And we should never forget who we're fighting for.
That's the kind of leader I want to be. That's the movement we're building.
But today... I can't talk. Literally. My voice is gone, and my team has banned me from making calls until I recover. So instead of dialing supporters, I'm writing this message and hoping it still reaches you, even if I can't say it out loud.
We can't afford to lose a day of momentum -- not in a race this important, not when our grassroots campaign is proving we can win. So I'm asking sincerely:
[Will you step up for me today and make a contribution to help fill the gap while I rest? Any amount, $25, $10, or even $5, truly makes a difference.](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gOhrShD1yTLC0YekNKxa4EtOHA384KrpKKSZo8S2WC6as5M_Moh4ELTPq9tu9LMC6kbGJ2OHqVk7OvZtnE3yK-0R-76S_1AghSpf8iqv_vl9AmgxO7QYheeLOqyo2m3jYFRV_6u3UtvNRpWQmPVFq286PEQ4JMowgcxMEzi_bEniRhQvKUTrprSqlX2GY2HGHjqOxZSSkshRKCx_wIro5DGlajCRGa7gcjf5CRQLJAE=&c=eDqaG5pmzPbAtzJydDl9540vK22Wh0F2CcAaTy5r4hbdVf1fdTRfzQ==&ch=GXKhvlSFDnzEyRHDip3tq33nxhtSQiRSasMYgPOlBoOrcFXLuAR_xA==)
---
| [Donate](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gOhrShD1yTLC0YekNKxa4EtOHA384KrpKKSZo8S2WC6as5M_Moh4ELTPq9tu9LMClvfOFfaARhhEVcQuW2cHqxuguZce8tw1baMN5iwb3RY0e-GvyzOA2urhkt9ACUopmPH0XCqEelLqd_D_taf3wwERnL45gROsTrHyxUEixRjuUfmmauVp3y145qq1ikWTfyS5mQqKjKGOX-lzFbGiCVkpr_8RnUVt&c=eDqaG5pmzPbAtzJydDl9540vK22Wh0F2CcAaTy5r4hbdVf1fdTRfzQ==&ch=GXKhvlSFDnzEyRHDip3tq33nxhtSQiRSasMYgPOlBoOrcFXLuAR_xA==)
---
I'll be back out there soon, meeting as many neighbors as I can and continuing to build a winning coalition the only way I know how: through genuine human connection.
Thank you for believing in us, caring about this campaign, and giving me the space to recover. Your support means more than you know.
With gratitude (and lots of tea),
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gOhrShD1yTLC0YekNKxa4EtOHA384KrpKKSZo8S2WC6as5M_Moh4ELTPq9tu9LMClvfOFfaARhhEVcQuW2cHqxuguZce8tw1baMN5iwb3RY0e-GvyzOA2urhkt9ACUopmPH0XCqEelLqd_D_taf3wwERnL45gROsTrHyxUEixRjuUfmmauVp3y145qq1ikWTfyS5mQqKjKET5jmf3J11a_fbk6d9ZA0a&c=eDqaG5pmzPbAtzJydDl9540vK22Wh0F2CcAaTy5r4hbdVf1fdTRfzQ==&ch=GXKhvlSFDnzEyRHDip3tq33nxhtSQiRSasMYgPOlBoOrcFXLuAR_xA==)
---
Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I think you missed my letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
After our royal shellacking on November 4th, I sent out an email with a survey attached, but only a few opened it, much less filled it out.

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, One takeaway that I've been consistently seeing in the aftermath of the election losses on November 4th is that the media - left, right, and center- think we (The GOP) are rudderless; that we don't stand for anything and don't have a plan to govern. I sent you a survey immediately after our election night losses to help me better understand how we can retain your vote and support in Congress, but I didn't hear back. **_I 'm resending the survey because it's of extreme importance not only to me, but also to the future success of our conservative movement. _** I really need you to fill it out without skipping over any questions. _**_Can you do this as a personal favor to me?

_**_[_**_< <COMPLETE MY NOVEMBER SURVEY>>_**_](https://trk.email.tedcruz._a7SyNkqUGSA)**_ _** With Gratitude,Ted Cruz
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | PO Box 25400
Houston, TX 77265

name: Matt Van Epps
subject: You probably don’t know me yet. That's okay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
| | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=998ce8f90d9940ee8c68c162b90f4cd7&_e=TPU0ecOHCYcE4W_gmHRl2yAAWZ0SWuUr7H1Zp4sCrjft0YaA0kj8acC3URwInq7suWaaFF3VYRAZUS7toCss56uzk8aXrcF5OqrHaI28QUaCv5cnEM2GR8YhIFj1FkAafgu2QlQquOzFzxKDKuqugiLTSqfgkFJHWAsIO1BpTrW01WSUN9tnMZMs0ry-EUess3kSyv6ZzqLaoaJT5gNUhXiJXF3HOlXhX1lkiyTeJbAmke54rRlRe85bIiBBTYf2yuc3UJKthIHVhBXw5FbS0VAezzEG2o_plhV8-VgqEX-01md30VoWFk14QdHkI-ujm4Q121rdSDJ3vEVIPoZa6l2Sn-y2GwG0hbSuoc08aG6NZ4_Wvby3H9k7QaahxuS9N2r3WUT3BqBrKY0ohf4UVhAPHKS-kPutldgOuU0tolbOPWqVeWFyk5bvvD8pnTDwQUhObTnBHdapjexOgDZXgTvPwVIWvdIjh6cuBeSWztin67etr6OErIsAHwSFOh4SGY2zqQfEyrIOgqrPLfuFEQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Hey,, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=998ce8f90d9940ee8c68c162b90f4cd7&_e=TPU0ecOHCYcE4W_gmHRl2yAAWZ0SWuUr7H1Zp4sCrjft0YaA0kj8acC3URwInq7suWaaFF3VYRAZUS7toCss56uzk8aXrcF5OqrHaI28QUaCv5cnEM2GR8YhIFj1FkAafgu2QlQquOzFzxKDKuquglTQZXr7qwPtPk2iANgxsyI-YxYcjouYJltnCwRpPfOzcUSmTFZaj8ZPeegmNwY8C64U1N9c2IFkcsxwFlt09Pd2q0aVJlOaLbtj6JVfx1TFVoCaKGtc25j4YLCBYJmOfrL2dGQXpVpymq6EtjAowNUm3-GD3Jm7RmWji5jhVmSW4gJTwZinGTpB5WIxdpKQcLUb7wq-LC3e-QZt-dWmOz4zUrh0QYGfEslWmrVz7XFW8S8uow51zR2P1wXODyppe8BK-Usdm2kMwn-h91mChoC0XHH_KLW4Go6JSsr3c1C18rR4gsla7zbNZc2iE9KBf-EmSIHES7F-RujcKuAcMkDOrqQywWibt342N283MPPQcDkRRPOeqqAPFba4m5gO_A%3D%3D)**
|
---
[PITCH IN ASAP](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=998ce8f90d9940ee8c68c162b90f4cd7&_e=TPU0ecOHCYcE4W_gmHRl2yAAWZ0SWuUr7H1Zp4sCrjft0YaA0kj8acC3URwInq7suWaaFF3VYRAZUS7toCss56uzk8aXrcF5OqrHaI28QUaCv5cnEM2GR8YhIFj1FkAafgu2QlQquOzFzxKDKuqugr34aVrZS2WzDBjBtQqg6BoLbhxXi9bnjCPqTMvbc9dwzg0pO0cwXh5PxDvD3RXKZSQa61Kwfm-xe3me8sgwjeAhvn5q7KG_2bvqPLbkiO1VNTSWvl3sTdHfhaHJPglnxfCeiD5v0wrph7ywBxlONGSLODHWueZCRrDO81hyRaPKwFNEblgf3pLF2KyucQ3l46G6lDeexwBp5DjjuEogMYwiZaP38hLF6bwgTNsZukvEL2Uk6dlHwzkSVz1BF6do9-PAlxyQ08D0JmzdzB3LbiLzYNybSPdq6SRCZrgCNRO2GxAu2CoUkO9Di02twJvvAXxtHD1w1GsOXuevY38g41008uw8EvCRvUGumda8HINiKkISw889sKxZugaobiaWGw%3D%3D)
|

The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=998ce8f90d9940ee8c68c162b90f4cd7&_e=TPU0ecOHCYcE4W_gmHRl2yAAWZ0SWuUr7H1Zp4sCrjft0YaA0kj8acC3URwInq7suWaaFF3VYRAZUS7toCss56uzk8aXrcF5OqrHaI28QUaCv5cnEM2GR8YhIFj1FkAafgu2QlQquOzFzxKDKuqughQyVhuX8-0zKpPN-QnSahe9cGEsMEKPhwfiP6mynyDlxcIkynBltbtXBe36g0koc-Pj-NKpOJeCEoBjBCtOkghdpYmSZzQYPzJeMRJ4XZ_5yHdu4X0bhAGRWP9iPaQary9nBtme1C_sk0dBUBXmamiYL0P8KCj2yOnoZuMCVouPkig2JuW_CP_4SvnW29q4pgcOXj26LlEtkZW6dqM_ptiwZ4A92VPm6hAzXxNdcC_4Mr45rkga5On3N9XKkKTj__1bX4Bsm6YE8q4BmUx0rcEBlM7sp--bc0UC288Dr2aR5fuMtmgt94pP__mXKYvKQ2mtdrTMv0EiUJ9tQbWRLmR0e9e-3bXw2Pf_zRdnPH1LOhd_tB6cgf6ggJAdh5_1OA%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps

clean_body: | | | | | Hey,, Matt Van Epps here. You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay. What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:Night Stalkers Don’t Quit. We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks. What I learned was this: true leadership emerges in the heat of battle. Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – no matter the odds. Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance. On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast. | | The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside Jasmine Crockett , was previously endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement. She's already being called "the AOC of Tennessee " and is gunning to be the newest member of "The Squad." No thank you. I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government. President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.” I’m running to prove him right. Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. This race, right now, is the firewall.And it's the only game in town. Night Stalkers Don’t Quit. But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time. Thank you for your commitment. Sincerely, Matt Van Epps | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress | Use of Matt Van Epps’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of War. I have incredible news. We won.
Late yesterday, a panel of three federal judges officially BLOCKED Donald Trump and Greg Abbott’s illegal, racist attempt to redraw our congressional districts.
The court ruled that there was "substantial evidence" that Texas Republicans didn't just draw these maps for politics—they racially gerrymandered them to silence our voice.
This victory belongs to YOU. Your signatures, your advocacy, and your donations [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em] helped fund the legal fight that made this possible.
But we cannot rest. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has already announced he is appealing this decision directly to the U.S. Supreme Court.
We won the battle, but the war for our democracy is heading to the highest court in the land. We need to be ready.
Please, chip in $25 or $50 right now to continue the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Attacks on young voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
TPM: Inside the GOP’s Assault on Youth Voting Rights [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111925_1&amount=25]
Team, we'll be blunt: The lies about a “ stolen ” 2020 election are still being used to justify “ election integrity ” efforts that are stripping Americans, particularly certain vulnerable populations, of their fundamental democratic rights.
We've seen this in the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), it is part of the ongoing hyper-partisan redistricting efforts across the country, but the least visible front is the widespread assault on youth voting rights.
New “ voter integrity ” laws have hit college-age voters particularly hard across the country, but especially in states like North Carolina, Indiana, and Ohio. Cleta Mitchell, a lawyer, fundraiser, and Trump ally, has gone state to state, spreading the lies about the 2020 presidential election and calling for banning voting on college campuses, rolling back same-day voter registration, and ending the practice in some states of automatically mailing ballots to registered voters.
These are all attacks on youth voting. It's clear that opponents of voting rights see suppressing the youth vote as a key pillar in their attempts to hold onto power in perpetuity.
We need to spread the word and protect our fundamental right to vote regardless of age, but the corporate media isn't paying attention. Will you pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us spread the word and fight back against these suppressive laws? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111925_1&amount=35]
Youth voting rights were part of the post-WWII expansion of voter inclusion and were realized through the 1971 passage of the 26th Amendment, which lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 and banned discrimination based on age in ballot access.
Even President Richard Nixon declared that “ America’s new voters, America’s young generation ” would bring “ moral courage ” and “ a spirit of high idealism ” to the country. It seems vengeful partisans in his party would rather win elections than uphold the ideals of our democracy.
These new state laws restrict basic election modernization tools that a new generation of voters expects, such as online voter registration or curing — essentially correcting minor errors — on vote-by-mail ballots. These bills ban polling places on college campuses and prevent voters from using their student I.D. — with their picture on it — as proof of identity. And some states are even considering physical residency time requirements, which would suppress college students who live both at school and at home with their parents.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to suppress their way to victory until we make them stop. Support our efforts to protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=111925_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

body:
| | | **$5**.

That is the contribution I'm asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia and the DSCC.

**$5** to fight back against the never-ending onslaught of attack ads from right-wing, billionaire-funded Super PACs.

**$5** to build out a massive organizing and mobilization effort that will reach every Georgian all across the state.

**$5** because this will be one of the closest and most expensive elections anywhere, and it will take all of us working together to win it.

You might think that a single $5 contribution can't make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.

But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.

[**_Please use this link to split a $5 contribution between my reelection campaign and the DSCC before our end-of-month deadlines. name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: California has everything but good government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
California has every natural advantage on earth — talent, innovation, resources, opportunity — yet government mismanagement has pushed our state into decline. I wrote a short letter explaining why I’m running and what must change. Please read it. name: Rep. Ilhan Omar
subject: Again: Abolish ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Almost every day we see a new viral video of ICE agents threatening people, hurting people, and terrorizing entire communities.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1963%2E791427%2EtZAnAN)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251119-1-180&t=2&akid=1963%2E791427%2EtZAnAN)
Friend — Almost every day, we see a new viral video of ICE agents threatening people, hurting people, and terrorizing communities.
We’ve seen ICE pepper-spray babies, disappear US citizens, slam distraught mothers and fathers to the ground, rough up elderly folks, ram people in traffic, smash windows, point loaded guns at bystanders, handcuff little kids, shoot people in the head with rubber bullets, and even shoot to kill.
And they do it all wearing masks, with the full authority of the federal government, and absolutely no accountability or repercussions for their violations of law, civil rights, and human rights.
**ICE is out of control and should be abolished.**
Donald Trump has turned immigration enforcement into the kind of secret police we see in other far-right authoritarian societies. The Republican Party’s constant dehumanizing rhetoric — along with the MAGA Supreme Court’s ruling, which legalized racial profiling — has opened the floodgates of hatred and allowed for the violence we are seeing in our cities today.
And it should not be lost on us that as the Trump administration fires federal workers en masse and defunds critical federal programs, ICE now has more funding than most militaries in other countries. Your healthcare and food assistance, on the other hand, are on the chopping block.
That’s because mass deportation is this administration’s number one priority, and they don’t care how many people get hurt, terrorized, or even killed in the process. They don’t care about civil rights, civil liberties, or the very idea of freedom from tyranny.
**ICE is out of control and should be abolished.**
America has been a country of immigrants for hundreds of years, even before its founding. I’m one of them. ICE was created in 2003, just two decades ago. We can build a smart, humane, and organized immigration system without a group of violent thugs behind it.
**[If you agree, please consider chipping in to my campaign today to help reelect one of the few members of Congress who understands the need to completely overhaul our immigration system and do away with ICE. I am not afraid to face down the far-right and their authoritarian agenda, but I need a grassroots team to have my back for the tough fights ahead.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251119-1-180&t=3&akid=1963%2E791427%2EtZAnAN)

| | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Today, we are more than halfway through the last quarter of the year, and frankly, our numbers aren't where they should be. Here's what I need you to know: The Lt. Gov. seat is **_not a guarantee_** in the next election. That's why every fundraising deadline is important, but especially our final one of the year. It's our last shot to close out strong. This race is going to be competitive, and with Republicans already getting organized to gain control, we cannot slow down. [**If you're all in, can you rush a $10 donation now, to make sure I can keep fighting for the Commonwealth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119577896/583551763/-92396084?amount=10&source=AD_EM_FR_111825_B1_Guarantee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYxMWMwMy02NWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgXkdN_qRBU9g9YeMa-w7QTACuo_jMyFAlNKEHM329E=) | | **[RUSH $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119577899/583551765/950170653?amount=10&source=AD_EM_FR_111825_B1_Guarantee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYxMWMwMy02NWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgXkdN_qRBU9g9YeMa-w7QTACuo_jMyFAlNKEHM329E=)**
---
**In 2026, Pennsylvania will be the most important battleground state in the country.** In the last election, we saw dark money funneled into this race from Republicans trying to put any Trump-appeasing person they could find in power. **_Despite that, we won._**
**We need to overcome the odds again.**
I've spent over a decade as a public servant for our great state. Every step of the way, I've fought for our families and neighbors. Trump and his cronies have proven that they only care about the interests of their millionaire donors and protecting their own power.
**_Pennsylvania deserves better._**
American democracy was born here in the Commonwealth, and that is something I will always fight to protect. But I need your support so my team and I can keep up the fight. [**Can you chip in $10 now to help my team and me get back on track?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119577900/583551768/-92396084?amount=10&source=AD_EM_FR_111825_B1_Guarantee&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWYxMWMwMy02NWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgXkdN_qRBU9g9YeMa-w7QTACuo_jMyFAlNKEHM329E=)

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s Austin Davis. Today, we are more than halfway through the last quarter of the year, and frankly, our numbers aren't where they should be. Here's what I need you to know: The Lt. Gov. seat is not a guarantee in the next election. That's why every fundraising deadline is important, but especially our final one of the year. It's our last shot to close out strong. This race is going to be competitive, and with Republicans already getting organized to gain control, we cannot slow down. = | | = In 2026, Pennsylvania will be the most important battleground state in the country. In the last election, we saw dark money funneled into this race from Republicans trying to put any Trump-appeasing person they could find in power. Despite that, we won. We need to overcome the odds again. I've spent over a decade as a public servant for our great state. Every step of the way, I've fought for our families and neighbors. Trump and his cronies have proven that they only care about the interests of their millionaire donors and protecting their own power. Pennsylvania deserves better. American democracy was born here in the Commonwealth, and that is something I will always fight to protect. But I need your support so my team and I can keep up the fight. = **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** Thank you, Peter! —Austin Davis | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Why are we paying twice for utilities?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2?contactdata=DRW5HDi5ZnEVmZ8to95ItKJFnF6EA/irBbxjSSOh01CVlljhc2M04PuDQfSqh3DlbnglU7Nr9aunMAFdI0fVcfiKq68QL9D3CEXwm4aH/I+JKI3Jc6+zM7hQuhCbxht3 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2?contactdata=DRW5HDi5ZnEVmZ8to95ItKJFnF6EA/irBbxjSSOh01CVlljhc2M04PuDQfSqh3DlbnglU7Nr9aunMAFdI0fVcfiKq68QL9D3CEXwm4aH/I+JKI3Jc6+zM7hQuhCbxht3]
Hi Peter,
Halloween may be over, but there’s at least one more scare ahead this season. For customers of for-profit utility NW Natural Gas, the bill at the end of this month will be higher. The methane gas monopoly raised rates again in November, this time by 5.4%. NW Natural will see about $1 million in profit from this latest rate hike. People stuck on the gas system are now paying 50% more on their bills than five years ago. Will you send your legislators an email now, urging them to take action for us? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2]
Take action [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2?contactdata=DRW5HDi5ZnEVmZ8to95ItKJFnF6EA/irBbxjSSOh01CVlljhc2M04PuDQfSqh3DlbnglU7Nr9aunMAFdI0fVcfiKq68QL9D3CEXwm4aH/I+JKI3Jc6+zM7hQuhCbxht3]
Just because we call methane “natural” gas doesn’t mean it’s safe. Methane gas poses great impacts on our health and environment. So, even if you're fortunate enough to be gas-free at home, methane is adding smog to our neighborhoods and making the climate crisis worse.
We simply can’t afford methane “natural” gas anymore, especially when heating, hot water, and cooking with clean electricity is more affordable and healthier than fossil fuels. Why are we paying two utility bills when we could cut it down to one?
Elected officials in Oregon say they want to help us make our lives more affordable and protect us from climate pollution. Tell them they must do more to help every one of us make a transition to clean, healthy, affordable electric appliances in our homes and buildings. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2]
With the cold weather and the holidays right around the corner, we’re turning on the heat and cooking all our traditional meals. For those of us stuck with a gas-burning furnace or gas stove, this time of year just got even more expensive thanks to the recent NW Natural rate hike.
Now you’re paying more to use an energy source that harms your health, is less energy efficient, and releases more greenhouse gases into the air, impacting our ever-worsening climate. It’s time we take action and let our legislators know they need to do more as we transition from methane to clean energy. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2]
Take action [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2?contactdata=DRW5HDi5ZnEVmZ8to95ItKJFnF6EA/irBbxjSSOh01CVlljhc2M04PuDQfSqh3DlbnglU7Nr9aunMAFdI0fVcfiKq68QL9D3CEXwm4aH/I+JKI3Jc6+zM7hQuhCbxht3]
If you’re still using methane at home, there are a variety of solutions to fit your situation for a healthier and more affordable home. This, however, does not excuse our lawmakers from ensuring that our communities are moving to clean energy and lowering our utility bills.
And whether or not you are reliant on affordable clean energy at home, methane still affects our health, increasing healthcare costs, and harms our environment leading to more climate disasters — until we make the transition.
“Natural” gas doesn’t serve us, and your legislators need to hear that from you. Will you take action for lower utility bills and a healthier climate by sending an email to your legislator on the impacts of methane? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jsnW5pUZC06giWNNkm-qbA2]
Keep yourself safe this holiday season,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2ft8coth5ddeimgv1ubfdvtrq4vmtbtvfn59fo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgeeo70cdh2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziai2apc3ntnnb99tu3merd3en3j9vagbbo0f978_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgeeo70cdh2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zep4lm8orj1fap1dqn7g2o6d7u0f6fsv12ceooko_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clgeeo70cdh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **The Turning Point USA Team**

name: NDRC Breaking News
subject: Texas’s map declared a racial gerrymander in federal court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This marks a critical step in the fight against mid-decade gerrymanders — but the fight continues.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119578344/583553173/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4OGQ0ZWE5LTY1YzUtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iP_gQXgvrHuJ3qRCKb8feG2VLGINR9hhTwZJHpj1Lik=&emci=ae0fba22-5dc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=188d4ea9-65c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Yesterday afternoon, a U.S. district court blocked Texas’s racially gerrymandered map from being used in the 2026 midterms. Attorney General Eric Holder summed up what this means for our work: “This is a major victory for Texans, particularly Texans of color, and it marks another critical step in the fight against mid-decade gerrymanders enacted at the direction of the White House. Thanks to the bravery and determination of the voters fighting for fair representation in this case, Texas won’t have a double-gerrymandered congressional map.” This fight is far from over, as the state of Texas has appealed this decision, and we know more states are planning to redraw their maps to give Republicans an unearned advantage in next year’s midterm elections. But this ruling should send a signal to any Republicans currently considering their own gerrymander: **You will face intense resistance from your constituents and in the courts.** As A.G. Holder put it: “The pursuit of illegal and immoral gerrymanders will not go unchallenged, and the American people will continue to fight for equal representation and their fundamental right to vote.” **Fairness won yesterday, but we need to be prepared for what comes next — especially as we know map manipulators are already plotting to steal more congressional seats in states across the country.** [**Help the NDRC fight back wherever Trump and the GOP attempt to steal congressional seats next. Your support enables us to end this redistricting crisis and ensure fairness prevails in our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119578345/583553174/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TexasMapDecisionRR_email_20251119-NDRC-Tier1-TexasMapDecisionRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251119-NDRC-Tier1-TexasMapDecisionRR_&utm_campaign=TexasMapDecisionRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4OGQ0ZWE5LTY1YzUtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iP_gQXgvrHuJ3qRCKb8feG2VLGINR9hhTwZJHpj1Lik=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---

GOP Rep. Chip Roy fired back at Democrat Rep. Hakeem Jeffries for undeniable hypocrisy over his defense of Epstein-linked Democrat Stacey Plaskett after relentless condemnation of President Donald Trump for his former connection to the dead pedophile.
**[This was brutal...](https://substack.com/redirect/6dbff60e-3485-47dc-b2a6-1357bff82f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6dbff60e-3485-47dc-b2a6-1357bff82f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6dbff60e-3485-47dc-b2a6-1357bff82f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Plaskett censure fails amid GOP allegations of backroom deal:** A House effort to censure Democratic Del. Stacey Plaskett over her text exchanges with Jeffrey Epstein during a 2019 congressional hearing failed on a 209-214 vote, with three Republicans joining Democrats in opposition and three voting "present," sparking accusations from Republican lawmakers that GOP leadership cut a secret deal with Democrats to protect one of their own.
* **Republicans claim deal protected GOP Rep. Cory Mills:** Several staunch House conservatives alleged their party struck a secret agreement with Democrats to spare Plaskett from formal reprimand in exchange for Democrats dropping a retaliatory censure measure against Florida Republican Rep. Cory Mills, who has faced controversies during his time in Congress, with Democrats abandoning their resolution against Mills after the Plaskett censure failed.
* **GOP members attempt to expose corruption cover-up:** Florida Rep. Anna Paulina Luna tried to raise a question on the House floor asking Speaker Mike Johnson to explain "why leadership on both sides, both Democrat and Republican, are cutting back end deals to cover up public corruption," while other Republicans including Rep. Kat Cammack denounced the alleged "backroom deal sh*t" as "swampy" and "wrong," though none offered evidence of an actual agreement.

* * *
# **Jamie Raskin defends Democrat colleagues ' Epstein texting as constituent contact**
Rep. Jamie Raskin was **[ridiculed as"dishonest" and "sick"](https://substack.com/redirect/24e32831-c3a8-4a38-981b-f398c6724f95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after defending Rep. Stacey Plaskett from the House floor, arguing she was only "taking a phone call from her constituent" when caught texting Jeffrey Epstein during a 2019 House hearing where Michael Cohen was testifying about Trump, with the White House Rapid Response team calling his comments "SICK" and saying "one of the worst to ever disgrace the halls of Congress" was defending someone who "colluded with a convicted sex offender."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/da06c81d-1dec-47d8-a4e2-8a9c99aa1ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **GOP introduces censure resolution over Epstein coordination:** Republicans led by Rep. Ralph Norman introduced a resolution Tuesday to censure Plaskett for "inappropriate coordination with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein," arguing it "reflects discreditably on the House of Representatives," though the resolution to censure Plaskett and strip her of duties ultimately failed in a House vote Tuesday night.
* **Journalist reveals deeper Plaskett-Epstein ties:** Independent journalist Lee Fang called Raskin's defense "incredibly dishonest," revealing court filings showed Plaskett helped Epstein with tax credits while serving in Virgin Islands government, went on to work for Epstein's fixer, received "lavish campaign support" from Epstein and his aides, and previously worked for the Virgin Islands Economic Development Authority that granted Epstein "hundreds of millions in alleged improperly obtained tax exemptions over the course of two decades."
* **Plaskett claims no knowledge of federal investigation:** Defending herself on the House floor, Plaskett argued "there was not public knowledge at that time that he was under federal investigation" when she received texts from Epstein, who was her constituent, dismissing suggestions she was taking advice from him by stating "I have been a lawyer for 30 years" and don't "need to get advice on how to question anybody from any individual."

* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/d5689caa-5959-4c70-9272-31a5fd00c338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Doctor Makes Shocking Claim About Trump's Brain
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d5689caa-5959-4c70-9272-31a5fd00c338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A famous doctor has made **[a shocking claim about President Trump's brain:](https://substack.com/redirect/d5689caa-5959-4c70-9272-31a5fd00c338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"He bears all the hallmarks of being on controversial 'ACE-5' serum..."
"Super intelligence, iron-clad memory, age reversal, and unlimited energy."
**[>>See the full evidence here<<](https://substack.com/redirect/d5689caa-5959-4c70-9272-31a5fd00c338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
P.S. ACE-5 is said to be like testosterone, but for your brain. That's because it's now doing the impossible: "Reverse aging" human brains. **[Get every detail you need here.](https://substack.com/redirect/d5689caa-5959-4c70-9272-31a5fd00c338?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# **Chaos erupts in Dearborn Michigan as activists clash with Muslim residents in the streets**
Jake Lang, a Jan. 6 Capitol riot participant, **[clashed with counter-protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/869b22f7-c535-464d-b0d9-8a6fbeb9ccb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday in Dearborn, Michigan--home to one of the largest Muslim populations in the U.S.--when he attempted to burn a Quran before counter-protesters knocked the lighter from his hands, with Lang later slapping the Quran with bacon before a counter-protester grabbed the book and took off with it.
**[Watch the chaos on X from independent reporters on the ground:](https://substack.com/redirect/4e2e4f9a-13b5-4016-b279-d882b9f5f816?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e2e4f9a-13b5-4016-b279-d882b9f5f816?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Heavy police presence maintains order, one arrest:** Police maintained a perimeter on sidewalks and along Michigan Avenue, intervening briefly when the clash escalated following Lang's attempted burning, with one person arrested at City Hall ahead of the City Council meeting and no injuries reported, while Michigan Democratic Party chair Curtis Hertel condemned the "unacceptable act of hate."

* * *
# **White House press secretary pushes Senate GOP to scrap filibuster**
White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt heightened pressure on Senate Republicans to **[eliminate the 60-vote threshold](https://substack.com/redirect/2fd31a3d-34f0-4744-a300-5845b17ce036?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** needed for most legislation when speaking on the "Pod Force One" podcast Wednesday. Leavitt claimed abolishing the filibuster would enable swift action on voter ID requirements and restricting mail-in ballots while maximizing Trump's remaining time in office.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8cf1fc31-f77d-4f63-ab78-fda72e4e98b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Direct Challenge to Leadership:** Leavitt urged Republicans to "get off their butts and move" despite Senate Majority Leader John Thune's January vow to preserve the filibuster as the Founders intended for deliberative lawmaking. The 63-year-old GOP leader has defended the rule as protecting Americans from hasty legislation, though neither party has commanded the necessary 60-seat supermajority since Democrats briefly held it under President Obama in 2009-2010.

* **Shutdown as Catalyst:** Leavitt previously warned that Democrats would abolish the rule themselves if returned to power, citing potential plans to pack the Supreme Court and grant statehood to Puerto Rico and Washington D.C.
* **Bipartisan Resistance Remains:** House Speaker Mike Johnson defended the filibuster even during shutdown negotiations as vital protection for whichever party holds minority status, warning Republicans wouldn't appreciate Democrats banning firearms or expanding the high court without such safeguards. The procedural tool already doesn't apply to judicial confirmations after Democrats eliminated it for lower courts in 2013 and Republicans extended that to Supreme Court justices in 2017.

* * *
# **Trump administration negotiates 28-point framework with Moscow to end Ukraine war**
The White House has been conducting confidential discussions with Russian officials on a comprehensive **[peace proposal](https://substack.com/redirect/f76124a6-3215-456d-83bb-990c9820fdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/f76124a6-3215-456d-83bb-990c9820fdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for ending Moscow's nearly three-year military campaign in Ukraine, modeled after President Trump's Middle East ceasefire plan and addressing battlefield resolution plus long-term security arrangements.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f76124a6-3215-456d-83bb-990c9820fdfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Russian Satisfaction:** Kirill Dmitriev, Russia's sovereign wealth fund chief handling expanded Kremlin diplomatic duties, said Moscow feels its position is genuinely heard after spending three days meeting Trump envoy Steve Witkoff and other officials in Miami last month.
* **Ukrainian Awareness:** Kyiv confirmed Witkoff discussed the framework with national security adviser Rustem Umerov, while President Zelensky met Turkey's leader Wednesday acknowledging "positions and signals from the United States" regarding peace efforts.
* **Deadly Strikes Continue:** Russian drones and missiles hit two apartment buildings in western Ukraine's Ternopil overnight, killing at least 20 civilians including two children and wounding 66 others as diplomatic negotiations proceed behind closed doors.

* * *
# **Bipartisan bill aims to make first-time home buying affordable again**
Republican Rep. Mike Flood of Nebraska and Democratic Rep. Emanuel Cleaver of Missouri are collaborating on legislation to overhaul a federal housing grant program, aiming to **[make homeownership more accessible](https://substack.com/redirect/d089f44b-1723-4029-8565-d8e559e560a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as Americans face record-high barriers to purchasing their first property.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d089f44b-1723-4029-8565-d8e559e560a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Infrastructure Cost Shift:** The bill would redirect HOME Investments Partnership Program funds to cover city infrastructure expenses like sewer systems, paved streets and stormwater management instead of forcing developers to absorb those costs. Flood estimates this could reduce lot prices from $50,000 to $20,000 and lower overall home costs by $30,000, making the difference between a $300,000 and $270,000 purchase.
* **Single-Family Focus Expansion:** The proposal shifts emphasis away from multifamily apartment construction toward single-family homes while expanding income eligibility from 80% to 100% of county median income. This change would allow more moderate-income communities with desirable amenities to participate in the affordable housing program.
* **Crisis Metrics:** The National Association of Realtors reports the median first-time homebuyer age has reached a record 40 years old, with first-time purchases comprising just 21% of sales this year--the lowest share since 1981. Flood credited President Trump with elevating housing affordability as a top administration priority during the summer.

* * *

name: Tim Walz
subject: Fighting back against this BS
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
[](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251119.MJxdjt&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-128&t=1&akid=128%2E34582%2EYIQ7kU)
Peter,
President Trump has just put into action his plan to dismantle the Department of Education.
As a teacher, this is personal for me. Everyone knows the road to the American dream starts with a good education.
Our students who need the most help will be worse off as a result of this reckless decision — and it will come at the expense of our whole country.
**Americans are sick and tired of these attacks on our schools. They want their kids to be able to receive a high education, regardless of their ability or their zip code. But the Trump administration is working to make that impossible.**
I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against this BS. Minnesota has some of the best schools in the nation, and I’m sure as hell not going to let Donald Trump change that.
**[Peter, will you chip in right now to fight back against Donald Trump as he tries to tear down the Department of Education?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251119.MJxdjt&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-128&t=2&akid=128%2E34582%2EYIQ7kU)**

I’m grateful,
Tim Walz

clean_body: Peter, President Trump has just put into action his plan to dismantle the Department of Education. As a teacher, this is personal for me. Everyone knows the road to the American dream starts with a good education. Our students who need the most help will be worse off as a result of this reckless decision — and it will come at the expense of our whole country. Americans are sick and tired of these attacks on our schools. They want their kids to be able to receive a high education, regardless of their ability or their zip code. But the Trump administration is working to make that impossible. I’m going to do everything in my power to fight back against this BS. Minnesota has some of the best schools in the nation, and I’m sure as hell not going to let Donald Trump change that. I’m grateful, Tim Walz Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Before the 11/21 deadline…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy..._
---
_...The worst thing they did was**DISBAR** me._
---
As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.
---
_You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution._
---
Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I _did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold.
---
**_And the Left has STOLEN that from me._**
---
__Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare.__
---
**Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good!**
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, the President _cannot_ save me with a _federal_ pardon...
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options.**
---
**_BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END!_**
---
_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust._YOU_ truly are my final hope._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund before the 11/21 TRIAL DEADLINE so that I can keep fighting to ensure my TRIAL IS DROPPED.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=940cb9329c534e3e84abda1f1e9e1000&_e=useE_s7dfrjqw-T-NzPuHoudL3OWrE70l03jdy_ibuhROzBg9vKM_erYW-vWe_gLRl3-Ll-9_ssjUfOXiY7GqKaMRyx3mnobTUfLamon0kcbnFVQKNldMytbbGG7XnwjGXG4H95mL89PgG2LaLt4s3-SNGna3ZRmpemsCxwon8np4eiE5vhOqVYlFRtAB20aPl6iKjf9SECG7oZsU21WYfoB5Eckje7xvmpvteS0sbuNcipE_rXInKUy7oIFSUAYx7hG7Gz7Pv5k05iSsE20CfRyOWdFHmr5_vje8Dgm4aQKKcXsY66Leg0xhXL5JRlTupXwawfG_fTBU_rH-twXP7tTOYgx66kWqvZfXXnErw8swzZt8mn1gJUlUulh6iDWd3YmUIpCseG0LE6Mx2GUIkYcnNxCdEqQH1_m4nDrg563M3XkuwJTN0XJ6AiJIvWdqTXLmBbvqZi9pyoFa-DWz5kySO-2i0Fg_hsyh1SRAfOdn4-PPWI1lJk-SCj3beAn7NUktxIOThyokyuz-l2PE0i8F_xN9Bof0wFUoAvmhbQb5lEDaHNW7ezQJ1PhrTDOOm_eGis_d6TZo5Ae0y1MlZTS30TnHc_TcsvuEYNVigFHp1JAUbRdj0jmtWdPO0DE1JPnUEt_g1pYmaZBXbgptg%3D%3D)

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hey there, friend:

It’s no secret that the most insecure, thin-skinned man in the world is the one currently occupying the White House.

President Trump will come after you with the full force of the Department of Justice for criticizing him. If you dare to make a joke about him on air, he’ll work to get your show pulled. If you’re in a Blue state, he’ll pull life-saving medical funding from your state just because he feels like it. It’s an alarming reality to live in.

But the President isn’t invincible. In fact, it’s pretty simple how we fight back: our strength is in our numbers. When we come together, link arms, and stand strong together, we can hold the line and come out on top.

I’m proud to be in this fight alongside each and every one of you.

Thanks for your support.

subject: This should be illegal

body:
An AI-generated video impersonating Senator Jon Ossoff is circulating online.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119580429/583559696/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWU4Yzc5YS02OWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xk2N4ETA47Qx0aEBJKdB5d55jL8hfAHw8qncswDB2x0=&emci=d9df21ce-5cc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=65e8c79a-69c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)
---

| | You may have seen the recent news about a disturbing new political ad circulating online — an AI-generated video impersonating Senator Jon Ossoff. It was created by one of his opponents. **This is dangerous, irresponsible, and it threatens the integrity of our democracy.** AI tools are now powerful enough that bad actors can fabricate a candidate's face, voice, and words — _and most people won't immediately know the difference_. If we allow this kind of deception to become normal in our politics, we will lose the ability to trust what we see in our elections. This isn't about new technology. It's about protecting our democracy from manipulation, disinformation, and intimidation. It's about ensuring voters can make decisions based on truth, not fabrications engineered to mislead them. I've spent my career fighting for integrity in government, and I'm not going to let this become the new norm in American politics. We need stronger rules, tougher enforcement, and leaders willing to take this threat seriously. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: An AI-generated video impersonating Senator Jon Ossoff is circulating online. | | | | You may have seen the recent news about a disturbing new political ad circulating online — an AI-generated video impersonating Senator Jon Ossoff. It was created by one of his opponents. This is dangerous, irresponsible, and it threatens the integrity of our democracy. AI tools are now powerful enough that bad actors can fabricate a candidate's face, voice, and words — and most people won't immediately know the difference. If we allow this kind of deception to become normal in our politics, we will lose the ability to trust what we see in our elections. This isn't about new technology. It's about protecting our democracy from manipulation, disinformation, and intimidation. It's about ensuring voters can make decisions based on truth, not fabrications engineered to mislead them. I've spent my career fighting for integrity in government, and I'm not going to let this become the new norm in American politics. We need stronger rules, tougher enforcement, and leaders willing to take this threat seriously. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by .
