clean_body: I’m fighting until the final hour! | Dear Friend, The next few days may be the longest of my life. They will decide whether I live free or become a political prisoner. Friday, November 21 is the DEADLINE for the Democrat Attorney General of Arizona to decide whether the TRIAL OF MY LIFE proceeds or is thrown out once and for all. It will truly be the “trial of my life.” If I lose, I could be SENTENCED to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man. And because this is a state case, President Trump CANNOT save me with a federal pardon. But that didn’t stop the President from sending a POWERFUL and SYMBOLIC message to the Attorney General at the final hour. He granted me a pardon to show the Democrat Attorney General that the President of the United States and the Department of Justice recognize my innocence and stand beside me in the fight for my freedom. Now, I am humbly asking YOU to deliver a symbolic message at the final hour as well... ...I am asking you to sign THE PEOPLE’S PARDON of Rudy W. Giuliani to show just how many U.S. Citizens believe that this RIGGED trial must be thrown to the ash heap of history. With the November 21 Deadline fast approaching, I’m askingYOU to echo the President’s call for my freedom! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Emily Randall
subject: Emily's Notes: We deserve so much better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586722/583580669/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: **• Before I go on** – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586723/583580670/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **• My four amendments** – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and [offer four amendments](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586724/583580671/-803653937?v=zIzxYYr0PoA&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) to the “deal” passed by the Senate:

1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law.
2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law.
3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket.
4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • **Keeping everyone fed** — My team and I worked a shift at the [North Mason Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586725/583580672/138801785?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586726/583580673/138801785?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) I visited the [Multicultural Center in Tacoma](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586727/583580674/860361758?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442), spoke with the [Port Gamble S’Klallam Tribal Head Start Policy Council](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586728/583580675/-1662670146?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442), and held a [Resource Fair](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586729/583580676/599997710?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! **• We’ll do it live** – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I went on Instagram Live with my colleague, [Rep. Julie Johnson of Texas](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586730/583580677/-987138159?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442), and [our outstanding Attorney General, Nick Brown](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586731/583580678/1302349921?si=6uf5dfZWJAYnIS-X&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442). **• Bienvenida Adelita! **– After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in [Adelita Grijalva](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586732/583580679/-2104125169?hl=en&img_index=1&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442), who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119586733/583580680/-2104125169?hl=en&img_index=1&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.19_NovNewsletter_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIxMWNjZi03M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4f3IhUwbuwwDSAAg5O1fQcsLF7qqrCscPGL-PRADpHk=&emci=fb566b88-d5c3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3ab11ccf-73c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **Now is the part where I ask you for a donation.** I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. **During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors. _That’s the way it should be_ – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap.** [_**If you’re able, can you please chip in $25 or any amount to bolster our organizing efforts, or even start a monthly donation? clean_body: I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. | Peter, Welcome to the latest edition of Emily’s Notes — updates from Washington’s 6th and Washington, D.C.! Here’s what I’ve been up to: • Before I go on – I voted NO on the “deal” to reopen the government without stopping health insurance premiums from skyrocketing. We deserve a government that works for us, not against us. I’ll use every tool I can to lower health care costs. • My four amendments – Before the vote, I flew back to D.C. early to testify before the Rules Committee and to the “deal” passed by the Senate: 1\. Reverse cuts to Medicaid passed under the Big Ugly Law. 2\. Repeal cuts to SNAP passed under the Big Ugly Law. 3\. Extend tax ACA credits so premiums don’t skyrocket. 4\. Prohibit the mass firing of federal workers through 2029. House Republicans rejected all four. • Keeping everyone fed — My team and I worked a shift at the in Belfair. Just like the other food banks we’ve visited in recent weeks, they’re seeing more federal workers walk through their doors — people who have never had to ask for help before. I visited the , spoke with the , and held a in Bremerton for federal workers and military families affected by the shutdown. Across the 6th District, communities are mobilizing to feed their neighbors and help those in need. We deserve a government that works as hard as you do!!! • We’ll do it live – I used every channel I could to communicate the truth about the GOP shutdown and the avoidable health care crisis. I went on Instagram Live with my colleague, , and . • Bienvenida Adelita! – After stalling for 50 days, Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in , who immediately signed the discharge petition to release the Epstein files. (That story is developing quickly as I write this, so stay tuned.) Now is the part where I ask you for a donation. I hear you. The "deal" to reopen the government was awful. You deserve so much better from your leaders. That’s why Team Emily continues to work inside AND outside Congress. Last week, I endorsed three new Democratic candidates in competitive districts. I want to do everything I can to take back the House and bring a new generation of bold, tenacious leadership to Congress. We’re able to organize because of our powerhouse team of grassroots donors – and right now, we’re well behind our fundraising benchmarks. During the shutdown crisis, I’ve been talking to my neighbors, rather than calling donors. That’s the way it should be – but it also means we need our grassroots team to help close the gap. = = Thank you for reading 💙 I’ll never stop fighting for you. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Get your name on Katie’s whiteboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40439%2E3422442%2EalyX5l)
Peter,
It’s no secret that Katie Porter loves her whiteboard. You’ve probably seen the whiteboard in action, helping her grill CEOs and lobbyists at hearings.
**[Now, Katie wants you—the supporters who made that possible—to be part of the whiteboard’s story. Chip in today for a chance to get your name on Katie’s whiteboard!](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251119_1_ak.jdQn5G&refcode=em20251119-40439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40439%2E3422442%2EalyX5l)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251119_1_ak.jdQn5G&refcode=em20251119-40439&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40439%2E3422442%2EalyX5l)
For years, Katie has been using her whiteboard to hold special interests accountable and to stand up to corporate greed. Now, she’s running for Governor of California — and she’s bringing that same energy to this fight.
Since she doesn’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money, Katie and our campaign rely on supporters like you. That’s why we’re excited to have your names on the whiteboard in our campaign headquarters!

| | This most recent government shutdown was the longest in history. # Toyota CEO goes Full MAGA in support of billion dollar tariff deal
Toyota's billionaire CEO Akio Toyoda stunned spectators Sunday by **[donning a red MAGA hat and Trump-Vance T-shirt](https://substack.com/redirect/15169613-2ea5-47d7-991b-cf6f76ea7a46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at a high-octane NASCAR event in Japan, signaling an alliance amid trade tensions, just as the automaker announced a $912 million U.S. manufacturing boost to fuel hybrid production and add 252 jobs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40e13100-e1d1-4d6c-9fb2-86f192042066?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
www.instagram.com/usambjapan
* **Trade-savvy CEO diplomacy** : Toyoda has sidestepped tariff debates, advocating customer wins in U.S.-Japan talks, as baseline auto import duties hold at 15% post-agreement.
* **Massive hybrid engine expansion** : Toyota allocates $657 million across West Virginia and Kentucky plants to surge four-cylinder hybrid engine assembly, targeting surging American demand for electrified vehicles.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40e13100-e1d1-4d6c-9fb2-86f192042066?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
www.instagram.com/usambjapan
* **Corolla production hybrid pivot** : $125 million infusion into Mississippi factory enhances Corolla output while introducing hybrid variants, bolstering Toyota's dominant 51% U.S. hybrid market share.
* **Southern footprint job surge** : Investments totaling $128.5 million in Tennessee and Missouri facilities create 252 positions, aligning with Toyota's **["build where we sell" mantra](https://substack.com/redirect/a835941b-b32c-41df-8597-302356b96fed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** through 2027.

# **Wall Street is starting to get skeptical about Nvidia 's "murky" partner deals**
In a whirlwind of AI fervor, Nvidia has poured $24 billion into startups this year alone, sparking **[Wall Street alarms over"circular" deals](https://substack.com/redirect/e8a5188d-5d5f-42e1-a800-f5cbfeec28a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where the chip giant funds customers who promptly buy its GPUs--potentially fueling a risky hype bubble as tech stocks tumble.
* **Blitz of Massive Investments** : Nvidia committed $23.7 billion across 59 AI deals in 2025, surging from $22.8 billion in 54 deals last year, targeting firms like OpenAI and xAI to lock in chip dominance.
* **Anthropic 's Landmark Partnership**: Nvidia and Microsoft pledged up to $15 billion combined in Anthropic, which vows $30 billion in Azure compute buys and joint engineering with Nvidia for advanced AI models.
* **OpenAI 's Gigawatt-Scale Commitment**: Beyond a $6.6 billion direct stake, Nvidia's up-to-$100 billion OpenAI pact mandates at least 10 gigawatts of its AI systems, intertwining funding with enormous hardware purchases.
* **Analyst Flags Bubble Risks** : Seaport's Jay Goldberg deems these loops "very murky," warning they **[obscure true demand amid AI hype](https://substack.com/redirect/30530ec1-aadf-425f-9c62-0bdc983da325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , as Nvidia's stock plunged 2.81% to $181.36 on November 18.

## [Is the writing on the wall for the AI boom?](https://substack.com/redirect/b15a242b-044e-4667-b869-fdf168d44f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/b15a242b-044e-4667-b869-fdf168d44f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b15a242b-044e-4667-b869-fdf168d44f9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**AI SHOCK: Anthropic 's $350B boom chases OpenAI**
In a bold pivot from its OpenAI alliance, Microsoft **[unveiled a $5 billion investment](https://substack.com/redirect/f797b38a-4d1d-45ac-b4e0-7e9923da1eff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in AI rival Anthropic on Monday, joined by Nvidia's $10 billion stake, catapulting the Claude creator's valuation to a staggering $350 billion amid intensifying tech arms race.
* **Microsoft Ditches OpenAI Grip** : The tech giant's invest $5 billion is to secure Azure as Anthropic's key cloud partner, signaling diversification after pouring billions into rival OpenAI since 2019.
* **Nvidia Fuels AI Powerhouse** : The undisputed chip leader committed $10 billion for collaboration, providing up to 1 gigawatt of Grace Blackwell compute power to supercharge Anthropic's Claude models.
* **Valuation Skyrockets Dramatically** : From $183 billion in September, Anthropic's worth has surged to $350 billion via combined stakes, underscoring explosive demand for AI innovation.

* * *
* * *
# Epstein email fallout continues as Summers quits OpenAI's board
Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers **[resigned from OpenAI's board](https://substack.com/redirect/a52f2a81-5edc-4e1d-9c74-97f701faf2b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday amid backlash from newly released emails linking him to Jeffrey Epstein, as Congress pushes a bipartisan bill to expose more of the sex offender's elite ties, intensifying scrutiny on powerful figures.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a52f2a81-5edc-4e1d-9c74-97f701faf2b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Epstein Emails Surface Publicly** : House Oversight Committee unveiled over 20,000 subpoenaed documents last week, exposing Summers' communications with Epstein, prompting his immediate accountability.
* **Summers Admits Deep Shame** : On Monday, Summers confessed full responsibility for "misguided" **[post-conviction contact](https://substack.com/redirect/89f85100-3406-4ed5-bb31-55e369716620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Epstein, vowing to retreat from public roles except Harvard teaching.
* **Trump Demands Wider Probe** : President Trump urged Justice Department investigation on November 14 into Epstein's networks, targeting Summers, Clinton, JPMorgan, and Hoffman amid his own past associations.
* **Harvard Faces Severance Calls** : Sen. Elizabeth Warren demanded the university cut ties with Summers on Sunday, highlighting reputational risks for academia and AI firms from Epstein scandals.

* * *
* * *
# Bitcoin bloodbath triggers massive spot ETF exodus
Bitcoin's sharp plunge in recent days has sparked **[record outflows](https://substack.com/redirect/e541637b-203f-4b2f-aaf2-cfae739d1b23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from U.S. Bitcoin spot ETFs as jittery investors fled amid escalating economic uncertainty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e541637b-203f-4b2f-aaf2-cfae739d1b23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record Outflows Surge** : Investors yanked $1.1 billion from Bitcoin ETFs over the past week, dwarfing prior drops and signaling deep market unease.
* **Price Plunge Accelerates** : BTC tumbled to **[under $89,000](https://substack.com/redirect/32e95bc3-ec27-4865-8180-b558216a5c17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** today, erasing all of 2025's gains and heightening volatility tied to global tensions.
* **Expert Warnings Issued** : Analysts predict further downside risks, urging diversification as ETF assets shrink and institutional **[confidence wanes.](https://substack.com/redirect/b8250c36-ab1d-47af-82e2-74de08d844a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
* * *
# Private Credit company walks back fund merger after stock plunge and customer fury
In a **[stunning reversal](https://substack.com/redirect/f1d4614d-5e10-4f27-b0e4-08ba84d66c82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Blue Owl Capital abruptly terminated its proposed merger of two private-credit funds Wednesday, just days after its announcement sparked a 6% stock plunge amid investor fury over locked redemptions and looming 20% paper losses.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f1d4614d-5e10-4f27-b0e4-08ba84d66c82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Merger Targeted Massive Consolidation** : Blue Owl aimed to fold $1.7 billion non-traded OBDC II into $17.1 billion publicly traded OBDC, streamlining operations in a **[volatile private credit markets.](https://substack.com/redirect/80d2016d-c38d-4f93-abc2-9596a334ceb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Redemptions Sparked Investor Backlash** : The Deal would have frozen OBDC II withdrawals until closing, fueling outrage and **[broader fears](https://substack.com/redirect/80d2016d-c38d-4f93-abc2-9596a334ceb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about private credit's role in funding hyped AI datacenter ventures.
* **Boards Deemed Risks Too High** : Directors concluded the merger's volatility and bad press outweighed benefits, opting to preserve independent paths for both funds **[amid shaky market dynamics](https://substack.com/redirect/80d2016d-c38d-4f93-abc2-9596a334ceb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

* **Liquidity Restored for Shareholders** : OBDC II redemptions resume in Q1, with CEO Craig Packer affirming strong fundamentals and future standalone returns potential.

Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

---
| | It’s Josh Hawley. Some of you may know me as Missouri’s Senator. Others may remember me for standing with President Trump when it mattered most. But before politics, I’m a husband, a father of three, and an unapologetic Christian. My wife, Erin, is a constitutional lawyer who defends our freedoms every single day. And together, we’re raising our kids—Elijah, Blaise, and Abigail—to know that their value comes not from Washington or woke ideology, but from God. Right now, I’m fighting the greatest threat to our families and our future: Big Tech.
---
| | I love my kids too much to let the tech oligarchs impose their agenda on my family. And I know you feel the same about yours. Silicon Valley has run roughshod over modern civilization—and they’re just getting started. Smartphones addict our children. Social media tracks their every click, pause, and purchase. Epstein Files Backfire: Epstein Was Asked to Donate on Behalf of JB Pritzker’s Campaign – Years After His 2008 Conviction for Crimes Against a Minor (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/epstein-files-backfire-epstein-was-asked-to-donate-on-behalf-of-jb-pritzkers-campaign-years-after-his-2008-conviction-for-crimes-against-a-minor.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=533aa9e5fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/epstein-files-backfire-epstein-was-asked-to-donate-on-behalf-of-jb-pritzkers-campaign-years-after-his-2008-conviction-for-crimes-against-a-minor.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=533aa9e5fd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Epstein Files Backfire: Newly-released files show Jeffrey Epstein, right, was asked to donate to JB Pritzker's campaign in 2018, years after his conviction.
By Illinois Review

Many of the long-awaited Epstein files are finally out – and Democrats who spent years demanding their release are suddenly silent now that their own party leaders keep appearing in the documents.

Among them: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and, here in Illinois, Gov. JB Pritzker and his billionaire family.

The newly released 20,000-plus pages from the House Oversight Committee do not place JB Pritzker on Epstein’s island, his jet, or inside the man’s criminal enterprise. But they do expose something Democrats hoped voters would never see: a 2018 solicitation sent to Jeffrey Epstein on behalf of JB Pritzker’s gubernatorial campaign – a full decade after Epstein was convicted in 2008 for soliciting sex from a minor.

The email, sent by Democrat-aligned operatives linked to ActBlue, pitched Pritzker as a “rising star” and invited Epstein to a Chicago donor event.

This wasn’t before Epstein’s fall from grace. It wasn’t before the world knew who he was. It was years after a Florida judge sentenced him for exploiting a minor – and years after Epstein became one of America’s most infamous registered sex offenders.

Epstein ultimately did not donate, according to FEC filings. But that’s irrelevant. The fact that JB Pritzker’s campaign – or the Democratic fundraising machine attached to it – was targeting Epstein for cash in 2018 raises serious questions about judgment, ethics, and the priorities of the Democratic donor class.

Pritzker’s office quickly called the email a “standard bulk solicitation,” claiming it was sent to thousands of potential donors and that JB never met Epstein. But that excuse only leads to more questions: Why was Epstein still on Democrats’ donor lists a decade after his conviction for sex crimes involving a minor? Who kept him there? And why?

The scandal has also revived the longstanding ties between Epstein and the broader Pritzker family, particularly Hyatt executive chairman Thomas Pritzker, who appears repeatedly throughout Epstein’s contact books and meeting notes.

The political irony is impossible to ignore. Just days before the document release, Pritzker bragged to the Associated Press that the Epstein files would be “devastating for Trump.”

Instead, they ensnared some of the most powerful Democrats in America – including Pritzker, Jeffries, and longtime liberal mega-donors.

Illinois Democrats love to claim the moral high ground on protecting women and children. Yet their own fundraising arms were still courting a man convicted in 2008 of soliciting sex from a minor.

JB Pritzker may not have flown on Epstein’s jet or visited his island. But his campaign’s solicitation – sent long after Epstein’s crimes were national news – reveals a Democratic machine comfortable seeking money from a convicted predator.

Illinois voters deserve to know why.

name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: Is there anything we can say to earn your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251119-830&t=1&akid=832%2E294397%2En7_-sq)
Hi there,
We’ll be honest — we’ve noticed you haven’t chipped in yet, and we wanted to ask:
**Is there anything we can say to earn your support today?**
What if we reminded you that whoever wins this race will serve on Wisconsin’s Supreme Court for ten years?
Or that if our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, wins, she could preside over cases that impact our freedoms, workers’ rights, or access to reproductive care?
Maybe mentioning that Judge Chris Taylor is running because she believes the law should protect people, not powerful special interests, will convince you?
**The truth is, the only way we’ll win this competitive election is by working together.**
That’s why we’re reaching out more than usual. Now, one last question: [**Can we count on your contribution to fuel our campaign?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251119_1_ak.RLwvkM&amount=10&refcode=em20251119-830&t=3&akid=832%2E294397%2En7_-sq)

Team Taylor

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
These fights are deeply personal to me.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)
I’m going to share more about why I’m running for U.S. Senate, but if you’re already on board, **[please chip in $5 now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_1_why.8Vybdk&refcode=em20251119-1&t=2&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)**
I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.
Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.
**[Can I count on you to back my campaign with a $5 contribution right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_1_why.8Vybdk&refcode=em20251119-1&t=3&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)**
**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away — and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.
I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** — a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.
I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant — seriously!)_. I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**
My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead — not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?
**[If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Show your support with a $5 donation now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_1_why.8Vybdk&refcode=em20251119-1&t=4&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_1_why.8Vybdk&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-1&t=23&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)**
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251119-1&t=24&refcode2=3572_582294_fLIN_8&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3572%2E582294%2EfLIN_8)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Becca Balint
subject: Guess what I found in their “long list of ideas”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119588169/583585224/-785282667?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2MzNmZC03OGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKWBqkuM3Azs74RPOlgBRtecDnQxjd8ErxqXHhs6hLs=)
---
Peter, **I’m going to get right to it, because this one really matters. Speaker Mike Johnson recently said that Republicans “have a long list of ideas” to address health care.** **Well... I haven’t seen a single one. Not one. Nothing.** And honestly, families in Vermont and across this country don’t have time to wait for imaginary plans or empty promises. Too many people are skipping the doctors appointments and medical care they need. Too many parents are looking at a bill and wondering what they’re supposed to cut just to stay afloat. **Before I go any further — I know my team has been talking with you about our fundraising goal, and it’s because this one really matters. We’ve got to crush it so we don’t fall behind heading into the new year.** [Can you click here and chip in $5, $15 or whatever feels right to help us close the gap? Our goal was to hit $5000 before the end of the month and we only have $2895 left to raise! WE CAN DO THIS!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119588170/583585227/673394816?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2MzNmZC03OGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKWBqkuM3Azs74RPOlgBRtecDnQxjd8ErxqXHhs6hLs=) | [HELP US CATCH UP TODAY!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119588171/583585230/673394816?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2MzNmZC03OGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKWBqkuM3Azs74RPOlgBRtecDnQxjd8ErxqXHhs6hLs=)
---
Here’s the truth as I see it — and the truth people across this country keep telling me time and time again:**Health care shouldn’t be a luxury. And no one should be stuck in debt for the “crime” of getting sick.**
**We already have a real plan to fix this crisis: UNIVERSAL HEALTHCARE.**
It’s simple. It’s fair. And it takes the power away from giant corporations and puts it back where it belongs — with the people.
I support universal healthcare because I’ve sat with families who are drowning in medical bills. I’ve heard from neighbors who have to ration their medication. I’ve talked with young people who worry more about staying insured than chasing their dreams. **It doesn’t have to be this way.**
And I’m going to keep fighting — as a mom, as someone who listens first, and as someone who isn’t afraid to call out corporate greed or broken systems when they are hurting our people.
**But here’s the tough part: speaking this truth and pushing for real change means we get outspent. A lot. My team is working around the clock because we cannot afford to fall behind heading into the end of year.**
_Out of the $5,000 we need this month to stay on track, we still have $2,895 left to raise — and we only get there if a lot of us pitch in a little._
[So, if you can today, will you consider jumping in this fight with me to make sure I have the resources to keep going hard for the people? Even $10 makes a real difference in a grassroots campaign like this.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119588172/583585232/673394816?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2MzNmZC03OGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKWBqkuM3Azs74RPOlgBRtecDnQxjd8ErxqXHhs6hLs=)
I’m proud to do this work. I’m proud to fight for health care, for mental health care, for housing people can actually afford, for a fairer economy, for our democracy — for all of us.
**Thanks for being in this fight with me!**
— Becca Balint

name: The Flyover
subject: Why Now May Be the Best Time
body:
Profitable, fast-growing, reader-powered. Here's how investors could see returns in the years ahead.

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Family, I wanted to take a moment to speak directly from the heart about where _The Flyover_ is headed--and why this moment matters so much. From the very beginning, our mission has been simple: deliver honest, fact-based news that Americans can trust again. What's happened since then has been anything but simple. You helped turn a small idea into one of the fastest-growing, reader-powered news movements in the country. And now, together, we're approaching our next major milestone: [reaching 2,000 reader-investors.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T2PozAQBuBfY7pE2ObLhYvTIbpcmpOutAwewtz6A8EQlH-_Yjebasutn5lX82r-XczFosd4-2MDaBqTceBwsATORNhXD0SwmH16xLQH--iBJuhhJcIARuSiPHF-4sr87sbN-_a1rDKnRwABMgPN60qWtcrLIpt0Ued93UulKqegOYCXva0bkQ-NlA1kqI9czrniKi84P6umlmM1KBCNVFCWrMjBIaXl_D9hpAlG_0h3WM5DCpnXE9G8MvmLiY6JDuMdVvpm8mDZbRTMmrZlACbb1_lMVAcEcLgFJtvrHsGdLuDQPmmwYbZ4i0y23WfmF6RIEInJVryt84KRxFMIliPrb3dtzdFOlNmi3byj97hWNSvyW7DoP1rQz_7irsV7AAAA__8lRaXd) Every single person who has invested so far has helped build something rare and meaningful in today's media landscape. And now we're asking for your help to carry this momentum [across the finish line](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T2PozAQBuBfY7pE2ObLhYvTIbpcmpOutAwewtz6A8EQlH-_Yjebasutn5lX82r-XczFosd4-2MDaBqTceBwsATORNhXD0SwmH16xLQH--iBJuhhJcIARuSiPHF-4sr87sbN-_a1rDKnRwABMgPN60qWtcrLIpt0Ued93UulKqegOYCXva0bkQ-NlA1kqI9czrniKi84P6umlmM1KBCNVFCWrMjBIaXl_D9hpAlG_0h3WM5DCpnXE9G8MvmLiY6JDuMdVvpm8mDZbRTMmrZlACbb1_lMVAcEcLgFJtvrHsGdLuDQPmmwYbZ4i0y23WfmF6RIEInJVryt84KRxFMIliPrb3dtzdFOlNmi3byj97hWNSvyW7DoP1rQz_7irsV7AAAA__8lRaXd). **Why Now Is the Right Time to Join** **We 've made investing accessible for everyone.**
You don't need to be a big-name investor or a media insider. Shares are just $2 each, with a minimum investment of $500--because we want everyday readers, not corporate giants, shaping the future of _The Flyover_. **A newsroom owned by its readers --not the establishment.**
When you invest, you're not just funding a company. You're helping prove that Americans still believe in journalism that puts facts over theatrics and people over politics. You're helping create a model where trust--not corporate interests--is at the center. **Bonus shares for loyal readers.**
If you've been a _Flyover_ reader for at least a month, you'll receive 5% bonus shares when you invest during this round. It's our way of saying thank you for being part of this movement at it's grown.
* * *
**How Your Investment Could Grow** We believe in transparency, and that means being upfront about both opportunity and risk. Like any investment, nothing is guaranteed--but _The Flyover_ reached profitability after only two years, with 80% gross margins and 24% net income, putting us in the top 1% of media startups nationwide. **Here 's how investors could see returns in the future:** **1\. Acquisition**
A larger media company or strategic partner could one day acquire _The Flyover_. If that ever happens, we will only consider partners who respect our mission and values. **2\. Public Listing**
We could one day go public--giving you the ability to buy and sell shares freely. **3\. Profit Distributions (Dividends)**
Because we're already profitable, the possibility of future dividends is real and meaningful. **In short:** Sale. Listing. Distributions.

These are the same paths that have rewarded early investors in successful startups--and they're within reach because of the foundation you've helped us build.
* * *
If you've been on the fence, this is the moment that matters.

Reaching 2,000 reader-owners isn't just a number--it's a statement. It says that people across the country still believe in journalism that serves them, not corporations or political machines. And it says that The Flyover is strong, growing, and here to stay. If _The Flyover_ has earned your trust, I hope you'll consider standing with us today. [Invest in _The Flyover_ here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T2PozAQBuBfY7pE2ObLhYvTIbpcmpOutAwewtz6A8EQlH-_Yjebasutn5lX82r-XczFosd4-2MDaBqTceBwsATORNhXD0SwmH16xLQH--iBJuhhJcIARuSiPHF-4sr87sbN-_a1rDKnRwABMgPN60qWtcrLIpt0Ued93UulKqegOYCXva0bkQ-NlA1kqI9czrniKi84P6umlmM1KBCNVFCWrMjBIaXl_D9hpAlG_0h3WM5DCpnXE9G8MvmLiY6JDuMdVvpm8mDZbRTMmrZlACbb1_lMVAcEcLgFJtvrHsGdLuDQPmmwYbZ4i0y23WfmF6RIEInJVryt84KRxFMIliPrb3dtzdFOlNmi3byj97hWNSvyW7DoP1rQz_7irsV7AAAA__8lRaXd) **With gratitude,
** Guy Short
Founder, The Flyover | | *Own The Flyover Disclaimer

clean_body: Profitable, fast-growing, reader-powered. Here's how investors could see returns in the years ahead. | | | | | Dear Flyover Family, I wanted to take a moment to speak directly from the heart about where The Flyover is headed--and why this moment matters so much. From the very beginning, our mission has been simple: deliver honest, fact-based news that Americans can trust again. What's happened since then has been anything but simple. You helped turn a small idea into one of the fastest-growing, reader-powered news movements in the country. And now, together, we're approaching our next major milestone: Every single person who has invested so far has helped build something rare and meaningful in today's media landscape. And now we're asking for your help to carry this momentum . Why Now Is the Right Time to Join We 've made investing accessible for everyone. You don't need to be a big-name investor or a media insider. Shares are just $2 each, with a minimum investment of $500--because we want everyday readers, not corporate giants, shaping the future of The Flyover. A newsroom owned by its readers --not the establishment. When you invest, you're not just funding a company. You're helping prove that Americans still believe in journalism that puts facts over theatrics and people over politics. You're helping create a model where trust--not corporate interests--is at the center. Bonus shares for loyal readers. If you've been a Flyover reader for at least a month, you'll receive 5% bonus shares when you invest during this round. It's our way of saying thank you for being part of this movement at it's grown. How Your Investment Could Grow We believe in transparency, and that means being upfront about both opportunity and risk. Like any investment, nothing is guaranteed--but The Flyover reached profitability after only two years, with 80% gross margins and 24% net income, putting us in the top 1% of media startups nationwide. Here 's how investors could see returns in the future: 1\. Acquisition A larger media company or strategic partner could one day acquire The Flyover. If that ever happens, we will only consider partners who respect our mission and values. 2\. Public Listing We could one day go public--giving you the ability to buy and sell shares freely. 3\. Profit Distributions (Dividends) Because we're already profitable, the possibility of future dividends is real and meaningful. In short: Sale. Listing. Distributions. These are the same paths that have rewarded early investors in successful startups--and they're within reach because of the foundation you've helped us build. If you've been on the fence, this is the moment that matters. Reaching 2,000 reader-owners isn't just a number--it's a statement. It says that people across the country still believe in journalism that serves them, not corporations or political machines. And it says that The Flyover is strong, growing, and here to stay. If The Flyover has earned your trust, I hope you'll consider standing with us today. With gratitude, Guy Short Founder, The Flyover | | *Own The Flyover Disclaimer Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. Companies seeking startup investment through equity crowdfunding tend to be in earlier stages of development and their business model, products and services may not yet be fully developed, operational or tested in the public marketplace. name: Democratically
subject: Don’t forget November 4th
body: Democrats dominated and we are going to do it again. (https://democratically.org/) Peter, It’s easy for big headlines to fade, but the November victories deserve another look. Democrats didn’t just win, they dominated. Voters across the country rejected Trump-backed candidates and chose real leadership. These wins are already reshaping the political map, building momentum, and proving that when Democrats show up, we can win anywhere. name: Firearm Upgrade
subject: I’ve faced bullets—but this is how I protect my family
body:
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans.
We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22196/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/1754b14b2da3105c50aaf11b179fb8883689c234) here at any time.
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22196/6374453/8ba2be3abab5e147a0cabfd9cad5aa8c6986e6bc/1754b14b2da3105c50aaf11b179fb8883689c234)
---
---
|
---
November 20th, 2025 at 12:11 AM UTC
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22196/6374453/904a5beb5606b9ee84d197435daada35992a9f7a/1754b14b2da3105c50aaf11b179fb8883689c234)
---
| | I’ve been **hunted**. I’ve been **shot at**.
---
_I’ve lived through nights when I wasn’t sure I’d make it home._
---
**Those were risks I accepted.**
---
**But my kids didn’t sign up for that.**
---
**And I’ll never accept the idea that _unelected powers_ get to shape _their_ future...**
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22196/6374453/904a5beb5606b9ee84d197435daada35992a9f7a/1754b14b2da3105c50aaf11b179fb8883689c234)
---
| | ...I’ve seen what happens when hidden forces are pulling the strings.
---
And I **won’t stand by** while my family go unprotected. I hope we never see that kind of breakdown in the U.S. But if we **do** , _my family will be ready_ \- because that’s my responsibility as a **husband** and **father**.
---
| | **That’s why I lean on something solid, tangible, and time-tested._Something no insider can erase or inflate away..._**
---
| | [](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/22196/6374453/904a5beb5606b9ee84d197435daada35992a9f7a/1754b14b2da3105c50aaf11b179fb8883689c234)
---
Gold and silver are in my arsenal.
---
Not because they’re flashy, but because _when the dust settles, they’re still standing._ If we’re fortunate enough to never face a collapse, I’ll be grateful. But if we **do** , I’ll know I did everything I could to prepare. **That’s my backup plan._What’s yours?_**
---
---

name: Research Survey (Voter Action Project)
subject: Should there be term limits for the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: Why Term Limits for Supreme Court Justices Make Sense [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/BrennanCenter_SCOTUS_TermLimits.png]
Judicial historians and other nonpartisan justice activists are restarting their campaigns for term limits on Supreme Court justices. They argue that lifetime appointments are misplaced in the common era and that a rotation of federal justices off the Supreme Court and back to the Court of Appeals would bring a larger sense of fairness to the proceedings in front of our highest court.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Supreme Court justices be term-limited?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111925_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=111925_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111925_2&amount=20]

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: The nail in the coffin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
An update on Trump’s attempts to deploy troops to Portland:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119589725/583590751/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZThmYWUwYy03Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_zzHC763aceW5Pjf7XZ9WhAHrj2nWxRCDFDb3PCoi1w=) I wanted to make sure you saw this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119589726/583590752/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_111925_troops&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZThmYWUwYy03Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_zzHC763aceW5Pjf7XZ9WhAHrj2nWxRCDFDb3PCoi1w=) Time and time again, federal courts have reaffirmed what we all already knew: **Trump lacks the authority to send the National Guard into Portland. ** Now, this ruling is the final nail in the coffin — and a win for everyone who saw Trump’s orders for what they were: **An unprecedented, un-American, authoritarian abuse of power to stir up chaos and seize even more power for himself.** But while I am glad that President Trump was stopped here, there are still many, many battles to be fought on behalf of the American people. We have to continue opposing Trump’s cruel abuse of ICE’s authority to terrorize our communities and disappear so many of our friends, family, and loved ones. We have to reverse the **BILLIONS** of dollars Republicans cut from Medicaid and SNAP in their Big Ugly Tax Bill. And we STILL have to extend the expired ACA tax credits and fix the health care crisis that Republicans have so far **REFUSED** to address. [_**So here’s my promise to you: I will NEVER give up the fight for****working ****families, and I’ll continue pulling every lever of power I can to oppose the Trump administration’s extreme policies. clean_body: An update on Trump’s attempts to deploy troops to Portland: = I wanted to make sure you saw this: = Time and time again, federal courts have reaffirmed what we all already knew: Trump lacks the authority to send the National Guard into Portland. Now, this ruling is the final nail in the coffin — and a win for everyone who saw Trump’s orders for what they were: An unprecedented, un-American, authoritarian abuse of power to stir up chaos and seize even more power for himself. But while I am glad that President Trump was stopped here, there are still many, many battles to be fought on behalf of the American people. We have to continue opposing Trump’s cruel abuse of ICE’s authority to terrorize our communities and disappear so many of our friends, family, and loved ones. We have to reverse the BILLIONS of dollars Republicans cut from Medicaid and SNAP in their Big Ugly Tax Bill. And we STILL have to extend the expired ACA tax credits and fix the health care crisis that Republicans have so far REFUSED to address. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks so much, Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Powered by People
subject: Court blocks Trump’s power grab—now let’s help Texans navigate the chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
A federal court just blocked Republicans’ redrawn congressional map in Texas—the one designed to steal up to five Democratic House seats in next year’s midterms. The court made it clear: these districts were unconstitutional, discriminatory, and designed to silence Texans.
It’s a win for voters and democracy, but it also creates confusion and chaos for millions of Texans: _Which district am I in? Who’s running to represent me? Where do I vote?_
It’s messy, it’s complicated, and it’s exactly where Powered by People steps in.
While Trump and his Republicans try to rig the maps to maintain power, we’re working community by community, door by door, voter by voter. We’re helping Texans figure out what all this means for them because our fight for a fair Texas isn’t over.
**By giving Texans the information, tools, and support they need, we make it possible for them to register to vote, cast their ballot, run for office, and take action where it counts—ensuring they are represented despite attempts to confuse or silence them.**
[**Will you chip in $3 today to help us keep educating voters and keep communities informed, so Texans can cut through the chaos and make their voice heard in the upcoming elections?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251119.sDETWd&refcode=ema20251119-240472&t=2&akid=240472%2E444211%2E9e6CHk)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251119.sDETWd&refcode=ema20251119-240472&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240472%2E444211%2E9e6CHk)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20251119-240472-footer&t=22&refcode2=240472_444211_9e6CHk&akid=240472%2E444211%2E9e6CHk)**

name: Stop the Threats via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop the bill to ban protests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Right now, Trump and Republicans in Congress are working overtime to try
to silence our movement – and they’re not even trying to hide it.

Senator Ted Cruz doubled down on his dangerous crusade to crush the
peaceful “No Kings” protest movement. He went on national TV, smeared
nonviolent protests as “riots,” and demanded Congress pass his so-called
“Stop FUNDERs Act” – a bill designed to threaten, prosecute, and silence
those who support protest actions like “No Kings.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1011&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Headline: Ted Cruz says his bill will allow DOJ to 'prosecute' those
who fund No Kings protests, which have been overwhelmingly peaceful

Let’s be clear: Cruz’s bill would give the government the power to ban
organizing, scare allies, and chill free speech. It's a blatant attack on
our rights and we need to OVERWHELM Congress with opposition RIGHT NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1012&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Take action: Tell Congress now, Reject the dangerous "Stop FUNDERs Act"
and protect our right to protest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1013&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]ADD YOUR NAME

The stakes couldn’t be higher.

Mehdi Hasan said it best: “They want to ban protests...They want to kill the
first amendment.” If that sounds extreme – look closer.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1014&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Mehdi Hasan tweet denouncing Cruz's bill and saying they are trying to
kill the first amendment

Cruz wants to prosecute people for *funding* peaceful protest. And this
isn’t an isolated attack. Earlier this year, Donald Trump quietly signed a
new terrifying National Security directive – NSPM-7, which singles out
left-wing activists, launching a national strategy to “investigate and
disrupt” organizations like ours. And even scarier, it authorizes a
4,000-strong enforcement arm of the FBI to ‘prevent’ crimes that haven’t
even happened.

It’s completely chilling, but we refuse to be intimidated.

If we let this bill pass, we ALL could lose our right to support causes we
believe in – or simply speak out. This is not a drill. It’s about the
millions of people who have been the conscience of our democracy – and who
could be at risk of prosecution just for organizing for justice.

The good news is we can still defeat this. But only if we raise our
voices, fast and loud.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1015&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]We need to act quickly and urgently to shutdown Cruz’s bill before it
becomes law. Send an urgent message straight to your members of Congress
NOW: Protect the First Amendment—SAY NO to the “Stop FUNDERs Act”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34699?source=email-20251119&t=1016&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]ADD YOUR NAME

Republicans are counting on us to stay quiet and afraid. Let’s show them
we are unafraid, unbroken, and ready to organize like never before.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251119.3fcv97&t=1007&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251119.EMyx6H&t=1008&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251119.BV7AEL&t=1009&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251119.l_2hSx&t=1010&akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9858%2E5885482%2EjWkCki

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Tuesday’s results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

CNN is taking a victory lap after last Tuesday's elections.

name: Marc Elias
subject: We keep beating Trump in court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Marc Elias.

How did I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court after the 2020 elections? **Simple: We fought hard to unravel his web of lies again and again and again.**

But Trump won't stop lying or doing just about everything imaginable to threaten our democracy, so I have an important question to ask you:

**Should we keep challenging Trump in court?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/22270?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/22270?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
---

Let's face it, team: **Donald Trump lies with breathtaking frequency.**

He lied about the 2020 election. He lied about lowering costs. Now, analysts say his administration is "lying brazenly" in open court -- and unless we hold him accountable, _he could get away with it._

I've already taken Trump to court on behalf of the DSCC -- multiple times -- and I'm ready to do it again to defend our democracy. But unlike Trump, I won't lie to you: Beating the president of the United States in a courtroom is _difficult_ , and the next time I step forward to make our case, I want to do it knowing **millions** of Democrats are right there with me.

**That's why I’m asking you to confirm that you're in this fight, too. We can't afford to lose, and we can't afford to wait, so please answer now:**

**Should we keep challenging Trump in court?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/22270?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/22270?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
---

Thank you. Together, I know we'll succeed.

Marc Elias

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/22270?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251119-MarcElias-ShouldWeSueTrump-ETG-sl1&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=21810_9716520_0YRg4R&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=21810_9716520_0YRg4R&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=21810%2E9716520%2E0YRg4R)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Trump is already talking….
body:
Peter, I just got the most glowing endorsement...
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1]
Jack Schlossberg here, letting you know that our campaign in New York's 12th District has reached the attention of the White House.
Here's how I see it: If we're making MAGA mad, we're doing something right.
Before we unpack this, if you want to get in on our 'ridiculous' campaign, these first 48 hours are what set the tone for the race, so chip in if you can! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1&amount=25]
Earlier this week on MSNBC, I said that this admin is the most corrupt in our history – and I meant it. The disinformation that my cousin RFK Jr. is spreading is having real, deadly consequences. It doesn't take a genius to see he isn't making anybody healthier or safer.
No matter how much Karoline Leavitt wants people to believe that my cousin is "doing a phenomenal job bringing transparency and the gold standard of science back to our healthcare system," it doesn't make it true.
We need leaders who can face this fight head-on and call out corruption and lies when we see them.
I am ready to use my voice to stand up for truth, progress, and all of us. And I need you to have my back.
If the attacks are already coming from the top, it means we're on the right track. But we have our work cut out for us... Can I count on you to chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=111925_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=111925_1&amount=25]
We're building a movement powered by people who know we deserve better, and I'm so glad to have you on the team. Let's keep it up !!
–Jack

Peter,
Last week, I returned to ICE’s Eloy Detention Center here in Arizona for my third visit this year.
Weeks into the longest shutdown in American history, ICE has said they are not taking visits from Members of Congress. Peter, oversight of these taxpayer-funded centers is literally my job — **so I went anyway.**
The conditions at Eloy are horrific.
Dozens of people who came to this country seeking asylum are being detained. They lack access to quality water and face abuse and racist treatment.
One of my constituents, who goes by Yari, has been detained since February. Yari has leukemia, but ICE refused to allow her to see an oncologist until my office and the public pressured them to do so. Now, ICE is refusing to turn over her medical results, delaying the treatment she urgently needs.
When I went back to Eloy to demand ICE give over her results, I heard excuse after excuse. It’s inhumane, and frankly, it’s bullshit.
These are just some of the horrific stories of neglect and abuse in ICE detention centers in Arizona and across the country.
**When human rights violations take place in our own country, it’s incumbent on all of us to stand up and speak out.**
[I won’t back down from calling out this administration's authoritarianism. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590413/583592942/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)
Friend,

Despite the ongoing chaos in Washington, I’m not stepping back from the fight. There’s a whole lot of work to be done to secure affordable healthcare and protect working families. I want to share a bit of what I’ve been up to around the district in the last few weeks.

I hope you read these updates from the campaign trail in their entirety, but if you’re short on time and want to show your support, **[$3 or any amount would go a long way toward building the movement we need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590414/583592943/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)**

Thank you,

Nikki
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590415/583592944/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)**
---

* * *

Immigrants make Illinois – and our country – great. With the spike in ICE activity in Southern Illinois, I brought immigration groups together to discuss how we can protect and support our neighbors. It’s why I’m proud to cosponsor the _Protecting Sensitive Locations Act_ , which would prohibit immigration enforcement action in spaces that provide essential services and refuge.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590416/583592945/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)
_Watch my remarks in their entirety**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590417/583592946/-284647729?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=&emci=b106b824-7ec5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4e59782c-7ec5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**._
I joined the Carpenters Local 270 for their monthly meeting. Unions built this country, and it’s my priority to protect and defend them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590418/583592947/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)
I met with folks in Macoupin County and joined the Greater Springfield Dems to share what I’m working on in Congress. Nothing is more important to me than delivering real results and improving working families’ lives across IL-13.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590419/583592948/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)
I was honored to take part in the JFK dinner to share about my work on lowering costs and bringing critical resources back to Madison County.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590420/583592949/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)
As you can see, the fight isn’t stopping now that the government shutdown has ended. If anything, it’s fired me up to find a solution for working families, end the affordability crisis, and secure healthcare for the thousands in our district than depend on it.

I’m working hard in Washington and back home to do just that. **[I appreciate your support, and if you’re able, $3 or any amount today would help build our strong momentum on the ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590421/583592950/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.19.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU5NzgyYy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ep3ASQ2gzOBRo3xiVHbuPdDhLQ_kE3kd6PLgja9g6Ok=)**

Thank you,

Nikki
