clean_body: | = Friend, Despite the ongoing chaos in Washington, I’m not stepping back from the fight. There’s a whole lot of work to be done to secure affordable healthcare and protect working families. I want to share a bit of what I’ve been up to around the district in the last few weeks. I hope you read these updates from the campaign trail in their entirety, but if you’re short on time and want to show your support, = Thank you, Nikki | = Immigrants make Illinois – and our country – great. With the spike in ICE activity in Southern Illinois, I brought immigration groups together to discuss how we can protect and support our neighbors. It’s why I’m proud to cosponsor the Protecting Sensitive Locations Act , which would prohibit immigration enforcement action in spaces that provide essential services and refuge. = Watch my remarks in their entirety. I joined the Carpenters Local 270 for their monthly meeting. Unions built this country, and it’s my priority to protect and defend them. = I met with folks in Macoupin County and joined the Greater Springfield Dems to share what I’m working on in Congress. Nothing is more important to me than delivering real results and improving working families’ lives across IL-13. = I was honored to take part in the JFK dinner to share about my work on lowering costs and bringing critical resources back to Madison County. = As you can see, the fight isn’t stopping now that the government shutdown has ended. If anything, it’s fired me up to find a solution for working families, end the affordability crisis, and secure healthcare for the thousands in our district than depend on it. I’m working hard in Washington and back home to do just that. = Thank you, Nikki =** | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . The case, _Watson v. Republican National Committee,_ challenges a state law that allows ballots mailed by Election Day to be counted if they arrive shortly after. If the Court sides with the RNC, it could throw dozens of state election systems into chaos ahead of the 2026 elections. It’s all part of a larger effort by Washington to dictate how states run their elections, and to sow doubt before the next one even happens. **I’ve pushed back against every attempt to take over Minnesota’s elections. Our system is fair, accurate, honest, and secure, and I will always defend it.** **[But I need your help to make sure we have the resources to keep pushing back. **Let’s be clear: This isn’t about one state’s law. It’s about control.**
We’ve seen this play before. The Trump Administration has:
– Threatened to “ban” mail-in voting by executive order.
– Tried to seize private voter data from states like Minnesota.
– Pressured the Justice Department to “find fraud” in the 2020 election that simply didn’t exist.
Minnesota routinely has one of the highest voter turnout rates in the country because people trust the process.
**[I won’t let anyone take that trust away but I’ll need your help to keep defending our democracy. Will you please pitch in $5 or more this week to help us get our message out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590550/583593259/1047727825?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_251119&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzlhNTE5ODItN2VjNS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9MvRkVYd1hsXIwND0zxcFogkrGFfdSVSrkleueUB88I=)**

Steve

name: Troy Downing
subject: These Warriors Fought for America. Now They Need YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | |

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._tvm9Ds6daGxBS5-g)
---
**[Will you chip in today and SPLIT a donation between these America First Veteran Congressmen to help them start their first term strong?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ SPLIT A DONATION ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._z6h41Bevg)
---
The Left has deep pockets filled with special interest money. But we have something stronger: patriots like you who believe in faith, freedom, and the future of our country.

Your contribution isn't just a donation – it's an investment in leadership forged by service and tested under fire.

**[Let’s send a message that America’s warriors don’t back down – on the battlefield OR in Congress.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ SPLIT A DONATION ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
For America,

Congressman Troy Downing

Please give what you can to Laura’s campaign today. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590722/583593862/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZkZGFmNy03ZWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_SS_41iLCTrhflvNMbabyeM1Pi6B84b_xhAQ9oJ7rqs=)

* * *
**The Big Picture**

Across the country, Democrats are gaining momentum. Recent elections in New Jersey and Virginia showed that voters are rejecting extremism and chaos.

But here on Long Island, the trend is moving in the opposite direction. Republicans are gaining ground locally, and national GOP operatives see flipping this district as one of their best opportunities to hold the House.

**Where Things Stand**
* **The Only Toss-Up in New York:** Nonpartisan analysts at The Cook Political Report continue to rate this district as the state’s only true toss-up.

* **Republican Fundraising Advantage:** Trump and national Republicans have built a record-shattering war chest. For the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised.

* **Relentless GOP Attack Ads:** Republican super PACs are already running negative ads in our district, trying to distort Laura’s record and weaken her standing early.

* **Rising GOP Strength on Long Island:** While Democrats have seen strong results nationally, local Republican gains show this race will be harder than ever to hold.

**What's At Stake**

If Republicans flip this seat, they’ll have an even stronger grip on the House and a clearer path to push their extreme agenda. But if we hold it, Democrats are one step closer to taking back the House — and exposing the corruption, chaos, and abuses of power that have defined this Republican Congress.

**What Laura Needs**

We’re building the infrastructure now to win in 2026, but it’s going to take consistent support to stay competitive. The next few months are critical to:
* Fund our field and voter contact programs

* Counter GOP attack ads already running in the district

* Build the early resources needed to compete against national Republican spending

* * *
We can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal when so much is at stake.

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I need your help to deliver for rural America.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It’s official: Elise Stefanik is running for governor, and her seat in Congress is wide open.
**It’s official: Elise Stefanik is running for governor, and her seat in Congress is wide open.**
I’m Blake Gendebien, the dairy farmer and Democrat running to replace Stefanik and deliver results for rural America.
**[Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor and help us win this race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97426?refcode=em20251119-9735&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=9735%2E614464%2EWE8DBv)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97427?refcode=em20251119-9735&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9735%2E614464%2EWE8DBv)**
Our opponents are going to pour millions of dollars into this race to keep this seat and hold onto their slim majority in Congress, so we have to keep up our momentum. But with less than a year until the election, we don’t have any time to waste.
We’ve already received so much grassroots support, but it’s only a fraction of the amount our opponents are about to flood our district with. Now more than ever, we need to raise even more to spread our message across New York and make sure voters know I’m ready to fight for them in Congress.
**[I know we can win this if we work together. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to join our team?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97426?refcode=em20251119-9735&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9735%2E614464%2EWE8DBv)**

name: J. Rodriguez
subject: How to steal $83 million from Florida taxpayers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
This is what pay-to-play corruption looks like. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590771/583594139/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_PaytoPlay_111925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVhMjMzODYtN2ZjNS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A59qeOy9y-qkULOGjf8BWQvgiTlz6PfQi1WrnNVmeb0=&emci=8895b584-67c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8ea23386-7fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — In today's episode of _"How Corrupt Are Florida's Leaders?"_ we have an **$83 million pay-to-play scheme** involving **Governor Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier.** According to the _Tampa Bay Times_ , a lobbyist for a Louisiana businessman named Robert Guidry — _who donated to both DeSantis and Uthmeier_ — pushed through a budget deal that forced the state to spend **$83 million in taxpayer money on 4 acres of coastal land in Destin.** And get this: **Guidry’s companies bought that same land less than ten years ago for less than $8 million.** You’d think the Governor and Attorney General might stop an $83 million giveaway — instead, DeSantis and Uthmeier **voted to approve it.** And as if that weren’t enough, the deal was written so Guidry’s own appraisers helped decide the price using funds meant to protect Florida’s wildlife to buy coastal real estate instead. **[This is exactly the kind of pay-to-play corruption that’s rotting our state government, and it’s why I’m running for Florida Attorney General. clean_body: This is what pay-to-play corruption looks like. | Peter — In today's episode of "How Corrupt Are Florida's Leaders?" we have an $83 million pay-to-play scheme involving Governor Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier. According to the Tampa Bay Times , a lobbyist for a Louisiana businessman named Robert Guidry — who donated to both DeSantis and Uthmeier — pushed through a budget deal that forced the state to spend $83 million in taxpayer money on 4 acres of coastal land in Destin. And get this: Guidry’s companies bought that same land less than ten years ago for less than $8 million. You’d think the Governor and Attorney General might stop an $83 million giveaway — instead, DeSantis and Uthmeier voted to approve it. And as if that weren’t enough, the deal was written so Guidry’s own appraisers helped decide the price using funds meant to protect Florida’s wildlife to buy coastal real estate instead. = Experts say this sweetheart land deal violated Florida’s normal safeguards for land purchases, and even DeSantis’ own former state parks director called it a deliberate violation of transparency to benefit a political donor. Floridians are struggling with the highest insurance rates in the country, skyrocketing utility bills, and costs they can't afford. Meanwhile, the people in power are busy enriching their donors instead of you. I'm running for Attorney General to crack down on corruption like this and hold the powerful accountable. But I need your help to win this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Onward, Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

It’s George Conway. I’ve spent _years_ calling out Donald Trump, the Republican Party, and their enablers! **And if there’s one man who embodies political cowardice more than anyone else, it’s _Lindsey Graham_.**

Here’s the truth: Lindsey Graham is as spineless as they come.

I watched him go from calling Trump a “kook” who was “unfit for office” to becoming Trump’s most loyal lapdog in the Senate. Which is even offensive to dogs because unlike Lindsey Graham _they actually have spines_. Lindsey twists himself into whatever shape necessary to kiss Trump’s 🫏. It’s pathetic. And it’s dangerous.

South Carolina needs a Senator with a backbone. Someone strong enough to stand up to corruption and special interests to put our communities first. That’s why I’m supporting Dr. Annie Andrews, and I’m asking you to support her campaign today too. | | [ DONATE NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119590865/583594444/899181852?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.19_Annie-Andrews-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODBjYWE5My03ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Jh1rp2ARXXpMBCLg3w-wWPIW1ZTC_PgJoHKlERX2Wk=)

clean_body: = It’s George Conway. I’ve spent years calling out Donald Trump, the Republican Party, and their enablers! And if there’s one man who embodies political cowardice more than anyone else, it’s Lindsey Graham. Here’s the truth: Lindsey Graham is as spineless as they come. I watched him go from calling Trump a “kook” who was “unfit for office” to becoming Trump’s most loyal lapdog in the Senate. Which is even offensive to dogs because unlike Lindsey Graham they actually have spines. Lindsey twists himself into whatever shape necessary to kiss Trump’s 🫏. It’s pathetic. And it’s dangerous. South Carolina needs a Senator with a backbone. Someone strong enough to stand up to corruption and special interests to put our communities first. That’s why I’m supporting Dr. Annie Andrews, and I’m asking you to support her campaign today too. | | = Annie is a pediatrician, a mom, and a fighter. She doesn’t owe anything to the Washington establishment. She’s running because she knows firsthand what’s at stake for our communities, and because she’s had enough of Graham’s weakness and corruption. But Annie can’t do this alone. Defeating a 30-year incumbent backed by billionaires takes serious resources and grassroots power. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Annie Andrews and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Lindsey Graham sold his soul for power. name: Ryan Busse
subject: ✍️ Add your name to let us know you’re with us
body:
It's been over a year since Trump's

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/dsysdHaWDUWxC93W4WT7rA~~/AAUS1hA~/t_9tlbV-UyWEddvgcMBuH7gIUEA_Rf6e3QI2k2zDpUMUFf1A3Nuu2PifVR0IKTgA0CoIYLpg2cunLMBQOh9XA5C_slPIcdwKDe84RVQLasvZ4rgTviC_7uXWkIiZYI0_)
| | | | Peter, It's been over a year since Donald Trump was elected, and in this past year, Republicans in Congress have fallen in line on **ceding control to an unelected wrecking crew hellbent on selling off America’s public lands.** These Republican lawmakers haven’t found the time to work on much anything—other than passing a massive billionaire tax cut by throwing working people off of health insurance—but they’ve found time for this. They’re working with billionaire cronies to gut protections, privatize national parks, and auction off forests, rivers, and wilderness areas for profit. **And they think no one will notice.** It’s time to prove just how wrong they are. [**Will you add your name to our petition right now to let us know you oppose the MAGA land grab?**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qdmPnQBBXI6ARrFwRJctew~~/AAUS1hA~/1IF_e1UlLuP6BFIuSEnPMNRyQpbk37d_Xec-Jw2Qa2R1S1WXacR4vuxEvYP--GmJ-gKAZJ6tf8BATBeZyc1ES0oKo95SrBBDAilHmTpQwvy3LHcPocLAyAGSfEnE9ABS) **[**ADD YOUR NAME »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qdmPnQBBXI6ARrFwRJctew~~/AAUS1hA~/1IF_e1UlLuP6BFIuSEnPMNRyQpbk37d_Xec-Jw2Qa2R1S1WXacR4vuxEvYP--GmJ-gKAZJ6tf8BATBeZyc1ES0oKo95SrBBDAilHmTpQwvy3LHcPocLAyAGSfEnE9ABS) ** We’re not asking for permission, Peter—we’re building a political machine that will expose the corruption, confront the sellouts, **and crush the extremists trying to destroy what belongs to all of us.** We intend to remove those who want to sell out our public lands from their comfy seats in DC. But first, we need to know you’re in. [**Sign your name and join the fight to defend our public lands today.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qdmPnQBBXI6ARrFwRJctew~~/AAUS1hA~/1IF_e1UlLuP6BFIuSEnPMNRyQpbk37d_Xec-Jw2Qa2R1S1WXacR4vuxEvYP--GmJ-gKAZJ6tf8BATBeZyc1ES0oKo95SrBBDAilHmTpQwvy3LHcPocLAyAGSfEnE9ABS) **[**ADD YOUR NAME »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/qdmPnQBBXI6ARrFwRJctew~~/AAUS1hA~/1IF_e1UlLuP6BFIuSEnPMNRyQpbk37d_Xec-Jw2Qa2R1S1WXacR4vuxEvYP--GmJ-gKAZJ6tf8BATBeZyc1ES0oKo95SrBBDAilHmTpQwvy3LHcPocLAyAGSfEnE9ABS) ** Thank you, Peter. _—Ryan Busse, Public Land Warriors_ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_k-QS58ioiTN39ADchv4Ew~~/AAUS1hA~/BihOhKci4cYUoWHEoxPIwL3WUIi4lshQ0uV_051HaIZZCxPljT2UWtczoiBGTK_h3qRkXOaOGuTmqRV2UWXOvU9lIee-GCsRDuhcpMxhKZc8n8S132y41LleTx1KrTbKrmZW8jNS8m8Ff-jehmomzXTrjXZAuv9Qpbw_CmdB-z03soJlsgsJs0E2q3mZqLRGT3fLKbQR78zB2D85GGQCCjyoFTwwn2GVGMUBkOkPEjxquXARi6tOxJzsWfFCwci6) ** **

name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: 3 men are trying to push out the only woman in this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
Did I wake up in the 1950s, or are we just in California's 3rd Congressional District? Yep, we're just in CA-03.
After Prop 50, three men—one Republican Congressman, one former politician, and one who represents an entirely different district—plotted to switch districts to advance their political careers and essentially kick me (the only woman running) out of this race.
Two Democrats and one Republican, who don’t even live in the district, made a backroom deal to decide who'll represent us in Congress instead of letting voters decide.
And that doesn't sit right with me. If it doesn't sit right with you either, will you donate what you can to help our campaign for Congress fight back? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
I'm an EPA worker, a mother, and a county lawmaker who moved to Grass Valley to raise my two boys. I joined this race back in April because I saw what our Republican opponent was doing to our communities, and I had to do something.
Our district needs affordable healthcare, needs affordable housing, needs real solutions to the climate crisis, and needs someone who will actually represent us in Congress—now.
Our district is one of, if not THE BEST, Dem flip opportunity nationwide, and it's sad that two members of our own party are willing to collude with a Republican and engage in old-school sexism to benefit themselves and keep a real fighter out of Congress.
Friend, I need your help. I'm not taking a cent from corporate PACs or PACs like AIPAC, and I'm not a member of an "old boys club." My campaign relies on grassroots support from people like you. If you can, will you please chip in today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
In solidarity,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251119_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945

name: President Trump
subject: re: Please confirm receipt of this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Britain’s Fox News just called Mississippi “the most exciting state in America” – watch why!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/harryinms?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I’m thrilled whenever Mississippi gets the national (or even international!) spotlight it deserves — and this time, it’s glowing.

Harry Cole, the U.S. correspondent for GB News (Britain’s fast-growing answer to Fox News), just spent time traveling across our state to find out why Mississippi is one of America’s fastest-growing success stories. His verdict? Mississippi is “the most exciting state in America right now.”

In his hour-long special, “Mississippi Rising,” Harry explores our historic reforms.

I was honored to sit down with him and explain how conservative, free-market policies are delivering real results for Mississippi families.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=08c2a75c7c&e=5703353baa)
---
Perhaps if you have the time, you might prefer to watch the full hour long program about Mississippi in its entirety by clicking on the image below:
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=05c51c1b53&e=5703353baa)
---
| This is the kind of positive, fact-based coverage our state rarely gets. Please take a moment to watch and share with friends, family, or anyone who loves seeing Mississippi shine.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=82f0af7eae&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: We need to defend democracy from Project 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Please join me in this fight to protect our Constitution and the values we hold dear.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119591933/583597683/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYzYzg1Ni04MmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLfk0MkG50uCiajQkVIuiDbarxnb6AOetcchL7RA5bE=&emci=03c869ee-c9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4563c856-82c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

I’m a third-generation veteran who took an oath to uphold the Constitution and defend our country. I've always understood that our democracy is a gift, not to be taken for granted.

**When Donald Trump won again and began implementing policies from the Project 2025 playbook on day one, I knew the fight for our values would get even harder. **
This is not theoretical; this is very real. Project 2025 is a 900-page mandate from far-right think tanks and former officials. It presents a ruthless, systemic plan to undermine our fundamental freedoms and reshape the federal government into a political weapon.
It's a threat to democracy, our way of life, and the rule of law.
Project 2025 is rolling back critical reproductive rights and access to health care. It explicitly calls for eliminating federal diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs and rolling back protections for the LGBTQ community in health care, education, and the workplace. That’s happening right before our eyes.
And as a veteran, I am especially concerned by their desire to inject partisan politics into our armed forces and to disregard the long-standing, apolitical tradition of the U.S. military.
The architects of Project 2025 didn’t hide their intentions, and they have moved swiftly to implement this agenda without congressional approval, leaving it to the courts to determine the legality of their actions.

We must all remain vigilant and engaged. We must continue to fight these antidemocratic attacks in Congress, in the courts, and in the court of public opinion. The recent election showed that this approach is working.
Derek, I'm working tirelessly to hold President Trump and his Project 2025 administration accountable, to stop their harmful legislation from advancing in Congress, to recruit and support federal candidates running next November, and to keep this seat – our community’s seat – blue. And to do it, I need your help.
[**Please join me in this fight to protect our Constitution and the values we hold dear. Chip in $5 or anything you can to my campaign so I can continue to hold Donald Trump accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119591934/583597684/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYzYzg1Ni04MmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLfk0MkG50uCiajQkVIuiDbarxnb6AOetcchL7RA5bE=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119591935/583597685/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYzYzg1Ni04MmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLfk0MkG50uCiajQkVIuiDbarxnb6AOetcchL7RA5bE=)
---
There's work to be done,

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/19/2025
body:
TPUSA approval sparks chaos at Fort Lewis College: Assault reported after professor emeritus erupts
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** At Fort Lewis College, approval of a TPUSA chapter triggered an assault and a [professor emeritus’ viral outburst](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The state’s [uranium industry is reviving](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) amid shifting federal policy, while the [Land Board finalized the long-debated sale](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of the 46,000-acre La Jara property to preserve open space. And in Highlands Ranch, deputies uncovered 1.7 million fentanyl pills—[the largest seizure in state history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—after a storage unit was opened, exposing cartel ties and likely saving countless lives.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Congress overwhelmingly voted to [release the Epstein files](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after documents showed deep Democratic ties, prompting bipartisan calls for transparency. The DOJ is moving forward with [obstruction charges against former FBI Director James Comey](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), citing evidence he misled Congress about Clinton-related intel. Meanwhile, the [EPA proposed a clearer, scaled-back definition of “Waters of the United States”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) following the Sackett ruling, rolling back years of federal overreach affecting landowners and farmers.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Commentators warn that Colorado’s Lake Fork Ranch purchase signals a [shift toward carbon credits over agriculture](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), spotlight a Colorado mom whose convictions carried her through an [ugly school-board race](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and examine how differing birthrates—especially higher among conservatives—could [quietly reshape America’s political future](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 19, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[TPUSA approval sparks chaos at Fort Lewis College: Assault reported after professor emeritus erupts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Fort Lewis College in Durango erupted into chaos on November 7th after the Associated Students of Fort Lewis College (ASFLC) reversed an earlier decision and voted to approve a Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapter on campus. What began as a routine appeal meeting ended with a reported assault, shouting, and a professor emeritus’s profanity-filled outburst—all recorded on video that has since gone viral.
The confrontation was captured on video and quickly spread after being posted to [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and amplified on [X/Twitter](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by Libs of TikTok, where it gained national attention.
The appeal meeting itself followed weeks of tension. TPUSA students had first been denied chapter approval, prompting an appeal that drew more than 60 supporters and opponents into the campus building, with many more waiting in the hallway. When ASFLC ultimately reversed the denial and recognized the chapter, supporters in the hallway cheered for the students who had spent weeks organizing their case.
Moments later, the mood shifted.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trump said release the Epstein files—now Congress agrees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Congress unites to release Epstein files:** The House (423–1) and Senate (unanimous) passed a bill forcing full public release of Epstein records, signaling a major shift after years of political resistance.
* **Documents expose deep Democratic ties:** Newly released communications show Epstein advising Democratic lawmakers, donating to campaigns, coordinating questioning during hearings, and maintaining close relationships with major Democratic donors and figures.
* **Transparency pressure lands across parties:** Even Colorado Senators Bennet and Hickenlooper joined calls for release, as the bill bans the DOJ from hiding files for “reputational or political” reasons — a move Trump supports, saying “we have nothing to hide.”

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[Colorado’s Land Board swaps agriculture for a revenue experiment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **New land deal signals shift away from traditional agriculture:** The State Land Board’s purchase of the 800-acre Lake Fork Ranch is being promoted as a win for rural communities, but the property’s planned uses emphasize carbon projects, biodiversity, and recreation—not grazing or production agriculture.
* **Strategic plan prioritizes “non-extractive” revenue:** Gov. Polis and board leaders say the acquisition aligns with a new strategy to grow revenue through entrepreneurial, non-extractive ventures, raising concerns about whether ranching and other ag operations are being sidelined.
* **Commentary warns of long-term policy shift:** The writer argues this move—paired with recent legislation and leadership changes—may mark the beginning of a broader transition toward carbon credits and conservation easements becoming the norm, with true production agriculture becoming increasingly rare on state lands.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Colorado’s auto theft reckoning: A crisis we built, a crisis we can fix**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17** _Colorado didn’t become the nation’s auto theft capital by accident. It got there through a decade of choices that treated working families’ cars like disposable assets. Lawmakers downgraded the theft of “low-value” vehicles to a low-level offense and sold it as reform. They never explained the part where families would carry the cost._
__
[**A Miracle in Our Midst: Celebrating Pastor John Water’s Successful Liver Transplant**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17** _Every now and then, a moment arrives that stops us in our tracks and reminds us of the sheer goodness and mercy woven into the fabric of life. This is one of those moments._

[**Colorado detransitioner’s story anchors Protect Kids Colorado event on safeguarding vulnerable children**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY ANTOINETTE DE LA CRUZ | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17** _My name is Antoinette. I am a detransitioner. And I want to save Colorado’s children from enduring the anguish I’ve been through. I began exploring transitioning into a man during my late teenage years and spent nearly 20 years trying to turn myself into a man before I realized my mistake._ __

body:
| You know I won’t stop working for you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5111%2E35263%2EkEGXil)
Team — You know me, and you know that nothing matters to me more than making life better for Wisconsin families. When I first ran for Senate in 2012, a lot of powerful people didn’t think I had a shot. They thought there was no way Wisconsin would send an openly gay woman to the U.S. Senate. That didn’t matter to me though, because Wisconsin voters had already put me in the House as the state’s first female member of Congress and the nation’s first openly gay challenger. I knew that with the help of an incredible grassroots team behind me, we could accomplish anything together. I only had one goal in that race: _to fight as hard as I could to make a real difference in people’s lives_** _._** That goal is what’s driven me in my career as a public servant, all the way to the U.S. Senate. I was so proud to become the first woman elected to the United States Senate from Wisconsin _and_ the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history. And I’ve been fighting every day since to protect and expand LGBTQ+ rights, defend our democracy, make health care accessible and affordable, and so much more. In the Senate, I’ve been driven by Wisconsin’s state motto: **_Forward_**. For me, that means we must always work together to help provide fairness, equality, and economic opportunity for all. It means we have to keep working for a future that realizes those goals. **And we have to work harder than ever, because congressional Republicans and Donald Trump are trying to set us back decades.** I will _always_ fight back, but it will take real people power to send a message that the American people won't stand for this. **[That’s where you come in. Will you help me stay in this fight by chipping in today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251119_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5111%2E35263%2EkEGXil)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251119_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5111%2E35263%2EkEGXil)

Lauren Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab news headlines. Let’s send her home this Midterm.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019rKgX_f1pPDu4myhW7zt6-jFw3jAgbll5QeVDUwdbGavHHwb7K285URfDbvvvnbNTvmffaptusInq_2btt6j7-NeG7QREX8R6kgz2JWPELGctepQBVGsm1dwMmPIyWrciu11SXG7OpV3kvoSLYWcAH4Kmr1skDx2YF3ytkp0HDq2mcOvxNPDz48dZV1PsbQJpwZhHHKMPij_vIZEw7LhLEBvgIPl8WJ_&c=9aZX45haTtf3hAbQJYt2NLoN0FZvGqUWTFRh7gPz3WC4SypV-4kGIg==&ch=IcMDy-hhH6ei918CyN_NeeT1ehdlsh29BzQxHybBigMo-WoroBPoeQ==)

Peter,
She's at it again.
Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert didn't get her way, and once again she melted down and used the floor of the United States House of Representatives to stage another shouting match.

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019rKgX_f1pPDu4myhW7zt6-jFw3jAgbll5QeVDUwdbGavHHwb7K285URfDbvvvnbNTvmffaptusInq_2btt6j7-NeG7QREX8R6kgz2JWPELGctepQBVGsm1dwMmPIyWrciu11SXG7OpV3kvoSLYWcAH4Kmr1skDx2YF3ytkp0HDq2mcOvxNPDz48dZV1PsbQJpwZhHHKMPijI78uNJX8kklkQDeBTajFE&c=9aZX45haTtf3hAbQJYt2NLoN0FZvGqUWTFRh7gPz3WC4SypV-4kGIg==&ch=IcMDy-hhH6ei918CyN_NeeT1ehdlsh29BzQxHybBigMo-WoroBPoeQ==)

Boebert acts like a toddler, but in reality she is a 38 year-old grandmother who should be setting a better example for her children and grandchildren.
Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children.
Lauren Boebert needs a timeout from politics.
Trisha Calvarese is Boebert's hometown Democratic opponent. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district--overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county because Colorado voters are sick and tired of her nonsense.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And now, we can put an end to her temper tantrums and attention-seeking behavior once and for all.
[Will you help send Boebert home by making a donation to Democrat Trisha Calvarese? Trisha is on the ground in this district every day connecting with voters and building the organization that will defeat Boebert this election.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019rKgX_f1pPDu4myhW7zt6-jFw3jAgbll5QeVDUwdbGavHHwb7K285URfDbvvvnbNTvmffaptusInq_2btt6j7-NeG7QREX8R6kgz2JWPELGctepQBVGsm1dwMmPIyWrciu11SXG7OpV3kvoSLYWcAH4Kmr1skDx2YF3ytkp0HDq2mcOvxNPDz48dZV1PsbQJpwZhHHKMPijl-LqTymMiau8YQi4xdRm4&c=9aZX45haTtf3hAbQJYt2NLoN0FZvGqUWTFRh7gPz3WC4SypV-4kGIg==&ch=IcMDy-hhH6ei918CyN_NeeT1ehdlsh29BzQxHybBigMo-WoroBPoeQ==)

Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Yesterday Was a Big Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Yesterday was a busy and important day. I wrote to you in the afternoon about the breaking news that a court case enjoined the use of Texas’ new, discriminatory congressional map. Not long after that, I voted to force the Trump administration to release the Justice Department files related to the sex-trafficking investigation into Jeffrey Epstein.
Survivors deserve justice and the American people deserve the truth.
I signed a discharge petition to force this vote back in September because accountability should not depend on who holds power. Releasing the Epstein Files is essential—not only for the survivors who deserve justice for the crimes they endured, but for addressing the failures in institutions that failed to protect them and ensuring we do all we can to prevent crimes like these.
In the end, the vote was bipartisan, and that is a good thing. But for months, President Trump and his enablers in Congress have delayed, obstructed, and worked to prevent this vote from happening. They even stalled the swearing-in of a new Democratic member of Congress for 50 days—to keep us from reaching the 218 signatures needed on the discharge petition to force a vote on this bill. But they failed. People across the political spectrum demanded the truth. Once it was clear the bill would pass, President Trump told Republican members to vote for it.
To be clear: if Donald Trump actually wanted these files released, he could do it today—no congressional action required. Instead, he has fought transparency at every turn.
And even now, the Trump administration is laying the groundwork to keep these files hidden. Trump’s new “investigation” targeting Democrats could give the DOJ an excuse to withhold key documents, since the bill protects ongoing inquiries. Legal experts warn that the DOJ could use this as justification to keep nearly anything secret—even if the legislation becomes law.
Meanwhile, new documents released this week raise even more questions about Donald Trump’s relationship with Epstein and what he may have known. If the president and his allies have nothing to hide, they should welcome transparency—not attack it as a “Democratic hoax,” which, quite clearly, it is not.
Any unwillingness to pursue transparency around the Epstein investigation only reinforces how essential it is that we elect a House and Senate majority that will put victims, transparency, and accountability first. The American people deserve nothing less.
I will keep fighting with you for honesty, accountability, and a government worthy of the people in TX-07 and across the country. And for free and fair elections and fair maps to ensure that can happen.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

name: Cori Bush
subject: You were there when I needed you the most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs]
You were there when I needed you the most, Peter. I don’t take that for granted.
Now, I’m running for Congress again, and every insider and special interest that wants us to fail is watching. They’re waiting to see if we can raise the money it takes to run this campaign. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me again as I run for Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs]
If we fall short, they’ll say our movement is finished. If we rise up together, they’ll see the truth: we still have fight in us.
When I ran before, we shocked the establishment by building a campaign powered by people, not special interests. We did it once, and we can do it again. But we’ll need a steady base of support that shows we’re in this for the long haul.
To win , we need to prove that this campaign has the strength, energy, and grassroots power to win.
That’s why I’m asking you to become a monthly supporter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1] today.
Your recurring gift is more than a donation; it’s a commitment to keeping this movement alive. It’s an opportunity to show up for St. Louis and what matters most to our communities.
Will you join me with a monthly gift of $5, $10, or $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]
BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]
Every brick counts. Every month matters. Together, we’re building a movement that can’t be bought and won’t be silenced.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251119_brickbybrick_actrs&recurring=1]

St. Louis, MO 63132
United States

name: toddler mode
subject: Boebert throws TANTRUM on the House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Lauren Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab news headlines. Let’s send her home this Midterm.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016zSvC8deLeiaOqEALvaLcjr7XDPx0u3QYIJzN4b8vAgBI8-46pDrRqtoB02NSlNCo9StR2yQ46sBnTWHxwyUu-WN8KTAPWsj35cuiqJ6vJinHcijhO6lNI2jSZkOZmR2izfAtYOPSLQDO3Nz9hZamRVk19xNxIWPM0bkO_OlYbRej9p_BwUomH7wNvkv13jnIbhqc0kg-BqBgDDIWW5Tn1cMRteNWBhy&c=dWEgeJc_Ay_H7V3Y5FQ1iinvlV4s-897eJNpS3Y5wZJlGW2wYDf8tw==&ch=p-okNzDuzDdUWDBsSf3lkSWcTsa3-301YtnQ9EmUy1Dh9Mt4PxEwEw==)
---
|

Peter,
She's at it again.
Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert didn't get her way, and once again she melted down and used the floor of the United States House of Representatives to stage another shouting match.

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016zSvC8deLeiaOqEALvaLcjr7XDPx0u3QYIJzN4b8vAgBI8-46pDrRqtoB02NSlNCo9StR2yQ46sBnTWHxwyUu-WN8KTAPWsj35cuiqJ6vJinHcijhO6lNI2jSZkOZmR2izfAtYOPSLQDO3Nz9hZamRVk19xNxIWPM0bkO_OlYbRej9p_BwUomH7wNvkv13jnIbhqc0kg-BrvH8M-bifrxMCvsp9kAwbt&c=dWEgeJc_Ay_H7V3Y5FQ1iinvlV4s-897eJNpS3Y5wZJlGW2wYDf8tw==&ch=p-okNzDuzDdUWDBsSf3lkSWcTsa3-301YtnQ9EmUy1Dh9Mt4PxEwEw==)
---

Boebert acts like a toddler, but in reality she is a 38 year-old grandmother who should be setting a better example for her children and grandchildren.
Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children.
Lauren Boebert needs a timeout from politics.
Trisha Calvarese is Boebert's hometown Democratic opponent. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district--overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county because Colorado voters are sick and tired of her nonsense.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And now, we can put an end to her temper tantrums and attention-seeking behavior once and for all.
[Will you help send Boebert home by making a donation to Democrat Trisha Calvarese? Trisha is on the ground in this district every day connecting with voters and building the organization that will defeat Boebert this election.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016zSvC8deLeiaOqEALvaLcjr7XDPx0u3QYIJzN4b8vAgBI8-46pDrRqtoB02NSlNCo9StR2yQ46sBnTWHxwyUu-WN8KTAPWsj35cuiqJ6vJinHcijhO6lNI2jSZkOZmR2izfAtYOPSLQDO3Nz9hZamRVk19xNxIWPM0bkO_OlYbRej9p_BwUomH7wNvkv13jnIbhqc0kg-BqeK35mUrP8gYzuiFLfNAeB&c=dWEgeJc_Ay_H7V3Y5FQ1iinvlV4s-897eJNpS3Y5wZJlGW2wYDf8tw==&ch=p-okNzDuzDdUWDBsSf3lkSWcTsa3-301YtnQ9EmUy1Dh9Mt4PxEwEw==)

clean_body: Lauren Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab news headlines. Let’s send her home this Midterm. | | | | | == | Peter, She's at it again. Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert didn't get her way, and once again she melted down and used the floor of the United States House of Representatives to stage another shouting match. | == Boebert acts like a toddler, but in reality she is a 38 year-old grandmother who should be setting a better example for her children and grandchildren. Boebert has an almost pathological need to create chaos, drama, and lurid scandals that grab headlines--like when she was kicked out of a Denver theater during an afternoon showing of Beetlejuice for vaping, rudely yelling at staff, and inappropriate sexual touching with her date, in full view of children. Lauren Boebert needs a timeout from politics. Trisha Calvarese is Boebert's hometown Democratic opponent. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district--overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts. Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county because Colorado voters are sick and tired of her nonsense. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. And now, we can put an end to her temper tantrums and attention-seeking behavior once and for all. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == For everyone's sake, Boebert must be defeated. This election, we can send a powerful message to MAGA that we're fed up with their childish games. name: Wes Moore
subject: Donald Trump is coming after Democratic governors like me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Republicans are testing a field against me
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90e1f1d6-71fd-41cf-ba80-29485f232488/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, you probably already heard the news: I’m running for reelection for Governor of Maryland. Together, we’ve proven that progress is possible when we put people first. But Donald Trump is doubling down to push his agenda – and he’s already coming after states like ours and Democratic governors like me. That’s why I’m running: because Maryland needs a governor who will stand up to Trump’s dangerous threats and protect the progress we’ve made together. [Will you chip in a split contribution between our campaign and Blue Amp Action today to prove we won’t bow down to bullies and we’ll stand up for everyone?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60160e68-b012-45cb-a0a7-f2fffa7572fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Trump and Republicans in Washington are trying to erase our hard-fought progress, and Republicans are testing a whole field of candidates to try to defeat me. Former governor Larry Hogan, Andy Harris, and even some guy named Ed Hale could run against me with millions in spending behind them. I need you, Peter, if we’re going to be able to fight back. That’s why I have to ask: [Please, join our movement by making a split contribution between our reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action today. It will directly power our fight to leave no one behind.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T266b7b51-b5ff-442e-a8c0-acbe3727fe5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for being on this team! | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te336ff4b-6d05-4c51-bde7-1b938724575e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action | | or

body:
| | | Peter, At a time when Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are doing everything they can to make life harder for working people, we need real working class leaders who are ready to fight, not roll over. **That’s why we’re going to primary John Fetterman for his Senate seat in Pennsylvania.** He has voted with Trump more than almost any other Democratic senator this year,1 and was the ONLY senator in his party to confirm election-denier Pam Bondi as Attorney General. He’s been a staunch defender of the ongoing genocide in Gaza for over two years. And just last week, he was the deciding vote for a Republican funding bill that will strip health care from millions of Americans, and over 400,000 of his own constituents.2 [We’re sick and tired of Democrats who refuse to do the bare minimum to stand up for working people. clean_body: | | | Peter, At a time when Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are doing everything they can to make life harder for working people, we need real working class leaders who are ready to fight, not roll over. That’s why we’re going to primary John Fetterman for his Senate seat in Pennsylvania. He has voted with Trump more than almost any other Democratic senator this year,1 and was the ONLY senator in his party to confirm election-denier Pam Bondi as Attorney General. He’s been a staunch defender of the ongoing genocide in Gaza for over two years. And just last week, he was the deciding vote for a Republican funding bill that will strip health care from millions of Americans, and over 400,000 of his own constituents.2 We know this election is still two-plus years away. And while our attention is laser focused on the 2026 midterms, we believe the people of Pennsylvania deserve better than John Fetterman, and it’s imperative that we get a head start. We’ve already launched Signing up will get you plugged into the early building stages to defeat him AND build power across Pennsylvania in 2026 and 2027, too. And over the coming months, we’ll be hosting events across the state to identify candidates and train campaign staff on the basics of running for office. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , CAP Action, September 18, 2025 2\. , abc27 News, November 9, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . | | | Fellow American, I'm following-up on the important email I sent you recently. I just want to make sure you saw it.

If you haven't done so, please read it now.

Thanks,
Ted

Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California just stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to spare just 30 seconds to watch my launch video below — and then chip in $5, $10, or more to help our campaign hit the ground running and raise the resources we need to keep fighting for Californians in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594624/583606582/789508428?refcode=251119_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZhNThiYy04OWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=neVAZmSrQwA6bHn8al9HnjkcXJC70gPl7toZ4I6Q0t4=)

[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594626/583606584/-309737922?refcode=251119_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZhNThiYy04OWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=neVAZmSrQwA6bHn8al9HnjkcXJC70gPl7toZ4I6Q0t4=)
I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises.
My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank.
This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors.
**And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning.**
[**But we can’t do it without you. Your support today means we can build the campaign that matches the moment. If you believe in a district where your vote counts and your voice matters, then stand with me by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594627/583606585/789508428?refcode=251119_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZhNThiYy04OWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=neVAZmSrQwA6bHn8al9HnjkcXJC70gPl7toZ4I6Q0t4=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594628/583606586/-309737922?refcode=251119_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZhNThiYy04OWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=neVAZmSrQwA6bHn8al9HnjkcXJC70gPl7toZ4I6Q0t4=)

body:
A father, and a grandfather! Read my special memo:
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**I AM DONALD J. TRUMP!**
I’m the 45th and 47th President of the United States, but I’m also:
**a father,**
**and a grandfather!**
One of my top priorities as your President is to preserve the American Dream for the younger generations and beyond.
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
That’s why I’ve been working on changing the standard 30-year mortgage to a 50-year mortgage: that way we can ensure that young Americans can afford to buy a house.
_**[Do you approve?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**_
[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[REPLY WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
\- Donald J. Trump

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594932/583607253/-2091989232?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Opponent_251119_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQ0MWQ1Zi04YWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7h8goDX5XDtdxuP5nA5V3nWkhkflNZ2BVhj0nPOJys=) Derek, a far-right Republican just announced his campaign for Senate in Virginia, and he made one thing unmistakably clear:

**He’s running to be Donald Trump’s partner in the U.S. Senate.**

[_**Before we explain what his entrance into the race means for our campaign, please consider donating to Mark Warner’s reelection campaign to give us the early resources we need to protect this seat and flip the Senate blue >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594933/583607254/-2091989232?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Opponent_251119_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQ0MWQ1Zi04YWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7h8goDX5XDtdxuP5nA5V3nWkhkflNZ2BVhj0nPOJys=)

Our new opponent kicked off his campaign by echoing the GOP’s favorite talking points: attacking Democrats as “radicals” and promising unwavering loyalty to Trump.

Let’s be clear, Derek, he is not running a Virginia-focused campaign.

He’s running a Trump-focused campaign, and that means he’ll be a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda that is driving up costs, undermining affordable health care, and making Americans less safe.

**To put it plainly, Derek, the stakes in this race just got that much higher.**

This new opponent comes on the heels of Republican attacks on Senator Warner’s record delivering for Virginia: Donald Trump had a meltdown in the Oval Office and called Warner a “bad senator.” Laura Loomer launched a smear campaign against him on Twitter – calling for Warner to be “tried for treason” and “removed from office.”

**Now, with a brand new opponent in this race, we’re expecting these attacks to intensify, and we need to be ready.**

[_**Will you chip in today to Mark Warner’s reelection campaign? Your donation will help us fight back against whatever else Republicans throw our way, so we can protect this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594934/583607255/-2091989232?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Opponent_251119_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQ0MWQ1Zi04YWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7h8goDX5XDtdxuP5nA5V3nWkhkflNZ2BVhj0nPOJys=)

Thank you,

— Team Warner [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119594935/583607256/-2091989232?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Opponent_251119_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQ0MWQ1Zi04YWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7h8goDX5XDtdxuP5nA5V3nWkhkflNZ2BVhj0nPOJys=)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

THEN: Voters finally got a chance to fill the vacant seat in the Nov. 4 elections, and Amanda Edwards qualified to advance to a runoff election.

NOW: Gov. Abbott just set the special election runoff date for Jan. 31. [**Amanda and her opponent are in a dead heat, and she needs our support to get across the finish line in January. clean_body: The people of TX-18 deserve a representative like Amanda | = Peter, here's the latest on Amanda Edwards' race in Texas' 18th Congressional District: FIRST: When Democratic Rep. Sylvester Turner (TX-18) passed away in March, Republican Gov. Greg Abbott chose to leave this U.S. House seat vacant instead of calling a special election. THEN: Voters finally got a chance to fill the vacant seat in the Nov. 4 elections, and Amanda Edwards qualified to advance to a runoff election. NOW: Gov. Abbott just set the special election runoff date for Jan. 31. = | = It's crucial we elect Amanda Edwards to represent this district, which has gone without a voice for far too long. Greg Abbott has been playing political games to delay giving this solid-blue district a voice, but we're not folding, and right now, Amanda needs our help to secure the resources it takes to fight back and win on Jan. 31. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List.
