name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: I'm running for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119595590/583609738/-358924572?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20251119_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZGVjNGI3LThhYzUtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pGJ9cSYdViqYxhuAG8UBg5HFuKn8bKhIzhSiQBNfciA=)** It's official...

I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home.

Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero.

In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress.

**[This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.

**I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life.** But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.

Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.

We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.

**And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.**

None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."

**[Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. clean_body: | = It's official... I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home. Hi Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero. In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress. = | **= I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy. I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today. Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research. We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it. And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool. None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard." = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jack Schlossberg and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: = = = Talk soon, Jack | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. name: Team Crow
subject: Veterans can’t wait any longer for the help they deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

Jason went to war three times for this country, and throughout his time in Congress, he has worked hard to ensure his fellow veterans have the tools and support they need to transition to civilian life.

Veterans simply can’t wait any longer for the help they need. That’s why Jason just introduced five bills to combat challenges facing our veterans and ensure they have the resources to thrive when they return home.

Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of Jason’s legislation so we can support our nation’s veterans? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-veterans]

SIGN ON [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-veterans]

Jason’s legislation will enhance mental health care at the VA for veterans and expand access to educational opportunities for dependents of servicemembers. It improves care for veterans who are battling ALS, a debilitating disease that veterans are twice as likely to develop due to their service.

And Jason is also leading a bill that would reduce recidivism rates and provide support for veterans involved in the criminal justice system and better connect them to the resources they need to live sustainable lives.

We need supporters in your community to stand up today. Will you add your name to support this work and our nation’s veterans? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-veterans]

SIGN ON [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/pet-2511-veterans]

Thanks for your support today,

Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Chris Deluzio Headquarters
subject: Stephen Miller goes off on veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Stephen Miller just attacked Chris Deluzio. Trump’s right hand man accused him and his fellow Democratic intel and military veterans of insurrection for speaking up for our Constitution, and calling out Trump for threatening to pit our troops against the American people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119595785/583610144/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWE1MzAyNS04YmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIFEpyB2AJcWLfuBjDP_vhZVdAPOgOxvpp2ac0--_ds=&emci=eca5351f-8bc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e1a53025-8bc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) _Stephen Miller just attacked Chris Deluzio._

Trump’s right hand man accused him and his fellow Democratic intel and military veterans of insurrection for speaking up for our Constitution, and calling out Trump for threatening to pit our troops against the American people.

**Chris has said it before, and he’ll say it again: He won’t take a lecture from anyone who spewed lies about Trump’s 2020 election loss and supports the insurrectionists who attacked our Capitol on January 6th.**

In the Navy and in Congress, Chris swore an oath to defend the Constitution—and it’s why he’s fighting to defend our democratic institutions, to protect the right to vote, and to hold Donald Trump accountable to the Constitution.

Let’s be clear: The real oathbreakers were the January 6th rioters who stormed the Capitol and attacked their fellow Americans. [**If you love our country—if you believe the Constitution isn’t just words on paper—stand with Chris today. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Why I voted to release the Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We need to know the truth.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.94BWaI_7je3SP7Nztv7kqmO7pU6MRiC-3F7_R0Z5Yvo?) for more
---
# [Why I voted to release the Epstein files](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=179387380&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5Mzg3MzgwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1ODY0MjQsImV4cCI6MTc2NjE3ODQyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RdBH6tQ-WznhL0r2vfhYymn-byE11TYyRxgYuWq0d0w)
### We need to know the truth.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Nov 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL3doeS1pLXZvdGVkLXRvLXJlbGVhc2UtdGhlLWVwc3RlaW4_.Tp_aoBXdZ7C703XdXW-RnA8EVA2R_8csZeRY4a_nYoM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/why-i-voted-to-release-the-epstein?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I want to speak to you directly, not as a politician, but as an American who believes deeply in truth, accountability, and the responsibility we all share to protect the most vulnerable among us.
This week, something extraordinary happened in the House of Representatives.
After months of delay and failed lobbying by Donald Trump, an overwhelming bipartisan majority of my colleagues came together to force action on releasing the full Jeffrey Epstein files.
**I proudly signed that petition. And when the vote came to the floor,**_**I voted yes.**_
Let me be clear about why.
Newly revealed emails show that Jeffrey Epstein claimed Trump spent "hours" at his residence with one of Epstein's victims. That is a direct quote - _from Epstein himself._
That allegation alone demands answers. But this is about more than Trump's relationship with Epstein. It's about hundreds of victims, years of abuse, and bringing transparency to a system that failed far too many young women for far too long.
It's about powerful men who believed they were above the law - and a public that deserves to know the truth.
This isn't partisan. This isn't political. This is about transparency, justice, and whether we still believe that _no one_ - not a billionaire, not a royal, _not a president_ - is immune from accountability.
For weeks, Trump and his MAGA allies tried to block this vote. They hoped it would quietly disappear. But members from across the political spectrum stood up and said: Enough.
Even Trump, once it became clear where this was heading, tried to reverse his position and act like he supported it all along. But let's be honest: This vote only happened because people like you stood up and spoke out.
And it passed. That's a win for transparency, but it's only the beginning.
At the end of the day, we have to decide what kind of country we want to be: Do we look away from injustice because it's politically inconvenient? Or do we confront it - no matter how powerful the people involved may be?
I know where I stand. I hope you do, too.
Thank you for reading and for being part of this fight.
More soon,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d9b15355-f136-4f02-a729-b180d5fd418c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: justice for victims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119596088/583611006/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251119_ST_EpsteinVote_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjZiMWVhZi04YmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9SyfpzmacTP5miqNbQkmM1BKUDo3nVzQmULwf3v_rxQ=&emci=08722206-7fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f26b1eaf-8bc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Yesterday, I voted to release the Epstein files because the American public deserves transparency and the victims deserve justice.

As a former prosecutor, we must hold perpetrators of child abuse accountable and fight to protect victims of sexual abuse.

The bill to release the Epstein files passed the House with nearly every member, except one, voting for the bill. Republicans and Democrats together felt that this isn’t about politics, it’s about accountability for the perpetrators, justice for the victims, and transparency and truth for the people.

Thank you.

This isn't a new attack, but it's especially out of touch right now. Here are the facts:

→ Democrats like Lisa Blunt Rochester voted against Republicans' efforts to gut health care funding.
→ Democrats also demanded that Americans be given their SNAP benefits during the shutdown.
→ Republicans blamed the entire shutdown on "radical" Democrats.

**_If wanting to ensure people have enough food to eat is radical now, then sure, we guess Senate Democrats are radical._**

The MAGA movement continues to inch closer and closer to the right, team. And honestly, it's concerning.

**We're hoping to raise just $2,500 from this email so we can fill the Senate with more leaders like Lisa, who don't think it's too extreme to want every American to have 3 meals a day.**

Against protecting abortion rights. Every time there’s a chance to stand up for Pennsylvanians, Scott Perry stands with Trump. Enough is enough. We’re building the grassroots movement to take Perry down and send a message to every extremist politician who puts Trump before democracy. But we can’t do it without you. = | | = Together, we can ensure that Scott Perry never gets another chance to overturn your vote. — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , , and **! | | Friend, Around this time last year, we were all thanking our lucky stars for Trump’s big victory. And now? We’re finally seeing all the good he’s doing for folks around the country.

With Thanksgiving right around the corner, I thought it’d be a good time to take stock of our blessings. **[Before you start thawing that turkey, I want to hear from you: Out of all the things we have to be grateful for this year, what’s at the top of your list?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/MNpY9TwII1loZJAxVEfuS5-0A9IWLPC89R99ZMerB7TcMetIuffo2JURKdrQhnJPqU82no7qZd6e1_y40STawUnsa4zwCw3z7giZqNThOVDQcgjr0axWGbGVWVYiH2sNd8CHzskqXQwqa2k16Vpg7ejKavq0eY4e1MLxua1ZSrbJwRxcTTL20MgpRJSZn6ZA5G0Fz5sMXYsEcZ3w7Iv_G15K9G2jCInXoGcfABl_hEa8tG1ySdNSdJdZ1B896IFJZDF6fk_KqAcf_UNe0aoxb6mzaSy-c4v2iCG_SZoIAPjgXxA37KxZFMXKCOlpjhGxcDXWPPvrYsXHRDpEj6bzJuqtgdiiCR4Ac-Cc2UGQ7gH9DDoN0j2iVGtDRAFMjTOKwRtiHXJb7iroO_gXNgJ-LayBuo7kLAWqJU7t_IlZHFLjbLW9MQf691aPsPgdgCTloN57OajFYS_-sIDPOMAbmg3LskHTmXsL8TZF04VI4d550WWWGD9TW_KYSH2ahh-y1OEw8Dc1WUIRamjYFNcUl2OKUGtzSFOgT1OmqEoshdlJvaj_VorCABgCiV3gSsMtKuQHMyUnojEPzUp70zd095AjAHrQcXHUP-DtF5dslFnWcKiAOM-4a3U8zJvZCtT0mIkN_2BmJW0olyE7n6gQ9tU_3JvTXe9J4Zw8zY8/T_mQRZeHFWrAmSPRu9Hqb25tkbZy0LLf/15)**

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Charlie left us the blueprint
body:
Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history.

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Taking a moment to update you directly.
body:
|
#
Friend, There’s a lot that’s been happening in the race for MI-08, so I wanted to take a moment to update you directly.
* With national redistricting changes, the Cook Political Report just determined **MI-08 is the “tipping point”** that could decide control of the House next year.

* Even before this was announced, MAGA had already spent **$1 million** on false attack ads against me. Trump won this district by 2 points – and Republicans know that the earlier they strike, the easier it is to flip this seat and keep the House.

* **Now that word is spreading that MI-08 is the key to the majority,** we have to prepare for the attacks to ramp up.

Let me be clear, friend: MI-08 is now Seat 218 – the district that will determine if we take back the gavel. If we’re going to defend this seat, we’re going to need all the resources and support we can get now. So I have to ask: [**Can I count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us defend MI-08? I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9a7eb94ae3a40fa820fd3f06b26e826&_e=Mp_QEyRPPwM1BADi-xll09NbJ2L-7w1132YRlNv-U5XuRiWdoSZnd5BQXIAC5hZm1z22lxHlNqeUqg2yEhENgIvoHHkfMWAq8JW4_Ldo0h32Wndwsu66ioPjXk6a3n9-rhJWdtOoyJrT7ps2uSIm-DU7b7-R9acg_WUVid6Ln3YJcq80um6nmIRySFUf29DYOEaAdVODHySaGkTF35mfAlYS5-yTAqvQT04sYEAkTmLUUqSQe4llY-VmfStxeuApNP5tP_EQufdyE1gqYuY_z32NXvLKGv5Qx3GmWwgu-V95Td6wfIi4ANBZWuCvfu9pwAUkahd8LG8i28CZg_HhSMDN3L6aRxjZHbaLSjWWjbEQv1XqgahsnJSCKiZMxEBHyS5j25VAfaBWXGxREwge4j5aYnFpOW_bpc6TgzfiwoSuAHmBkpQ0ohh0_ofhmsvos_8STupIeSoLY9OsCBWZANIMMxHX4VT5J9K9Z5teODgRye_uy-YiQlVKqU095O_6HUe1hGlIOB_OgmaCpkibbNvn_X6nyLXctv--ZLmo8ZwDmdAmEZD4W5Be2H_nnG4DJaZ-kx-MPWNrvxmKYm_8X8ceBCgDAXFz_7hofo4AIuERrS3cOQfPDVm98LSI_a1sT4fxEgHkTlqe2WHhnA-hc6V6-2TjkAzD8YEwHfcvcmiCKCyp0uSA3siFZnhgL1PUkW469Y56vIa10DFrk3_E7nAYsDpWAT9pjRmI4r41u7hMfmO_WAutpA9sSEQuYiv5xY7aLkeM31EJyZcKyZtusQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c9a7eb94ae3a40fa820fd3f06b26e826&_e=Mp_QEyRPPwM1BADi-xll09NbJ2L-7w1132YRlNv-U5XuRiWdoSZnd5BQXIAC5hZm1z22lxHlNqeUqg2yEhENgIvoHHkfMWAq8JW4_Ldo0h32Wndwsu66ioPjXk6a3n9-rhJWdtOoyJrT7ps2uSIm-DU7b7-R9acg_WUVid6Ln3YJcq80um6nmIRySFUf29DYOEaAdVODHySaGkTF35mfAlYS5-yTAqvQT04sYEAkTmLUUqSQe4llY-VmfStxeuApNP5tP_EQufdyE1gqYuY_z0N58KIButgj2YJuLM7WLv3R2tMItFpaEMb-RDgoRJp6UDassXQfb-Uruudg7h9gPCFHes-PadqOG4h759RyCJDbLHoXZIcoi5gMN34yiEcjGjov64XiUup_quSNpVnbMt0O57C_7uWa8JXDL-QBOIeTngcwbRAj_4nDIGVa23RDm9W4QaREratkUiLYSe4sbVJg9JJ3fIZLSGHqABkHT9gdNU0oPxOD_JRQvszVMPgnH3iCSVZhIGgGTV3DJ8ebVxQJ0irf26AK7964JdpnD-pVXubrNW7Z9S9cmxF9VazFyLxnMq1AsPRML5m8kV_Y6pOWM37zheBOlxL54tA7_T6zdRIeXTaSoHo1Te1TFqYuX_oKVYAj4of-LxopdE6OTCy8aiUYwyy1QddXvzEJmSsu6GpHug7olkvhXlOP9Oxw6DeEqg6cpPntUh2kvO1j-_FDzx_PIiDjmbNvprPiS9miUm5V-a0EHskBzugSWzclMszF6wZ8b4fXr_rJyXbngQ%3D%3D)**_

My socialist opponent’s record?

\- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (_**fueled by open borders**_) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year.

\- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation.

President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence.

He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms.

My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers.

_**he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. **_

clean_body: I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | Fellow Conservative, Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates. In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. My socialist opponent’s record? \- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (fueled by open borders) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year. \- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation. President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence. He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms. My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers. he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. We need FINANCIAL FIREPOWER to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long. Every dollar arms the next generation of American strength—and will help us bury Bernie’s agenda in Minnesota. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: the design in our campaign logo
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I think it’s only right that you’re clued in on a small but important detail about our campaign.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)
You are a critical part of this team, so I think it’s only right that you’re clued in on a small but important detail about our campaign.
**Have you ever noticed the Zia sun symbol within our official campaign logo?**
[****](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=2&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)_This sun symbol originated from the Zia Pueblo._
This symbol probably looks familiar to fellow New Mexicans. It’s called the Zia sun, and can be found on our state flag, on license plates, in the state Capitol building, and more. It’s an iconic emblem that New Mexicans are proud of.
[****](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=3&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)_Our beautiful state flag is emblazoned with the iconic Zia sun._
But there’s a deeper meaning behind the Zia sun that I think you should know. It’s a sacred symbol to the Indigenous people of Zia Pueblo. To Zia Pueblo, four is a sacred number that symbolizes the Circle of Life: four winds, four seasons, four directions, and four sacred obligations. The circle binds the four elements of four together. We should all learn and respect the history of the Zia sun as we celebrate its beauty and significance to our state.
**Today, our strong desert sun is just as important to our future as it was to our Indigenous ancestors.** The New Mexico sunshine is the engine behind our breathtaking natural landscapes, vibrant agricultural economy, and a source of power for thousands of our homes. It also motivates us to do more.
**We have over 320 days of sun in New Mexico – building an economy around solar energy is a smart investment that will lower the cost of utilities and create good-paying union jobs.**
[****](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=4&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)_While I was Secretary of the Interior, our Administration accelerated solar energy development across the West._
**From issues like climate change to education and housing affordability, we must be bold enough to face tough challenges and fight for a bright future for all.** I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and change the game for New Mexico, but I can’t win this campaign without your help. We’ll need a lot of resources to organize across our state and speak with voters about our ambitious plans for the future, so I have to ask:
**[Can you chip in $5 today, so we can grow our grassroots campaign for New Mexico? Your support is what makes our fight possible.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=5&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=24&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)**
Be fierce,
Deb ☀️
P.S. My grandmother taught me to wake up every morning, greet the sun, and say a prayer to welcome that spirit into your life. [**If you agree we must embrace the power of our New Mexico sunshine as we build a bright future for our state, can you chip in $5 so we can win this race?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251119_1_nmsun.wr7Wo-&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-5782&t=25&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251119-1&t=26&refcode2=5782_400544_FK-aMp&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=27&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=28&akid=5782%2E400544%2EFK-aMp)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Nancy Northup
subject: You helped stop the most extreme abortion ban in the country
body:
South Carolina lawmakers tried to move fast. We moved faster. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119596936/583613847/2083279016?sourceid=1150981&utm_campaign=26emkge-1110aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sb323&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAwNGU2NC04ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_mtXNm4965y5DtOo0AhwKSLOY7KnUr4KeNtr93x_a4=&emci=6d4f3d2a-ccc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40004e64-8fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,

[I wanted to share an important update from South Carolina—and a major victory that supporters like you helped make possible.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119596937/583613848/2083279016?sourceid=1150981&utm_campaign=26emkge-1110aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sb323&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAwNGU2NC04ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_mtXNm4965y5DtOo0AhwKSLOY7KnUr4KeNtr93x_a4=&emci=6d4f3d2a-ccc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40004e64-8fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

In recent weeks, extremist lawmakers attempted to fast-track S.323, a sweeping bill that would have created the most extreme abortion ban in the country. It would have criminalized pregnant people, targeted access to medication abortion, threatened providers, penalized anyone who shared information about abortion care, and more.

Their strategy relied on pushing the bill forward quickly and quietly. With our partners at the **Women's Rights and Empowerment Network (WREN) and other members of the state coalition** , we made sure that didn't happen. Our State Policy & Advocacy Team worked closely with WREN on analysis, talking points, and strategy—and then helped catalyze a national effort to shine a spotlight on what was unfolding:
* Nimra Chowdhry, our Senior State Legislative Counsel, spoke with ABC News, the New York Times, and the Huffington Post to bring national attention to the threat.
* We shared a comprehensive messaging and resources guide with press outlets, state and national partners, and members of Congress.
* We elevated the issue for hundreds of thousands of followers across our social channels ahead of both hearings.

[Together, we made it impossible for lawmakers to move S.323 unnoticed—and just yesterday, when the Senate Medical Affairs Subcommittee had the chance to advance the bill, the vote failed 3–2.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119596938/583613849/2083279016?sourceid=1150981&utm_campaign=26emkge-1110aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sb323&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAwNGU2NC04ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_mtXNm4965y5DtOo0AhwKSLOY7KnUr4KeNtr93x_a4=&emci=6d4f3d2a-ccc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40004e64-8fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

This is a tremendous victory for South Carolinians, who showed an unwavering resolve in fighting back against a bill that threatened abortion, IVF, contraception, and even free speech.

Your commitment makes victories like this possible—and keeps us fighting for reproductive freedom everywhere.

Warmly,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. [If you're inspired by this win, make a gift today and it will go 2X as far to help protect reproductive freedom wherever it's under attack.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119596939/583613850/2083279016?sourceid=1150981&utm_campaign=26emkge-1110aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sb323&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAwNGU2NC04ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_mtXNm4965y5DtOo0AhwKSLOY7KnUr4KeNtr93x_a4=&emci=6d4f3d2a-ccc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40004e64-8fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119596940/583613851/2083279016?sourceid=1150981&utm_campaign=26emkge-1110aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=sb323&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDAwNGU2NC04ZmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_mtXNm4965y5DtOo0AhwKSLOY7KnUr4KeNtr93x_a4=&emci=6d4f3d2a-ccc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=40004e64-8fc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

clean_body: South Carolina lawmakers tried to move fast. We moved faster. | | | Dear Peter, In recent weeks, extremist lawmakers attempted to fast-track S.323, a sweeping bill that would have created the most extreme abortion ban in the country. It would have criminalized pregnant people, targeted access to medication abortion, threatened providers, penalized anyone who shared information about abortion care, and more. Their strategy relied on pushing the bill forward quickly and quietly. With our partners at the Women's Rights and Empowerment Network (WREN) and other members of the state coalition , we made sure that didn't happen. Our State Policy & Advocacy Team worked closely with WREN on analysis, talking points, and strategy—and then helped catalyze a national effort to shine a spotlight on what was unfolding: Nimra Chowdhry, our Senior State Legislative Counsel, spoke with ABC News, the New York Times, and the Huffington Post to bring national attention to the threat. We shared a comprehensive messaging and resources guide with press outlets, state and national partners, and members of Congress. * We elevated the issue for hundreds of thousands of followers across our social channels ahead of both hearings. This is a tremendous victory for South Carolinians, who showed an unwavering resolve in fighting back against a bill that threatened abortion, IVF, contraception, and even free speech. Your commitment makes victories like this possible—and keeps us fighting for reproductive freedom everywhere. Warmly, Nancy Northup President & CEO P.S. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

_**Disclosure** : Brand mentions reflect factual client work, past and present, and do not imply endorsement._
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: The power of people like you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Our work didn’t end on Election Day.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251119-1&t=1&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)
Peter, the work for our 2025 endorsed candidates didn’t end on Election Day.
Two of our candidates — **Akbar Ali in Georgia** and **Christian Menefee in Texas** — advanced to runoff elections, putting them within striking distance of victory.
David and our whole team are laser-focused on winning these elections. These are two critical opportunities to advance our mission of electing young, bold progressives who are ready to meet this moment. _And we don’t like to lose!_
David doesn’t have as much time to focus on fundraising these next few weeks and fundraising tends to slow during the holidays, so we’re relying even more on this grassroots team. We gotta do all we can to win these special elections and lay the solid baseline of our funding for 2026. We don’t have special interests and corporate PACs backing our efforts, but we have something much better: **people like you. And we need your help long before the election.**
**[Can you start a recurring contribution now to sustain this crucial work, Peter?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251119_1_recurring.SO8VXQ&refcode=em20251119-2852&amount=5&t=3&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251119_1_recurring.SO8VXQ&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-2852&t=4&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring contribution to Leaders We Deserve._
Our monthly supporters provide a foundation of support that allows us to recruit, train, and support young progressive candidates to challenge the status quo.
It gives us a clear forecast about how much we can invest in these races. We have to keep our fundraising on track so we can power the next generation of leaders.
Right now, we need to keep David on the road supporting Akbar and Christian. Then, we’re setting our sights on electing even more candidates next November.
But none of that is possible if we don’t keep up with our monthly fundraising. If we miss our goals, we risk having to slow down our efforts and work on fewer races.
**That’s why your support is essential, Peter. And it goes even further when you commit to a monthly donation.[Will you start a $5 recurring gift now?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251119_1_recurring.SO8VXQ&refcode=em20251119-2852&amount=5&t=5&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2774?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251119_1_recurring.SO8VXQ&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-2852&t=6&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)**
Thanks for your continued support. You make our game-changing work possible.
Leaders We Deserve
P.S. Can’t make it monthly? **[Your one-time donation of $5 or any amount right now will help keep Leaders on track as we prepare to win these runoffs.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251119_1_recurring.eDh1gd&refcode=em20251119-2852&amount=5&t=7&akid=2852%2E587540%2ExscTfw)**
* * *

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Help build support for my new resolution to recognize genocide in Gaza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We’re demanding the U.S. take immediate, concrete action to prevent and punish the crime of genocide. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWfdLaL5jioVo_ytv-yQX8D-zA66HGqO7ZrJu59oxWFfHZBXtrU7KX0XBA0UHelieTWqciFA6tT6RPu6mQ4kZBJyuqDfvFNgGcwsLNWwAmAgFdYtZrQ-LqAHqxcnfRsPUnrGAFkLNdgTW3Iy7z-LoX6OHlslOYTpztkALeFfjgFq3sVemFIzjozAH5zEAKGfaupC2gExzAsiqDEBkh318tIGXUdqmHdPP9rzIB_2kf6OZmQ9m6jYV7Rdq4jKBOW5D7vbFbsl2744IigJ3zsQoCEg/4lq/x_DFXzfuTEWoWQRICS_5qA/h0/h001.Fti32aocAB86t_u8iWeylLBWQx-Uye9ui-qbgcCA20M)

Friend, The Israeli government’s genocide in Gaza has not ended, and the U.S. continues sending weapons to a genocidal military. This horror will not end until we act. **That’s why I introduced a new resolution in the House of Representatives: “Recognizing the Genocide of the Palestinian People in Gaza.”** It already has support from 20 of my colleagues and over 100 organizations. Agreeing with Palestinians in Gaza, experts have concluded that the two-year slaughter and forced starvation of Palestinians is genocide—from the International Association of Genocide Scholars, to the United Nations Independent International Commission of Inquiry, to human rights groups such as Amnesty International (which endorsed this resolution), Doctors Without Borders, and Israel-based B’Tselem. **If passed, House Resolution 876 would require the United States to follow international law and respect its obligations under the Genocide Convention to prevent and punish the crime of genocide, including:**
* Ending all relevant arms and equipment transfers to Israel
* Investigating and prosecuting individuals and corporations in the U.S. that are complicit in Israel’s genocide
* Fully complying with the orders of the International Court of Justice and investigations of the International Criminal Court
* Implementing required-by-law sanctions on the Israeli officials responsible, as well as individuals and corporations involved in the genocide against the Palestinian people

[**Right now, I’m building support in Congress and across the country for this historic resolution to recognize and end Israel’s genocide while holding its perpetrators accountable. Please donate today to power our work to push the U.S. to end its participation in genocide, the crime of crimes.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtyUGJfIdocGP4b-CKCrGMMltzbxTqc9accTcwjZLSunmhyR_46FdJp53jS--Q0dVbLHyTeoa2OJFkJLpRGaZopK-PtX_sKieOo2ZmH0-UmM5YoQSGm2EhRmJHTLKIwyvG50SxgaPVMRV6kQgUKxhoLNdUr9I2BEomTq8o1jNpZcEiw4YOf9L4fY2riF7g1aU11U3Qbvx_cXWvuw9Y7r4Q4jBqTlRrsYLYdkibFhtmWpnxD1ZG_ORAln9e2G767f8RRs_n2rn4mEdmUtqUrWyLSRbnzlmu8SXHpl1KzK1tt5MwPBsugQAAvhQ7EogbnG1NTr6XPO0RlaHAhAs8C2oWY2VOqZYhcK2XwyLZTxgyCZzbq04eDtwx3wHcBUp7vF-hivMdd887hk1oxyzWoW07xdOXVsz0wNuxv0Sbz0UrYjQ/4lq/x_DFXzfuTEWoWQRICS_5qA/h1/h001.TGEWqi3vLCjD8ctMPsbh96pH3jwqYX_HSIc--CgSXlA) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtyUGJfIdocGP4b-CKCrGMMltzbxTqc9accTcwjZLSunt0JZLvnyuGP0ecCqgILh7HBogiIJ0kS4K3lz7jrb5tsfbePHiCzNTgWJ_FiG9K3UHkZ68zHAqvamkjjrDm0mGYK3jbYIZvf4MXTT8EcUexuQwVmfIFDI1MwrbcwmSAc3ZLEpyl5yLU3oHcZ89FViKQAElEw8p_V_ZVkXHfTMp8Nyv5UE0f6jquz3f56N2_D0JnN9VELcXSxnUtK2bmE3t1CPF6M5xZBsFwpc8qRRJgX8Qx-e9NReHcxiM1f-DBMyN_YENJrIyjOZeeFvF4dmI2xYPy6ysa6G_EE2h0H5EIUfkigR79YdOFd16xOTNFFWDQhec4uAHrrF-Ip-eeTyqFtyDskfHt49lTU1Quj-0hgpcqh1jDX9XpDnHrTawPzvA/4lq/x_DFXzfuTEWoWQRICS_5qA/h2/h001.0fl9RNZSfGTuv8vNfGarO-IT4mpI3JIaWK5JlqdSKGM)

Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its supporters are already building their campaign against us. They’re trying to stop this resolution and cover up the truth.
But our movement is growing larger every day, and support for Palestinians’ human rights is also growing in Congress.
We will keep standing up for the right to live freely. As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I’m reminding my colleagues that Palestinians are human beings. And together, we won’t stop demanding the United States follow its legal obligations to prevent and punish genocide.

clean_body: We’re demanding the U.S. take immediate, concrete action to prevent and punish the crime of genocide. | | | Friend, The Israeli government’s genocide in Gaza has not ended, and the U.S. continues sending weapons to a genocidal military. This horror will not end until we act. That’s why I introduced a new resolution in the House of Representatives: “Recognizing the Genocide of the Palestinian People in Gaza.” It already has support from 20 of my colleagues and over 100 organizations. Agreeing with Palestinians in Gaza, experts have concluded that the two-year slaughter and forced starvation of Palestinians is genocide—from the International Association of Genocide Scholars, to the United Nations Independent International Commission of Inquiry, to human rights groups such as Amnesty International (which endorsed this resolution), Doctors Without Borders, and Israel-based B’Tselem. If passed, House Resolution 876 would require the United States to follow international law and respect its obligations under the Genocide Convention to prevent and punish the crime of genocide, including: Ending all relevant arms and equipment transfers to Israel Investigating and prosecuting individuals and corporations in the U.S. that are complicit in Israel’s genocide Fully complying with the orders of the International Court of Justice and investigations of the International Criminal Court Implementing required-by-law sanctions on the Israeli officials responsible, as well as individuals and corporations involved in the genocide against the Palestinian people | Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its supporters are already building their campaign against us. They’re trying to stop this resolution and cover up the truth. But our movement is growing larger every day, and support for Palestinians’ human rights is also growing in Congress. We will keep standing up for the right to live freely. As the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, I’m reminding my colleagues that Palestinians are human beings. And together, we won’t stop demanding the United States follow its legal obligations to prevent and punish genocide. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for always being by my side as we expose our country’s involvement in genocidal atrocities. We won’t let Palestinians be erased, and we will do all we can to prevent further loss of life. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Fair Fight
subject: From flipping Georgia to flipping Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
This has been a key focus of our work in 2025, and winning more elections like these will only become more critical. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119598312/583618714/1793776944?refcode=emm_ff_20251119_T1_MSwins_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGUyZDYyOC05M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsopsYVLUJdhHXDNx7XKqQ0XMk57LFbb8iEeUXeXwvs=&emci=5124f41e-93c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ade2d628-93c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | We want to make sure you know about some extraordinary victories you helped make possible this month, in a place that too many political observers write off: Mississippi. Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to invest in electing Democracy Champions to critical state-level offices — and it paid off. With our Mississippi partners, we:
* Added Democratic seats in the Mississippi legislature **for the first time in decades**
* **Broke the Republican supermajority** in the State Senate and ended the effective GOP supermajority in the House
* Flipped two Senate seats, held another, nearly flipped a reach target, and flipped a key House district

**This has been a key focus of our work in 2025.** State legislators are on the front lines of the fight for voting fights — to stop restrictive bills and pass policies that ensure equal access to the ballot box. So **winning races like these is critical to ensuring free and fair elections.** **And state legislative elections will only grow more vital** now that the Supreme Court looks likely to kick off a new state-by-state gerrymandering scramble for 2026. That’s why we’ve got to keep applying this winning model. These Mississippi victories weren't narrow squeaks. Our candidates overperformed almost across the board with significant margins of victory, even as Republicans poured resources into these races through the state party and multiple independent expenditure groups.
**Here’s what our investment looked like on the ground — powered by this grassroots movement, and in partnership with our in-state partners, the state party and local coalition leaders:**
* Gave ongoing support to candidates and their teams, even while some were only just thinking about running
* Supported the party and campaigns as they knocked on tens of thousands of doors, sent mail pieces to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and sent hundreds of thousands of text messages
* Built robust voter protection infrastructure at the state party, including training 40 poll watchers

We didn’t come out of nowhere — and we aren’t going anywhere. Earlier this year, we helped flip nine municipal seats in Mississippi, helping voters build a habit of turning out at the polls even in a so-called “off year.” And the grassroots teams we supported will continue winning Mississippi elections for years to come.
So keep an eye on the state’s U.S. Senate race in 2026: the Republican incumbent is a consistent underperformer, the Democratic candidate for governor in 2023 only lost by about 3.2%, and we’re proud to support Scott Colom, a District Attorney who’s an incredibly strong candidate.
The 2025 election results give us hope for the future — and so do you. Your support has helped win key races and helped build the infrastructure, leadership, and momentum we need to defend democracy.
**This is what it looks like to build pro-voter power in the South. It’s how we helped transform Georgia into a critical swing state. It’s how we’ll keep gaining ground in places like Mississippi. And it’s how we’ll expand this model — with support from this team.**
**[Thank you for making this work possible. If you’re able to build on our momentum with a donation today, it would go a long way to deliver more victories for democracy — and we’d be deeply grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119598330/583618733/-413138639?refcode=emm_ff_20251119_T1_MSwins_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGUyZDYyOC05M2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsopsYVLUJdhHXDNx7XKqQ0XMk57LFbb8iEeUXeXwvs=)**
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Team

clean_body: But I knew you could handle the truth! | | | | This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I’ll tell you straight: what I heard is not good. The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished. I couldn’t sit on this. I wrote you a quick note because you’ve always stood with me when it matters most. – DJT | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: To the billionaires: you can’t use your wealth to hide

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119598872/583620338/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzI3ZWVlOS05NGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SDp0n63hFePMDgJBeXdxvFNObWKaKbCD1EvRFzFlw4=&emci=755c3115-81c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bc27eee9-94c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter – **I voted this week to release the Jeffrey Epstein files.** And it will prove what we already knew: Trump and Epstein were friends, and they were in regular contact with one another. **Let this be a watershed moment for everyone. To the billionaires: you can't use your wealth to hide. To the survivors: justice is coming.** Trump made draining the swamp such a hallmark of his campaign, but when it comes down to it, he's looking out for himself, and his staunch yes-men like Mike Johnson will do anything to protect him. Americans overwhelmingly want to see the full and unredacted Epstein files and know, once and for all, the facts surrounding these horrific crimes. **It's our job as Americans – and it's my job as a member of Congress – to hold the powerful accountable for their actions and make sure the rule of law is applied to**** _everyone_****.** [**If you can invest in competitive races like this one, we can retake the Democratic majority, block their far-right agenda, and force real transparency, accountability, and openness in the federal government. Can I count on your support today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119598873/583620339/-1599294071?refcode=2025-11-19-epstein&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bc27eee9-94c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzI3ZWVlOS05NGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5SDp0n63hFePMDgJBeXdxvFNObWKaKbCD1EvRFzFlw4=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Val Hoyle instantly:

Let’s make hope together! | [View in browser](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjU3OTUzMTkxLFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiMGEyNmZkZDA1Zjg3M2YzOSJ9)

|

|
# Hope For Climate Change
---

| | [ Subscribe ](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjcxNTg0NjgyLFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiMzZlZmEyNzljZmYzNzk2NCJ9)
---
|
---
|
# Invitation
Is there hope that something can be done about climate change, especially given the moment we are in? **I believe there is still hope because I believe in us**.
The [Climate Hope Together Substack](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjc1Nzc4OTg3LFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiMTNlNDc5NjUzYmVkY2JlYiJ9) is an invitation to action. It is an invitation to: · [become a part of](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjc4OTI0NzE2LFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiOGEyOGY1ZDA1ZTU5OGVlNyJ9) what will be the greatest and most long-lasting social change movement in the history of the world, the Climate Movement; · become a Climate Action Supporter if you are not ready to join a movement; we won’t overcome climate change unless we have both a movement and Climate Action Supporters, who are the clinchers, the closers, the action sustainers, the stable base of popular support for all we do; · [join together](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjgzMTE5MDIzLFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiZmI3ZTNhYzFkOGFlOGQ4NSJ9) to overcome climate change by creating a just and prosperous sustainability that enhances wellbeing for everyone and everything; · answer the call to do what’s right, to work together to stop bad stuff, set wrong right, and make things better — the three actions of justice; · affirm the _[Better Future Covenant](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjg2MjY0NzUyLFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiZjViZmNlMzgxNzBlZDU2MCJ9)_ that together we will leave today’s children and their children and subsequent generations a better world free from pollution and the threat of climate change, a world with justice and prosperity where everyone has what they need to live the lives intended for them, where everyone can become who they were meant to be; · work together to make the impossible possible and the possible actual and the actual beautiful — all at the speed and scale necessary as we make hope happen by making our future come faster. When you accept this invitation and [subscribe](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjkwNDU5MDU3LFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiZGQ5OTRjM2JhMDdkMGU5OSJ9) to Climate Hope Together you will find hope for our journey. That’s because: · Working together brings hope. · Taking actions that make a difference brings hope. · Being a part of the fight for justice brings hope. · Creating a better future brings hope. · Doing all of these things out of love brings hope. Emily Dickinson said: “Not knowing when the dawn will come, I open every door.” The dawn is here. Together we will walk through doors into the dawn shining on our faces, lighting our way as we create a better more beautiful world. We are no longer looking for hope. Together, we _are_ the hope as we make hope happen. We are hope-makers and beauty-creators. We are the hope we’ve been waiting for. [Subscribe](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjkzNjA0Nzg2LFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiYWIzMjY4NWY2ZjA5Yjg2YSJ9) to the Climate Hope Together Substack and stay plugged in to hope! And thanks for all you’re doing. [Jim Ball](https://vvjoamr.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE5MTgzMTYsXCJsXCI6MTcxNTM3MDgxMjk3Nzk5MDkxLFwiclwiOjE3MTUzNzA5NDE5NzM4MDE0OX0iLCJzIjoiOGZlMjRlZDgxYTIxNzQ2ZiJ9) _
__Climate activist and thinker since ‘92. ”Together we make the impossible possible and the possible actual and the actual beautiful and our future come faster.”_
---

* * *
* * *
### The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication
### Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/0774f3c3-d8ff-43d8-a46a-b116fabef305?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
A strategy memo from Market Institute to congressional Republicans details how good Alzheimer's policy is good politics. Polling by Trump's pollster, Tony Fabrizio, illustrates how GOP candidates can win key swing districts in the 2026 midterms, delivering a red wave.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c119669-c7f9-46e9-b851-b28110bb590c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
**MEMORANDUM - Congressional Republicans / Chiefs of Staff**
**From:** Market Institute
**Date:** November 19, 2025
**Subject:** Polling confirms: Fighting Alzheimer's can be the winning issue for Republicans in tight races
More than [7 million Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/1fb4c60c-de11-4824-b32b-75890495974b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are living with Alzheimer's today, a number projected to nearly double by 2060. Voters across the country are carrying the emotional and financial burdens of caring for aging loved ones.
For all Republicans committed to principled, compassionate, and fiscally responsible health leadership, this is a moment to step up and be the party that prioritizes Alzheimer's prevention. Not only is it the right thing to do, good policy, and cost-effective, but [new polling](https://substack.com/redirect/c9283756-81d7-437b-a433-f2302efb8855?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) shows that Alzheimer's could be a tide-turning issue in close congressional races.
**Bottom line**
● Polling shows that voters across the political spectrum in the _most competitive_ congressional districts overwhelmingly favor policies that increase access to Alzheimer's testing and treatment.
● Championing policies to tackle the Alzheimer's crisis would give Republican candidates a substantial advantage over Democrats in these must-win districts--and doing so may well determine the balance of power in Congress next session.

**What the polling says (targeting logic)**
The 28 most competitive House districts (listed below) will determine which party controls Congress after the 2026 midterm elections. **According to new polling from these districts, Republicans could go from a 3-point deficit to a 19-point lead over Democrats by stepping up their fight against Alzheimer 's.** Republicans should focus Alzheimer's messaging in these competitive districts, potentially targeting those with key demographic indicators such as an older population.

_AK-AL; AZ-01; AZ-06; CA-09; CA-13; CA-41; CO-03; CO-08; IA-01; IA-03; ME-02; MI-07; MI-08; NC-01; NE-02; NJ-09; NM-02; NV-03; NY-03; OH-09; PA-07; PA-08; PA-10; TX-28; TX-34; VA-02; WA-03; WI-03.

_
**What the polling says (message proof points)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb9473c8-ada5-4afa-93c3-ef97a6aef82a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Interpretation:** Voters strongly support improving Alzheimer's care via a multi-pronged approach. Support for concrete policy suggestions--such as removing barriers to FDA-approved treatments and covering early diagnostic blood tests--is overwhelming and bipartisan.
A clear majority also connects policy action to political credit, signaling that members in competitive districts would benefit politically from promoting Alzheimer's policies, especially by emphasizing health benefits, taxpayer savings, and emotional factors.
**Strategic implications**
1. Map first, message second: Focus on the 28 most competitive districts identified in the polling. Prioritize seats with older populations and high senior voter turnout, if necessary.
2. Address emotional and financial impacts directly: Almost 40% of voters in battleground congressional districts have family members or friends affected by Alzheimer's. Highlight the human toll of Alzheimer's and connect this to the economic argument that early detection and treatment save taxpayers billions while improving quality of life.
3. Emphasize common sense: Use simple, clear language. Avoid jargon and overly technical Medicare language.
4. Use competitive district optics: Emphasize member leadership on Alzheimer's in districts that could flip the balance of power. Show constituents that their representative is taking meaningful action on a widely supported issue with personal resonance.

**Suggested member messaging (60-second version)**
● "Voters overwhelmingly support this plan: 92% back changing Medicare rules to make treatments accessible, 90% want coverage for early blood tests, and more than 90% think we should prioritize detection, treatment, and prevention."
● "This isn't just smart health policy--it's common sense. Early detection and prevention can save taxpayers billions while giving families more time together."
● "Patients shouldn't have to jump through hoops to access FDA-approved treatments or diagnostic tests. Our plan removes barriers to care, helping families, protecting wallets, and driving progress in the fight against Alzheimer's."
● "Millions of American families suffer because of Alzheimer's. These policies give us the chance to give these families more time with loved ones and ease their financial burden--we should take it."
**Action grid**
● Arm members in competitive districts with polling and topline messaging.
● Earned media: Op-eds, local media in competitive districts citing proposed solutions and their impacts.
* * *
* * *
Let us know in the comments what you think of this memo and if you live in one of the districts mentioned in it do you think this would have a major impact in the upcoming race in 2026?
* * *

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I voted to release the Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Because now more than ever, the American people deserve the truth.
| | |
---
Friend,
President Trump ran on "bring[ing] transparency and accountability back to our government." He also promised to make the Epstein files public. **So far, he has not delivered on either one.**
But last week, scores of emails from Jeffrey Epstein – the late financier, child sex offender and trafficker, and close friend of Donald Trump, who died in federal prison during Trump's first term – went public.
**It's no wonder that once Trump won the White House, he changed his tune: He clearly does not want the American people to know the depth of his relationship with Epstein.**
Instead of releasing the files he pledged to make public, Trump has spent his time adding $3 BILLION to his net worth, slashing your health care, and raiding your hard-earned benefits to shower $1.5 TRILLION in tax breaks on himself and his billionaire friends.
He’s been busy imposing reckless tariffs that hit working families the hardest – driving the economy into a tailspin and making everyday life more expensive at every turn.
And while doing all of that, he’s ignored a looming health care catastrophe – one that will force 24 million Americans to watch their premiums double, triple, or even quadruple next year, including nearly 300,000 Coloradans.
And to top it off, he used the government shutdown to block the House of Representatives from voting on the Epstein files. But he only delayed the inevitable.
Last night, the House finally voted 427-1 in support of the bill to release the files. **Just minutes after that, I joined my colleagues in the Senate to unanimously approve releasing the files. It’s now sitting right on the president’s desk – and with veto-proof majorities in both chambers, there’s nothing he can do. **
It’s a stunning rebuke from his party, and concrete proof of the power the American people hold – that you hold – when we speak out in one voice to demand real accountability and transparency from the officials they elect to serve. No more empty promises, no more smoke and mirrors.
**Because now more than ever, the American people deserve the truth.**
Thank you,
Michael

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Oh boy. Stephen Miller is on the case again.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Frankly, if he’s speaking out against us, we must be on the right track.
#

Folks, Mark Kelly here.
Yesterday, I joined Senator Slotkin and some military and intelligence veterans in Congress in putting together a video for the men and women serving our country. The message was very simple:
You can refuse illegal orders. In fact, our nation depends on the military’s duty to support and defend the Constitution itself above any one leader.
In response, Stephen Miller and others in Trump’s orbit have accused us of insurrection.
I flew combat missions in Desert Storm, and I was almost shot down more than once. I was also at the Capitol when Stephen’s boss sent a mob to try to steal an election. I know the difference between defending our Constitution and an insurrection, even if Trump and Miller don’t.
Stephen Miller has never worn the uniform. He’s never served anyone or anything but Trump and himself. He was there when Trump asked if he could have protestors shot. He’s responsible for some of the absolute worst things coming out of this Administration, and he’s working around the clock to give Trump more and more power.
Frankly, if Stephen Miller is speaking out against us, we must be on the right track.
With that being said, the reality here is that we’re up against the wealthiest and most powerful people in the entire world. They’ve got all the money they’ll ever need, and they’re going to spend every dollar they can to stay in power. We won’t stand a chance in 2026 or 2028 unless we raise the resources to fight back. It would be foolish to ignore that.
But I am not afraid of them. You shouldn’t be either.
[**And if you’d like to support me as my team and I continue the fight to defend our democracy, I’m humbly asking you to make a donation today.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251119-1-800k&t=1&akid=6248%2E6688874%2Ez-fFPO)

clean_body: Frankly, if he’s speaking out against us, we must be on the right track. Folks, Mark Kelly here. Yesterday, I joined Senator Slotkin and some military and intelligence veterans in Congress in putting together a video for the men and women serving our country. The message was very simple: You can refuse illegal orders. In fact, our nation depends on the military’s duty to support and defend the Constitution itself above any one leader. In response, Stephen Miller and others in Trump’s orbit have accused us of insurrection. I flew combat missions in Desert Storm, and I was almost shot down more than once. I was also at the Capitol when Stephen’s boss sent a mob to try to steal an election. I know the difference between defending our Constitution and an insurrection, even if Trump and Miller don’t. Stephen Miller has never worn the uniform. He’s never served anyone or anything but Trump and himself. He was there when Trump asked if he could have protestors shot. He’s responsible for some of the absolute worst things coming out of this Administration, and he’s working around the clock to give Trump more and more power. Frankly, if Stephen Miller is speaking out against us, we must be on the right track. With that being said, the reality here is that we’re up against the wealthiest and most powerful people in the entire world. They’ve got all the money they’ll ever need, and they’re going to spend every dollar they can to stay in power. We won’t stand a chance in 2026 or 2028 unless we raise the resources to fight back. It would be foolish to ignore that. But I am not afraid of them. You shouldn’t be either.
