name: Sharice Davids
subject: We just won Round One. But Round Two is just around the corner.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me first

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119599275/583621712/-1161443949?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyNjViNS05NmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z72x8fxAJIVU9vZtj7WNk4JGm0kJwEfgSiidLMyc_g=)
---
Peter, this is Congresswoman Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas — and I wanted you to hear it from me first: **We just won the first round in this gerrymandering fight. But round two is just around the corner.**

After weeks of secret partisan maneuvering and shady backroom deals, Kansas Republicans failed to gather the necessary signatures to force a special legislative session on redistricting.

Our grassroots campaign is having an impact.

**However, it’s likely they’ll make another attempt to gerrymander Kansas during the regular legislative session that begins in January.** The Kansas House Speaker even made an explicit promise: Republicans will continue the “conversation about redistricting.”

Look, this is a big victory for the people of Kansas, and our democracy as a whole. But it could turn into a temporary victory if we don’t spend every second between now and January keeping up the hard work.

[_**Their plan to cheat the system isn’t over — so we can’t slow down either. Please, can you chip in a split donation between Linda Sánchez and my campaign to help us keep up the pressure campaign all the way through the new year? We need every ounce of grassroots support we can get if we want to spook Kansas Republicans off once again.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119599276/583621713/-1161443949?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyNjViNS05NmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z72x8fxAJIVU9vZtj7WNk4JGm0kJwEfgSiidLMyc_g=)
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119599277/583621714/-1161443949?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyNjViNS05NmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z72x8fxAJIVU9vZtj7WNk4JGm0kJwEfgSiidLMyc_g=)
---
For weeks, Republican legislators were circulating a petition to call for a special session. The sole purpose of that special session? Gerrymandering Kansas’ maps by splitting up Johnson County — something Republicans promised to never do during their last gerrymandering push in 2021.

After that gerrymander, which was designed to make Kansas’ 3rd as Republican-friendly as possible, Republicans thought they had my number. The former Senate Majority Leader even said at the time: _“I guarantee you we can draw four Republican congressional maps.”_

**But they were wrong. In the next election, I won by _even more._**

Kansas Republicans have made it clear they’ll do anything to hold onto power — even silencing their own constituents at the ballot box. But I’ve been just as clear: **Voters should choose their representatives, not the other way around.**

[_**Stopping this special session is a moment for celebration — but that’s all it is: A moment. We can’t lose our focus now, not when we’re so close to ending this gerrymandering push for good. Please, chip in a split donation right away to keep our campaign prepared for everything that comes our way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119599278/583621715/-1161443949?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-11-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmUyNjViNS05NmM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z72x8fxAJIVU9vZtj7WNk4JGm0kJwEfgSiidLMyc_g=)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Another billionaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40441%2E3422442%2EXs3W5f)
Peter,
Another self-funding billionaire just announced he’s running for governor of California.
**[Unlike my opponents, I can’t write my campaign massive checks. Can you chip in $5 to help me keep up?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251119_2_ak.2FOVrP&refcode=em20251119-40441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40441%2E3422442%2EXs3W5f)**
My new opponent is claiming he'll fight the very industries he got rich helping grow—fossil fuel companies, tobacco, and private immigration detention facilities—at great cost to Californians. I call bullshit.
Californians are looking for a fighter—not an out of touch billionaire with no skin in the game.
_But there are now more billionaires running for California Governor than single moms like me who understand the pinch of rising costs._
Winning a statewide election in California requires a lot of money. Our campaign will need to raise millions of dollars to reach voters and keep our Democratic frontrunner status.
With another billionaire in the race, I’m counting on supporters like you to step up right now to have my back.
**[Peter, can you make a grassroots donation of $5 or whatever makes sense for you to show that California can’t be bought?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251119_2_ak.2FOVrP&refcode=em20251119-40441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40441%2E3422442%2EXs3W5f)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251119-40441&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40441_3422442_Xs3W5f&akid=40441%2E3422442%2EXs3W5f)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We're trailing our Democrat opponent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

I'm not one for sugarcoating. This race is razor-thin, and I need your immediate support to build back the momentum we need heading into the election year.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Reversing Clinton Judge Appeals Court Rules Students Can’t be Punished for using Transgender Classmates’ Biological Pronouns
body:
Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten
through high school refer to all classmates—including those who
identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school
district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an
“anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use
the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 19, 2025

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77827&L=36524&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItY2xhc3NtYXRlcy1iaW9sb2dpY2FsLXByb25vdW5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e1b01db4d82a0576112229f0aec40c65430f678ece0c7814ed1a9382930061aa]

Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten
through high school refer to all classmates—including those who
identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school
district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an
“anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use
the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely known
among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local School
District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of Columbus
created a measure to discipline students who use language that
inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as part of
a series of speech codes in support of the district’s preferred
viewpoints.

clean_body: Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten through high school refer to all classmates—including those who identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. [alt_text] [*****] November 19, 2025 [article-image] [] Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten through high school refer to all classmates—including those who identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely known among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local School District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of Columbus created a measure to discipline students who use language that inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as part of a series of speech codes in support of the district’s preferred viewpoints. I lost everything in my life too many times to count. I lost my first wife and unborn child in a car crash. I've been through bankruptcy and a divorce. I've been to war four times and came back with the scars both mentally and physically that come with that. Just like so many Americans, I've been knocked down and gotten back up. **And now I 'm running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country--against a Congresswoman who's done nothing other than sell us out. ** My name is Fred Wellman. I'm a 22-year Army veteran, entrepreneur, and dad running for Congress in Missouri's Second Congressional District. Ann Wagner hasn't held a town hall in years, she's tripled her net worth while in Congress, and she's been nothing other than a rubber stamp on Trump's agenda. **But I need your help to take this seat back for the people. Can you chip in $15, $5, or even just $3 to support my campaign?**

name: Donavan McKinney
subject: My opponent is running taxpayer-funded ads
body:
Instead of using our money to invest in our community, he’s using our money to promote himself — again
#
Friend, my name is Donavan McKinney. I'm a state representative in Michigan, and I'm running for Congress in Michigan's 13th District.
**I'm a working class guy endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Rashida Tlaib who will always fight for working people, a Green New Deal, and Medicare for All.**
I'm running against a multi-millionaire incumbent Congressman who is running ads _promoting himself_ with funds appropriated by the House, even as his campaign is already flush with cash from his self-funding.
_**It's not the first time he's run campaign ads on the taxpayer dime, and it surely won't be the last.**_
**[Friend, when we have a Congressman this corrupt, we need all the help we can get to fight back. Because our campaign is powered by and for the people, I'm hoping to get as many signatures from progressives across the country. Will you sign your name to usher in a new generation of leaders to the House?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22077?t=1&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)**
**[SIGN YOUR NAME](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22077?t=2&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)**
As I write this, I know families across our community are struggling — trying to decide between making their car insurance payments or paying for their water bills, and saying prayers that their card won’t decline in the supermarket checkout line. We work hard, and we pay taxes and elect Representatives because we trust they’ll work hard, too, and do right by us. But time and time again, Shri has abused that trust. He’s shown he’s not accountable to us — he won’t even pick up the phone when his constituents call, and spends our taxpayer dollars on his own self-promoting ads.
I'm running because I'm sick of seeing all this greed and hoarding of wealth while communities like mine haven't seen investments in decades. But putting a stop to this means electing ethical leaders who are committed to ending the corruption and getting our government back to working for us.
[**Friend, I'll probably never be the richest guy on the House floor. But I will always be the one working hard, and fighting tooth and nail, to make sure Detroiters have the opportunities to create wealth in their own communities, unlike my opponent. Can you join Bernie and Rashida by signing onto my supporter list today?**](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22077?t=3&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)
**[SIGN HERE](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22077?t=4&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)**
In solidarity,
Donavan McKinney
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22077?t=5&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=6&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=7&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1358%2E2118727%2EA7oyKD)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: The Supreme Court could decide the future of women’s sports.
body:
You know that women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/vNgpAQgJAvgbe-LhMYT6UwKrVWOY-yjsCtaMvccPExO9G_E2goKNQnkMg9YhIgZaK4WWPy45HxQrS1PzHUUk8VNQ-6SRy-D1A8O1nCOCxxx_xlS_BYQEzgvl4lVvkPnqPd5VmHA_94MxkcWoSEMhpyawmHKG1mut6k-xG-aCX_7FgaPZcjiM1nsV/ouR3_6r8E_Y1-s_L0VJK8q6d9U0BGML5/15)_

**** Dear Fellow American, You know that women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.
[ Sign the Declaration on Women’s Sports](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/73qGWUgtx-i6iB6fSrNqTEerDDpA8nYmSvvRfsaO4sftEJu6nwhWxCc1JEWLpbzasAz7QHNHT5eDBLncl9osyHgKKbCclgbb4QJ8B4Pjz8XMFyqkf5WWBgdo3r2Is3lPj5I_h-4LlFQWQvPUYueI9MRLruSrsG7gfg8TiUm0sZmN2X8YW-SRqB9gGJ2O3-pZgYo6JccoMAH3c6I7bgFVwKbGXWRq1ToZpNtryelAXyyfXcI9Op_Hfnh5J_kkMHyQgu94hYXWxLopeqseNfnGpqalJt_lOl4__d0jD85jSNvt0j9XwaXh_Lsj9Gc6dAac2tKHSdb4jIVr_kJMiS3d48oC1N_0KFKXSzke83iVsw41bJ4uzAdyXsUP3lgRqsGPkrqaHpzPZlR6N7Xh4f0WCFfbZAAcaPQgopd0juJau4M3llUBo6XXtVquLkjcXYdarDx9ehXk1qVT35PQXZpWtY26LAVcKxhww-qvZ8WMR_ntvxrWMCqs44hwQUsK6vkp7gGQICmn_9GUCzDL8R7ErgE2JpvAWuckzce8P2cn8kY89S3fEjs5C2eCnD3ELixQv1MZYwCy6Dt3lnHPnO8MxIzmqKHWbWlOG4wNjzZ7ma1Wnx7UIGRCCabAo9V1nhrgwf-UpUewWaiL0bBkE_giLBNFsur_Ps_qex93v68ove6LIz6tB0hJLk1pFphXZFhhkZdZuu0fioYW6eCGbX1550eoO5byKZmKayjvdAX-QE86fxk-R3OOzZpIwvyryFE2yzgo/jZHG6cRS7Xuc7dUmAhcIjXaH32bqAa4M/15)
Your signature will say clearly:

✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams
✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety

And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth. But across America, men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety. Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--State of West Virginia v. B.P.J. and Little v. Hecox --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide. If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today. Your signature will say clearly: ✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams ✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety ✅ Radical gender ideology ignores biological truth Thank you for standing for truth. ### The parties are failing us. Here's why we need to stop waiting for them to figure it out. Today's pre-edited recording of the Latino Vote Podcast.
| | [The Latino Vote Podcast](https://substack.com/@thelatinovotepodcast) and [Mike Madrid](https://substack.com/@madridmike)
---
| Nov 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@thelatinovotepodcast)| | [](https://substack.com/@madridmike)

Welcome back to another episode of The Latino Vote Podcast. Chuck's fresh off a trip from Madrid, Spain (where he discovered eating, napping, and more eating), and Mike's fired up about what just happened in Washington with the Epstein files vote. But what started as commentary on DC drama turned into something bigger: a call to action to create **an independent Latino political agenda**.
## Chuck Rocha Adventures: Madrid, Spain
Before we get into the heavy politics, we need to talk about Chuck's Spanish Adventure. Picture this: Chuck Rocha, self-described redneck and working-class warrior, wandering through Madrid's _(the City not the person)_ working-class neighborhoods having an epiphany. Every apartment building surrounded by parks. Every community with its own bakery, butcher shop, and doctor. Real food with actual flavor--tomatoes that taste like his grandmother's farm. And yes, his wife lured him to the Prado Museum with promises of Biblical beheading scenes "just like the movie."
Chuck Rocha Adventures - Madrid, Spain
Why does this matter? Because Chuck came back energized by seeing how other countries structure life around **community, affordable living, and quality of life** --exactly the economic priorities we're about to demand for Latino communities back home.
## The Epstein Files and the GOP Loyalty Crisis
Mike opens with a fascinating observation: the Epstein files vote represents the first major crack in the Republican Party's foundational glue under Trump--absolute loyalty to the leader. When even Marjorie Taylor Greene, Tom Massie, Lauren Boebert, and nearly 100 Republicans break ranks, you know the loyalty-glue is about to dissolve.
But here's the kicker: once that loyalty is gone, there's nothing left holding the party together. No ideology. No core principles. Just atomization into dozens of competing factions--from Heritage Foundation traditionalists to openly Nazi-supporting voices like Nick Fuentes and Tucker Carlson.
The house of cards is coming down, and it's exposing a truth both parties need to reckon with: **neither has an actual agenda that speaks to working-class America, and especially not to working-class Latinos.**
## [What the latest Carlos Odio's/Equis Polling Is Telling Us](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a4fe9fc-2dc6-45ae-a7ec-f18836ffdb6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[CHECK OUT THE LATEST POLL FROM EQUIS](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a4fe9fc-2dc6-45ae-a7ec-f18836ffdb6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Our friend Carlos Odio at Equis Research (one of the most methodologically sound pollsters in the Latino space) [just dropped preliminary findings that confirm what we've been saying](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a4fe9fc-2dc6-45ae-a7ec-f18836ffdb6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Latinos are moving away from Trump, but they're NOT rushing back to embrace Democrats either.
This isn't the normal progressive infighting about whether the party is left enough. This is a **trust crisis**. A believability crisis. Latinos are essentially saying: "We don't believe either of you actually care about our lives."
And why should they? When you're trying to figure out how to pay rent AND the utility bill AND keep food on the table, nobody's talking about your reality. They're talking about bathrooms and abstract threats to democracy while you're doing the math on which bill you can delay without getting shut off.
## The Opportunity: A Latino Political Agenda
We're at a historic inflection point. For the first time, we have:
* **Real data** showing exactly what Latino voters care about (economy, affordability, jobs)
* **Proven swing voting behavior** that makes us the ONLY truly movable electorate in American politics
* **Growing awareness** among Latino leaders that the old playbook doesn't work
* **Space to lead** because both parties are in crisis

White working-class voters? Locked into Republicans no matter how badly the economy treats them. Black working-class voters? Loyal to Democrats through thick and thin. Only Latinos are actually holding both parties accountable, willing to swing 20+ points based on who delivers.
**That 's not weakness. That's power. And we need to start acting like it.**
## What This Agenda Could Look Like
At the NALEO conference last week, Mike delivered a message to Latino state legislators from across the country: Stop being "Republican Latinos" or "Democrat Latinos." Start being **Latino Republicans and Latino Democrats**.
Put the community first. Challenge your own party's orthodoxy. Demand they listen to what the data is screaming:
* **Economic affordability** (housing, utilities, healthcare)
* **Real job creation** (not just service jobs with side gigs)
* **Working-class priorities** that unite Mexican Americans, Puerto Ricans, Dominicans, Cubans, and Venezuelans across regional lines

This isn't about starting a third party. It's about recognizing that if we define the agenda ourselves--centered on economic issues that affect OUR lives--we can force BOTH parties to compete for us on OUR terms.
## The Bottom Line
We don't owe loyalty to parties that don't deliver for us. We're the essential workforce. We're the blue-collar backbone of America. We're the swing voters who will determine elections for the next generation.
It's time to act like it.
* * *
_Thanks for listening. Give us a like, subscribe, and if you 're lucky enough to still have your mama around, give her a call this week. See you after Thanksgiving._
**-- The Latino Vote Podcast Team**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: That is what persistence looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
In moments like this, we need leaders who will fight with everything they have.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119600105/583624577/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTdmMGExNS05YWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2y-Ntj4GkIzbyPXZcV0ywSFPqju2ytCiFZlgnk5-Qk=&emci=83fab967-7cc5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=be7f0a15-9ac5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | In moments like this, we need leaders who will fight with everything they have. Yesterday, something extraordinary happened: the House and Senate voted almost unanimously to release the Epstein files. **And I led the push in the Senate to make this happen.** But getting here wasn't easy. When we first began this effort in July, we had only 25 Democratic cosponsors in the Senate. The idea of forcing full transparency — especially with powerful names like Donald Trump included in Epstein's network — was something every Republican was hesitant to touch. When we forced a vote on the bill in September, all 47 Democrats supported it, but 51 Republicans tabled it. Trump was still hoping this issue would fade away. But we kept fighting alongside the victims and advocates demanding disclosure. We called out the secrecy. We pushed past the stonewalling. We reminded the Senate that the wealthy and well-connected should face equal justice under the law. Yesterday, we won the battle, passing the bill to release the Epstein files with the unanimous support of all 100 Senators. This is a huge stride towards justice for the victims and accountability for the perpetrators. But we are not at the finish line. We will keep carrying the fight to overcome the Trump administration's maneuvers to avoid disclosing the files. We won’t rest until we get full justice for the victims. **That is what persistence looks like. That is what refusing to back down can achieve.** Even when battles feel hard, the only way we can win is to keep fighting. clean_body: In moments like this, we need leaders who will fight with everything they have. | | | | In moments like this, we need leaders who will fight with everything they have. Yesterday, something extraordinary happened: the House and Senate voted almost unanimously to release the Epstein files. And I led the push in the Senate to make this happen. But getting here wasn't easy. When we first began this effort in July, we had only 25 Democratic cosponsors in the Senate. The idea of forcing full transparency — especially with powerful names like Donald Trump included in Epstein's network — was something every Republican was hesitant to touch. When we forced a vote on the bill in September, all 47 Democrats supported it, but 51 Republicans tabled it. Trump was still hoping this issue would fade away. But we kept fighting alongside the victims and advocates demanding disclosure. We called out the secrecy. We pushed past the stonewalling. We reminded the Senate that the wealthy and well-connected should face equal justice under the law. Yesterday, we won the battle, passing the bill to release the Epstein files with the unanimous support of all 100 Senators. This is a huge stride towards justice for the victims and accountability for the perpetrators. But we are not at the finish line. We will keep carrying the fight to overcome the Trump administration's maneuvers to avoid disclosing the files. We won’t rest until we get full justice for the victims. That is what persistence looks like. That is what refusing to back down can achieve. Even when battles feel hard, the only way we can win is to keep fighting. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Onward! name: Wes Moore
subject: (1) New Call
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)
One of the most important parts about being governor is connecting with people like you, Peter.
That’s why I’m calling a couple of supporters who **[chip into this email.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251119-1.Cua_TB&refcode=em-20251119-1&t=2&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)** I want to hear what’s on your mind.
What makes your heart beat a little faster ? What’s motivating you? **What could my team do to help make Maryland a state that delivers _for you?_**
All of these questions run through my mind when I get to work, and there’s been so much to get done with the recent shutdown and the chaos coming out of Washington. With the holidays coming up and folks taking a moment to reflect, I want to talk directly with you: **to understand how our administration can build a state that serves.**
Supporters like you are the reason I do this. We wouldn’t have made it even halfway this far without a grassroots team by our side.
**[So what do you say, Peter? Will you chip in $5 today for a chance to get a call from me?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251119-1.Cua_TB&refcode=em-20251119-1&t=3&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251119-1.Cua_TB&amount=5&refcode=em-20251119-1&t=22&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)**
Thank you for all that you do.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251119-1.Cua_TB&refcode=em-20251119-1&t=23&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251119-1&t=24&refcode2=943_1086043_I5HQJP&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=943%2E1086043%2EI5HQJP)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: We stunned the establishment. Then they started fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
It’s hard to believe James launched this campaign only two months ago. A lot of people tried to dismiss us and dismiss Texas at first, but here’s what happened next:
**First:** Ken Paxton started attacking James as a “lunatic” who was “distorting Christianity.”
**Then:** John Cornyn decided to stoop down to Paxton’s level and parrot the same smears. He spent significant sums attacking James on Texans’ screens.
**Now:** Public polling shows this race is in the margin of error. James is in a dead heat with both of them. Our campaign is putting Texas’ U.S. Senate seat in play for Democrats in a way almost nobody believed was possible earlier this year.
But the truth is, our momentum is only going to invite more smears and attack ads. DC Republicans are scared and are likely willing to do anything to make sure James is not our nominee.
**[So we have to keep fighting and giving this race everything we’ve got. Please consider making a $5 donation to James Talarico’s campaign for the U.S. Senate.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251119-1-ak&t=1&akid=249%2E1347274%2E_IIdKF)**

name: Team Haley
subject: BREAKING: Trump targets Affordable Care Act tax credits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Families are in danger of losing coverage

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9019?t=2&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
null, this is urgent.

According to a new report from _Bloomberg_ , Donald Trump just told Republicans in Congress not to “waste” time protecting the Affordable Care Act tax credits that help millions of Americans afford their health insurance.
We need to send a message. **[Add your name now to our urgent petition: Tell Congress to protect the Affordable Care Act credits!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
---
Here’s the brutal truth: **If these credits are cut, working families could face thousands of dollars in higher health costs** – and many may lose their coverage entirely.
Republicans have already slashed funding for health care that hospitals across Michigan rely on to stay open. As a result, we could see doctor shortages, clinic closures, and fewer critical services in areas that already struggle to access care.
**We can’t let it happen. That’s why we’re calling for 5,000 people to speak out before midnight TONIGHT. Add your name now: _[Tell Congress to protect the ACA credits!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)_**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
---
Thank you for standing with us,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9028?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9019?t=9&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1420%2E49239%2EsQzQf7)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: What we did for Veterans Week
body:
Seth went all across Massachusetts

| |
---
Hey there, This past week, Seth was on the move across Massachusetts, showing up for veterans, families, and the communities that keep Massachusetts strong. Here's a look at a few stops: _🏃♂️ Seth joined veterans and families last Sunday in Devens, MA, at the Clear Path for Veterans 5K, helping raise awareness and support for programs that serve those who served._ _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601279/583628398/2090747700?refcode=251118_sfm_review_img2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFiZDY5Mi05Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVlrxCVbNmvfhXw2L-9YZpT6m884WmTsrGzzbeI7-SA=)__Seth started Veterans Day in Worcester, serving pancakes to veterans and their families, a simple but meaningful way to give back to those who’ve given so much._ [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601280/583628399/2090747700?refcode=251118_sfm_review_img3&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFiZDY5Mi05Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVlrxCVbNmvfhXw2L-9YZpT6m884WmTsrGzzbeI7-SA=)_Later that morning, he joined local veterans at the Massachusetts Vietnam Veterans Memorial for a wreath-laying ceremony honoring those who served, those who never came home, and those who came home carrying invisible wounds._ _🎤 On Monday, November 10th, Seth hosted his 11th annual Veterans Town Hall in Marblehead at Abbot Hall, giving veterans a stage to share what service means to them._ From corner to corner of the commonwealth, this campaign is about showing up — not just on Veterans Day, but every day — for the people**** who make Massachusetts work. **[If you believe in leadership that leads by example, chip in to help keep Seth on the road and this campaign moving forward:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601281/583628400/2090747700?refcode=251118_sfm_review_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFiZDY5Mi05Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVlrxCVbNmvfhXw2L-9YZpT6m884WmTsrGzzbeI7-SA=)** | **[Chip In](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601282/583628401/1375639745?refcode=251118_sfm_review_b1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFiZDY5Mi05Y2M1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVlrxCVbNmvfhXw2L-9YZpT6m884WmTsrGzzbeI7-SA=)**

Thanks for being part of this team,

Seth for Massachusetts

Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. clean_body: Seth went all across Massachusetts | | Hey there, This past week, Seth was on the move across Massachusetts, showing up for veterans, families, and the communities that keep Massachusetts strong. Here's a look at a few stops: 🏃♂️ Seth joined veterans and families last Sunday in Devens, MA, at the Clear Path for Veterans 5K, helping raise awareness and support for programs that serve those who served. started Veterans Day in Worcester, serving pancakes to veterans and their families, a simple but meaningful way to give back to those who’ve given so much. that morning, he joined local veterans at the Massachusetts Vietnam Veterans Memorial for a wreath-laying ceremony honoring those who served, those who never came home, and those who came home carrying invisible wounds. 🎤 On Monday, November 10th, Seth hosted his 11th annual Veterans Town Hall in Marblehead at Abbot Hall, giving veterans a stage to share what service means to them. From corner to corner of the commonwealth, this campaign is about showing up — not just on Veterans Day, but every day — for the people** who make Massachusetts work. = | =** Thanks for being part of this team, Seth for Massachusetts | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

subject: This is who we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
16 establishment Democrats...

To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/KQK2Sg37EWxa)

Friend, now that the petitioning process is over and names are on the ballot, we finally have a clear view of who we're up against. **_Kat's 16 opponents are just different types of establishment Democrats._** We're up against candidates who think that universal healthcare and taxing the rich are "extreme positions," and that the only thing we can do to stand up to Trump is to write a "scathing" letter. **To them, fighting for systemic change is a line that they'll never cross.** And that's why establishment Democrats raise a lot of money. Wealthy donors and PACs like how they don't really stand for anything. **Friend, that's why your support is so important.** As we get closer to Election Day, we're going to need to ramp up our voter engagement efforts and really show people who Kat is and what sets her apart from the 16 other candidates in this race. But with her expensive court case taking up a lot of our resources, we need your help. [**Will you please consider donating any amount that you can to Kat's campaign today and help us fight against the establishment wing of the party and push for real change in Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/rHEX75KlFUeI) Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/OnaOfqWtPV8B)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/JERh736CTSP4)

name: Steve Daines
subject: Finally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Now let’s get back to work for the American people. |
---

_Finally, Fellow American._

Democrats finally ended their political stunt, and the shutdown is over.

As I've said since the Schumer Shutdown first began, shutdowns start with a bang and end with a whimper, and this one was no different.

I'm glad that several brave Democrats joined Senate Republicans in voting to reopen the government. We can now stop this nonsense & get back to work for the American people.

As we reopen the government, **[I am asking for your opinion](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0947680f95dc48749b60161b81b50a6a&_e=CQIBnN-3u9te1swCMAfA6mRBexWyBCvaagAYogKYOCUrG7nruZuEXGMzns80OaMHwprcBf8Gkok9nhXpoRNOf4lx-M90xSD1-23AKo5mJb-OhhUqi93LChLhEy8nBWYus0mi1bnWIxr1YF90m9Ij3VGfxN59kxlXMdyOzbAv6Wxe4pTStQd2Ji3KCXnJMMtucgSl3_Toc2hq5QNYYzslycLGuHjKUI-okAsUAPYaNO2ySaOsm1zJW8iWxGJpnXAJ48BvjNcAgybaFWIh9y36GNKoNGbe_MEdRgj4ZhKB0Ftx8qKJLagHrYUO_q4Supz09SA6th8VhZm_meH6Eqv3Q6mDojyknIknxb67aChhVbFpMTFydZbra_O8rVtUc3UL31-r4y-40MXu3uI6-gZUkjZan2mMs_2F6H250UaQ0ktmrG9WSJvnePxJ-PS7RXksntgOgSHpbfBYUWERg0w1Y1Bq6EnLcWw8oGModL4lP2X91d1Ht-7t3bceEFpFkSgsqyYPpg0uKZM1pNaBsPg3XqlNjwfGuhfy5RvLe3INycGRNd_tq-GPEQ73XCOlBY4OOWgVqHygnCpazJz5OumcGMaLjZW-spNY-gealZadvf59iE-JsPV1ThV75e2wB7oIY0uPtjnAJL_cxdZQPYNH_-BHbjtBVwHxJf_pXl_jN6cpkz44Cy9qarurfyeKPwl5QrwoDJlRvE5IBxN3MUWTGOXknHK3TzMXscHbklfhoeNUs1e0VJHD_tEel-Y2mR1A)** - not your hard-earned dollars (but if you have a couple of bucks to spare, we need all the help we can get to fight back against the millions Democrats are raising...)

Fellow American, I won't sugarcoat this. Democrats won big in Virginia, California, and New York this year. The far-Left wing of the Democrat party is highly motivated, and we need to match their enthusiasm.

clean_body: Now let’s get back to work for the American people. | Finally, Fellow American. Democrats finally ended their political stunt, and the shutdown is over. As I've said since the Schumer Shutdown first began, shutdowns start with a bang and end with a whimper, and this one was no different. I'm glad that several brave Democrats joined Senate Republicans in voting to reopen the government. We can now stop this nonsense & get back to work for the American people. As we reopen the government, - not your hard-earned dollars (but if you have a couple of bucks to spare, we need all the help we can get to fight back against the millions Democrats are raising...) Fellow American, I won't sugarcoat this. Democrats won big in Virginia, California, and New York this year. The far-Left wing of the Democrat party is highly motivated, and we need to match their enthusiasm. Thanks, Fellow American. I am looking forward to reading your responses. Steve Daines P.S. The shutdown is finally over, and the first order of business is to hear from you, Fellow American. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished.
I couldn’t sit on this. I wrote you a quick note because you’ve always stood with me when it matters most.

clean_body: I need your eyes on this immediately. | | | | This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I’ll tell you straight: what I heard is not good. The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished. I couldn’t sit on this. I wrote you a quick note because you’ve always stood with me when it matters most. – DJT | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Peter,
People like you power this campaign. As we are getting even closer to the election year, the strength of our team matters now more than ever.
If we’re going to win this race and protect the Colorado way of life, we need a strong team of volunteers standing with us every step of the way. Whether you’re able to spend a few hours making phone calls or you’re ready to attend a caucus in support of Jena, any and all commitments bring us that much closer to winning this race.
See the full list of opportunities and sign up to become a volunteer with our campaign today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]
SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]Every action our volunteers take helps us build the momentum we need to win. Together, we can stand up to extremists, protect our rights, and build a stronger future for Colorado.
Thank you for being part of this movement,
Jena for Colorado

THE AUDACITY

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601991/583630885/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDNmZDcxMS1hMGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8FuOuDnopAOEE_8IKrCFP4fiVafSzdXzNFgUxpEiI=)

Did you see this, Peter?

Mike Johnson finally dragged the House back into session after Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her friends took a _43-day vacation_ instead of doing their jobs. And Miller-Meeks went back to Congress in style:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119601992/583630886/-1610961223?refcode=em25_251119_FCF_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251119_FCF_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b43fd711-a0c5-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDNmZDcxMS1hMGM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z8FuOuDnopAOEE_8IKrCFP4fiVafSzdXzNFgUxpEiI=)
While families here in Iowa deal with the fallout of her votes to gut Medicaid, slash funding for rural hospitals, and support of reckless tariffs that raise prices and hit our farm economy like engine failure, **she’s kicking back in First Class with complimentary snacks, premium drinks, and enough legroom to stretch all the way to DC. Can you say "out of touch" any louder?**

**Christina Bohannan isn’t here to fly above the people she represents, she’s in this race to fight _for_ them.** She’ll be the kind of representative Iowans desperately need: someone grounded in our values and ready to help this district finally _take off_ after years of being left on the tarmac.

**[Peter, can you chip in today to help Christina's campaign soar and kick Mariannette Miller-Meeks to the back of the plane? | | Dear Fellow Conservative,

Enough is enough. I'm glad to see the Trump administration is taking action to combat the rising tide of left-wing violence in America.

After years of witnessing Antifa members incite and commit violence against innocent people, attack law enforcement officials, and torch federal and private property, President Trump officially designated Antifa as a domestic terrorist organization.

This is a move The Heritage Foundation's scholars have promoted since 2019. It will prioritize attention and federal resources on Antifa and provide tools for stopping the funding that allows Antifa to operate.

Antifa is not just "a set of ideas." It is an organization with a logo, trained activists, funding, and uses pre-made signs and pre-gathered vehicles, gear, and projectiles.

This is a great first step. But there is even more President Trump can do to protect Americans from leftist violence.

The Heritage Foundation is urging the FBI to designate Transgender Ideology-Inspired Violent Extremism (TIVE) as domestic terrorism, following a string of attacks by trans or trans-supporting criminals.

Especially in the aftermath of the Charlie Kirk assassination, this action is long overdue.

If you want to help erase the threat of Antifa, please consider activating your Heritage Foundation membership today.

Your tax-deductible gift will help create and promote public policies that will help defeat the threat of violence from Antifa and transgender extremism.

**It just takes a moment. Click the secure link below to activate your membership today:**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-2/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/KH5O4bfY3lshxJ2e0-hp3QAehr45XKyK6vtkp-77vzlvnubTN-Lcqq-yWICm4xOUTAdjkGRnULeZm94F2_pcfzBmaVNPmtmfyldWQdDx_gdt3jk9VXhlFOXuLmNFGdoNQSLMFOed1h02A7l7QXs2P4INneA_8ZrX-chZEfxyX3zR5nAxFP0Dxf5ClZlyvSVyKaVadwEBfCmxY7BbmxaLc-WDaVO12twwaFV_iseZ6eLDknq258EtgtTFL0s4k_UMKzjv8sdAsS-kW8wH8lrKFiQdoa53_HRo5KxyWrFMHKaGxANZBuItTezaZHBmuvHfDWmfM2pR4rUIUAlKCFy9kKoPBLRdMReGRZTGMb6n6DaFKoHItlC0ovMr-X41ahtVP0fR_0b4n6fkNClVQjqSdKfFdEmT2zBnNgWdPMlSfuHuGZvU4w9dJ12H3nnDyEPf87R6dtwKhZCRSrx1ZFaTP_uo6IzluLTAMX31NIMUvNrQGdYHdFt1amFf1X9K3EDkvf-E3Ar9-QwJG6Pn5KxapoVHBoU8-yH9WS4C1aU0ISnnLdOTuFNGPCN4QNTgrM4ZOsvFTDNCPGXPi0nLXC9Hy9kyLf-2tmbGoiBpk_2ez_peocqqHO5A6jgUI4fwnB_xFJ_4/eIDXFr4pjz5eaDeLYFs37Wp6LOy6ipTB/15)

Best,

Tony Johnson

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Let me lay this out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251119-1-160+&refcode2=4037.734936.wOfdrs&t=1&akid=4037%2E734936%2EwOfdrs)
---
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Ruben Gallego today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251119-1-160+&t=2&akid=4037%2E734936%2EwOfdrs)
[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251119-1-160+&t=3&akid=4037%2E734936%2EwOfdrs)
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, and where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the Dobbs decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now, this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Ruben Gallego today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251119-1-160+&t=4&akid=4037%2E734936%2EwOfdrs)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251119-1-160+&t=5&akid=4037%2E734936%2EwOfdrs)
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Senator Tammy Baldwin
subject: Chris is a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_2_baldwin.tB6OHq&refcode=em20251119-2&t=1&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)
Hi, it’s Tammy Baldwin, U.S. Senator from Wisconsin.
**I’m reaching out today because I want to tell you why I’m proud to support Chris Pappas in his campaign to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate.**
**[But first I have to ask: Will you help Chris keep this critical blue Senate seat by making a contribution today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_2_baldwin.tB6OHq&refcode=em20251119-2&t=2&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)**
When I became the first openly gay Senator elected in our nation’s history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people’s lives.
And I know that’s exactly why Chris Pappas is running. If elected he’d make history as the first out gay man to serve in the Senate. But more importantly Chris is a fighter who’s working to ensure that everyone – no matter who they are or who they love – has the freedom and opportunity to thrive, whether that means owning a home, starting a family, opening a small business, or anything else in between.
In Congress Chris has taken on Big Pharma to lower the cost of prescription drugs, fought for tax cuts for working families and small businesses, and cracked down on predatory companies.
But he’s in the toughest race of his life. Just like my home state of Wisconsin, New Hampshire is a purple state. Last year I was reelected to the Senate **_by a margin of less than 1%._**
New Hampshire has a history of close races, too. In 2016 Democrats won the NH Senate race **by just 1,017 votes.** And in a small state like New Hampshire, a handful of votes could really make the difference. You can bet that national Republicans and their billionaire backers are prepared to spend millions to flip New Hampshire red.
**[That’s why I’m all in for Chris. If Democrats are going to have a shot at flipping the Senate, we must win in New Hampshire. Will you join me by chipping in to his campaign today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_2_baldwin.tB6OHq&refcode=em20251119-2&t=3&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)**
Chris Pappas is a fighter for working families. He’s never backed down from a tough fight. And he’s exactly who we need serving in the U.S. Senate.
But this race will be one of the most competitive in the country. It’s going to take a strong, people-powered movement to stand up against everything national Republicans throw at Chris.
**[Can you chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas defend this Senate seat and keep New Hampshire blue? Your grassroots donation will power his campaign to victory.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_2_baldwin.tB6OHq&refcode=em20251119-2&t=4&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251119_2_baldwin.tB6OHq&amount=5&refcode=em20251119-2&t=23&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)**
Thanks for being a part of this movement,
Tammy Baldwin
U.S. Senator from Wisconsin
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251119-2&t=24&refcode2=3585_582294_K3GU7G&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3585%2E582294%2EK3GU7G)

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump attacks on federal judges keep coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, the courts are one of our last lines of defense against a total Trump authoritarian regime. And Donald Trump knows it. **That’s why he and Attorney General Pam Bondi are attacking any federal judges who don't rule in their favor.** But it doesn’t stop there. While federal judges have life tenure, immigration judges are part of the Executive Branch currently being treated as a fiefdom by Donald Trump. **So it is sadly unsurprising that Trump’s latest attack on equal justice is through systematically removing immigration judges with prior immigrant defense work.** Every few months, Trump’s DOJ fires a slew of immigration judges, and an NPR analysis has found that _judges who have worked as immigrant defenders make up the largest share of those fired._ Firing qualified judges simply because their previous experience includes immigrant defense is a blatant attack on judicial independence and due process. **It’s just one piece of an overall assault on federal judges in an attempt to silence and intimidate anyone who threatens Trump's rule.** Donald Trump regularly targets judges by name, attacking their integrity, and inciting threats against them. One of Trump’s own appointees criticized him for those attacks in a ruling this summer. District Judge Thomas Cullen called it out as a “concerted effort by the Executive to smear and impugn individual judges who rule against it is both unprecedented and unfortunate.” Over the past year, the US Marshals Service has logged more than 500 direct threats to federal judges. That’s why I’ve led a **bipartisan** effort to fund the _Daniel Anderl Judicial Security and Privacy Act_ — legislation to help state and local governments remove judges’ personal information from the internet and protect them from doxxing and violence. As a former federal prosecutor, I know how vital an independent judiciary is to the health of our democracy. As a Member of Congress, I pledge to do everything in my power to protect it. **[If you’re with me, pitch in now to support my campaign:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119602200/583631525/205119699?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzIzNTk4Yi1hMWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onhrlvHNQtQ7Qw3qwF-oP817kL66Q2zB3L86EW7Y7w4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119602201/583631526/205119699?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251119_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzIzNTk4Yi1hMWM1LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onhrlvHNQtQ7Qw3qwF-oP817kL66Q2zB3L86EW7Y7w4=)

Scott Jennings **[put an out-of-line CNN panelist in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/604e5e19-2a3b-4b3f-984c-87395875b524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for suggesting that he was racist after he made an "IQ test" remark to another black panelist.
"You wanna make it racial?! That's ridiculous!" Jennings snapped. "I know this man, we're friends..."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/604e5e19-2a3b-4b3f-984c-87395875b524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/604e5e19-2a3b-4b3f-984c-87395875b524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Florida Senator proposes prison for threatening immigration officers**
Sen. Ashley Moody is introducing legislation that would criminalize approaching within 25 feet of **[federal immigration officers](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7c51ae-6f85-46b9-a628-ac7b721127bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7c51ae-6f85-46b9-a628-ac7b721127bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)after being warned to maintain distance, with violations carrying up to five years imprisonment as violence against enforcement agents surges nationwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e7c51ae-6f85-46b9-a628-ac7b721127bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The Halo Act Provisions:** Moody's bill would make it illegal to interfere with immigration officers' duties, threaten them with physical harm, or harass them during enforcement operations, with penalties including prison sentences of up to five years, fines, or both punishments combined.
* **Violence Spike Prompts Action:** Department of Homeland Security reports ICE officers are experiencing an 8,000% surge in death threats while facing bounties on their heads, family stalking, and online doxxing during the Trump administration's deportation operations. Two vehicle ramming attacks occurred during Charlotte enforcement operations this weekend, injuring at least one officer while agents arrested 130 illegal immigrants.
* **Political Blame Game:** DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin accused sanctuary city politicians of fueling officer attacks through "vilification and demonization tactics, including gross comparisons to the Nazi Gestapo and slave patrol." Moody, a former Florida Attorney General and law enforcement spouse, said she's "appalled" by harassment reports and insists the targeting "must end."

* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/e1859213-6397-4c78-81e7-db3491daf5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Doctor Makes Shocking Claim About Trump 's Brain**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1859213-6397-4c78-81e7-db3491daf5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A famous doctor has made **[a shocking claim about President Trump's brain:](https://substack.com/redirect/e1859213-6397-4c78-81e7-db3491daf5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"He bears all the hallmarks of being on controversial 'ACE-5' serum..."
"Super intelligence, iron-clad memory, age reversal, and unlimited energy."
**[>>See the full evidence here<<](https://substack.com/redirect/e1859213-6397-4c78-81e7-db3491daf5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
P.S. ACE-5 is said to be like testosterone, but for your brain. That's because it's now doing the impossible: "Reverse aging" human brains. **[Get every detail you need here.](https://substack.com/redirect/e1859213-6397-4c78-81e7-db3491daf5a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **MAGA Navy Seal DESTROYS CNN hack during HUMILIATING live interview**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c3415260-9893-451c-97c5-7fafae28d3ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# **Trump demands investigations into climate policy advocates at Saudi summit**
President Donald Trump called for immediate investigations into officials who championed aggressive climate change regulations, describing their initiatives as **[failed far-left schemes](https://substack.com/redirect/8a1ba692-03bd-4706-bed8-99ac11647e6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that damaged American prosperity during remarks at the U.S.-Saudi Investment Forum in Washington Wednesday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fcd3b50b-beae-4b84-af02-8fdd85b0e1fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **' Climate Change' Terminology Attack:** Trump mocked environmentalists' shift from "global warming" to "climate change" terminology, claiming the broader phrase conveniently covers any weather phenomenon while predicting world destruction. He hinted investigations into these advocates may already be underway, though he didn't specify targets beyond repeatedly attacking the "Green New Scam" that he says shuttered coal plants and weakened the power grid.
* **Economic Impact:** The president blamed climate policies for punishing success, rewarding failure and causing "the worst inflation in our country's history," contrasting his administration's "energy dominance" approach with the Biden White House's "virtue signaling and ineffective grifts." Trump's October proclamation declared Biden waged a "war on American energy" that shipped jobs from Texas to Tehran and the Midwest to Moscow.
* **Business-Focused Messaging:** Speaking before visionaries including Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Pfizer chief Albert Bourla at the Kennedy Center, Trump also declared "America is back and open for business." The remarks came one day after MBS pledged nearly $1 trillion in U.S. economic investment over the next year.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/24b91b9d-a9e2-4b3a-b78f-a1afb5ca5c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
# **Prosecutor admits full grand jury never approved final Comey indictment**
The interim U.S. attorney who charged former FBI Director James Comey acknowledged in court Wednesday that the complete **[grand jury panel never reviewed](https://substack.com/redirect/b0ad2a21-8ba1-4cc8-8859-bc7e8cff7877?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the final two-count indictment against him, only the foreperson and one other juror saw the revised charges after one count failed to gain majority support.
* **Procedural Disaster:** Former federal prosecutor Neama Rahmani called the revelation "amateur hour," explaining all 23 grand jurors must be present to review indictments and vote, with proxy voting prohibited under legal procedure.
* **Political Prosecution Claims Intensify:** Defense attorney Michael Dreeben argued the flawed indictment proves unlawful targeting, citing a memo from previous interim U.S. Attorney Erik Siebert declining to charge Comey before his resignation under Trump pressure. Judge Michael Nachmanoff questioned how Lindsey Halligan could have independently evaluated the case in just three days between her September 22 appointment and securing the indictment September 25.
* **Trump Retaliation Evidence:** Dreeben presented a pattern showing Comey criticizing Trump followed by presidential social media attacks, including a September 2025 Truth Social post declaring Comey "guilty as hell" and demanding immediate justice. Both Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James, also charged by Halligan's office, argue they face politically motivated prosecutions for being outspoken Trump critics, with trial scheduled for January 5, 2026.

* * *
# California teacher faces scrutiny after viral clip of him forcing transgender ideology on young students
California teacher **[Christian Shearhod](https://substack.com/redirect/8dc46745-ac00-4ff3-8739-370d61729750?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is facing viral scrutiny over viral clip of him forcing transgender ideology on children in his classroom.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4981c282-bef2-448d-a068-3c3ad6151c0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The lesson was in tangent of "Trans Visibility Week" with Shearhod giving students sheets of paper with the word "boy" or "girl" on them, and relating the feelings attached to receiving a certain paper with the trans-experience.
Shearhood is an elementary school teacher and viral social media influencer, originally going famous after getting his son's nails painted when a teacher told him that was for girls only. He is currently romantically involved with a man who claims he is a woman.
* * *
# **Melania Trump, Usha Vance make joint appearance at Marine Corps bases**
First Lady Melania Trump and Second Lady Usha Vance traveled together Wednesday for their **[first joint engagement](https://substack.com/redirect/46f83577-c003-4796-a9fb-79e446c09ab2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , visiting military personnel and their loved ones at major North Carolina Marine installations to deliver pre-holiday appreciation messages.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7c70cd76-4095-498b-9693-d3b487492786?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **School and Base Stops:** The duo toured Camp Lejeune--the Marine Corps' biggest East Coast facility--and nearby Air Station New River, meeting Lejeune High School students for conversations about social media and artificial intelligence topics before the first lady addressed assembled families in the gymnasium.
* **Holiday Season Thanks:** Melania relayed that President Trump extends warm wishes to the community, emphasizing both leaders remember service families especially during the upcoming celebrations. She recognized attendees for standing "behind our nation's defense" through their military connections and sacrifices.
* **Technology Focus Planned:** After an expected DeLalio Elementary School appearance, the women planned to speak at Air Station New River's Mega Hangar addressing troops and relatives, with Melania anticipated to acknowledge the Marine Corps reaching 250 years of existence while discussing her expanding interest in artificial intelligence and technological advancement issues.

Economic Impact: The president blamed climate policies for punishing success, rewarding failure and causing "the worst inflation in our country's history," contrasting his administration's "energy dominance" approach with the Biden White House's "virtue signaling and ineffective grifts." Trump's October proclamation declared Biden waged a "war on American energy" that shipped jobs from Texas to Tehran and the Midwest to Moscow. Business-Focused Messaging: Speaking before visionaries including Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Pfizer chief Albert Bourla at the Kennedy Center, Trump also declared "America is back and open for business." The remarks came one day after MBS pledged nearly $1 trillion in U.S. economic investment over the next year. Prosecutor admits full grand jury never approved final Comey indictment The interim U.S. attorney who charged former FBI Director James Comey acknowledged in court Wednesday that the complete the final two-count indictment against him, only the foreperson and one other juror saw the revised charges after one count failed to gain majority support. Procedural Disaster: Former federal prosecutor Neama Rahmani called the revelation "amateur hour," explaining all 23 grand jurors must be present to review indictments and vote, with proxy voting prohibited under legal procedure. Political Prosecution Claims Intensify: Defense attorney Michael Dreeben argued the flawed indictment proves unlawful targeting, citing a memo from previous interim U.S. Attorney Erik Siebert declining to charge Comey before his resignation under Trump pressure. Judge Michael Nachmanoff questioned how Lindsey Halligan could have independently evaluated the case in just three days between her September 22 appointment and securing the indictment September 25. Trump Retaliation Evidence: Dreeben presented a pattern showing Comey criticizing Trump followed by presidential social media attacks, including a September 2025 Truth Social post declaring Comey "guilty as hell" and demanding immediate justice. Both Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James, also charged by Halligan's office, argue they face politically motivated prosecutions for being outspoken Trump critics, with trial scheduled for January 5, 2026.
